verses.hebrewText: מִ֭שְׁלֵי שְׁלֹמֹ֣ה בֶן־דָּוִ֑ד מֶ֝֗לֶךְ יִשְׂרָאֵֽל׃
verses.englishText: THE PROVERBS of Solomon the son of David, king of Israel;

jps.text: THE PROVERBS of Solomon the son of David, king of Israel;

verses.hebrewText: לָדַ֣עַת חָכְמָ֣ה וּמוּסָ֑ר לְ֝הָבִ֗ין אִמְרֵ֥י בִינָֽה׃
verses.englishText: To know wisdom and instruction; to comprehend the words of understanding;

jps.text: To know wisdom and instruction; to comprehend the words of understanding;

verses.hebrewText: לָ֭קַחַת מוּסַ֣ר הַשְׂכֵּ֑ל צֶ֥דֶק וּ֝מִשְׁפָּ֗ט וּמֵישָׁרִֽים׃
verses.englishText: To receive the discipline of wisdom, justice, and right, and equity;

jps.text: To receive the discipline of wisdom, justice, and right, and equity;

verses.hebrewText: לָתֵ֣ת לִפְתָאיִ֣ם עָרְמָ֑ה לְ֝נַ֗עַר דַּ֣עַת וּמְזִמָּֽה׃
verses.englishText: To give prudence to the simple, to the young man knowledge and discretion;

jps.text: To give prudence to the simple, to the young man knowledge and discretion;

verses.hebrewText: יִשְׁמַ֣ע חָ֭כָם וְיֹ֣וסֶף לֶ֑קַח וְ֝נָבֹ֗ון תַּחְבֻּלֹ֥ות יִקְנֶֽה׃
verses.englishText: That the wise man may hear, and increase in learning, and the man of understanding may attain unto wise counsels;

jps.text: That the wise man may hear, and increase in learning, and the man of understanding may attain unto wise counsels;

verses.hebrewText: לְהָבִ֣ין מָ֭שָׁל וּמְלִיצָ֑ה דִּבְרֵ֥י חֲ֝כָמִ֗ים וְחִידֹתָֽם׃
verses.englishText: To understand a proverb, and a figure; the words of the wise, and their dark sayings.

jps.text: To understand a proverb, and a figure; the words of the wise, and their dark sayings.

verses.hebrewText: יִרְאַ֣ת יְ֭הוָה רֵאשִׁ֣ית דָּ֑עַת חָכְמָ֥ה וּ֝מוּסָ֗ר אֱוִילִ֥ים בָּֽזוּ׃ פ
verses.englishText: The fear of the LORD is the beginning of knowledge; but the foolish despise wisdom and discipline.

jps.text: The fear of the LORD is the beginning of knowledge; but the foolish despise wisdom and discipline.

verses.hebrewText: שְׁמַ֣ע בְּ֭נִי מוּסַ֣ר אָבִ֑יךָ וְאַל־תִּ֝טֹּ֗שׁ תֹּורַ֥ת אִמֶּֽךָ׃
verses.englishText: Hear, my son, the instruction of thy father, and forsake not the teaching of thy mother;

jps.text: Hear, my son, the instruction of thy father, and forsake not the teaching of thy mother;

verses.hebrewText: כִּ֤י ׀ לִוְיַ֤ת חֵ֓ן הֵ֬ם לְרֹאשֶׁ֑ךָ וַ֝עֲנָקִ֗ים לְגַרְגְּרֹתֶֽיךָ׃
verses.englishText: For they shall be a chaplet of grace unto thy head, and chains about thy neck.

jps.text: For they shall be a chaplet of grace unto thy head, and chains about thy neck.

verses.hebrewText: בְּנִ֡י אִם־יְפַתּ֥וּךָ חַ֝טָּאִ֗ים אַל־תֹּבֵֽא׃
verses.englishText: My son, if sinners entice thee, consent thou not.

jps.text: My son, if sinners entice thee, consent thou not.

verses.hebrewText: אִם־יֹאמְרוּ֮ לְכָ֪ה אִ֫תָּ֥נוּ נֶאֶרְבָ֥ה לְדָ֑ם נִצְפְּנָ֖ה לְנָקִ֣י חִנָּֽם׃
verses.englishText: If they say: 'Come with us, let us lie in wait for blood, let us lurk for the innocent without cause;

jps.text: If they say: 'Come with us, let us lie in wait for blood, let us lurk for the innocent without cause;

verses.hebrewText: נִ֭בְלָעֵם כִּשְׁאֹ֣ול חַיִּ֑ים וּ֝תְמִימִ֗ים כְּיֹ֣ורְדֵי בֹֽור׃
verses.englishText: Let us swallow them up alive as the grave, and whole, as those that go down into the pit;

jps.text: Let us swallow them up alive as the grave, and whole, as those that go down into the pit;

verses.hebrewText: כָּל־הֹ֣ון יָקָ֣ר נִמְצָ֑א נְמַלֵּ֖א בָתֵּ֣ינוּ שָׁלָֽל׃
verses.englishText: We shall find all precious substance, we shall fill our houses with spoil;

jps.text: We shall find all precious substance, we shall fill our houses with spoil;

verses.hebrewText: גֹּ֭ורָ֣לְךָ תַּפִּ֣יל בְּתֹוכֵ֑נוּ כִּ֥יס אֶ֝חָ֗ד יִהְיֶ֥ה לְכֻלָּֽנוּ׃
verses.englishText: Cast in thy lot among us; let us all have one purse' —

jps.text: Cast in thy lot among us; let us all have one purse' —

verses.hebrewText: בְּנִ֗י אַל־תֵּלֵ֣ךְ בְּדֶ֣רֶךְ אִתָּ֑ם מְנַ֥ע רַ֝גְלְךָ֗ מִנְּתִיבָתָֽם׃
verses.englishText: My son, walk not thou in the way with them, restrain thy foot from their path;

jps.text: My son, walk not thou in the way with them, restrain thy foot from their path;

verses.hebrewText: כִּ֣י רַ֭גְלֵיהֶם לָרַ֣ע יָר֑וּצוּ וִֽ֝ימַהֲר֗וּ לִשְׁפָּךְ־דָּֽם׃
verses.englishText: For their feet run to evil, and they make haste to shed blood.

jps.text: For their feet run to evil, and they make haste to shed blood.

verses.hebrewText: כִּֽי־חִ֭נָּם מְזֹרָ֣ה הָרָ֑שֶׁת בְּ֝עֵינֵ֗י כָל־בַּ֥עַל כָּנָֽף׃
verses.englishText: For in vain the net is spread in the eyes of any bird;

jps.text: For in vain the net is spread in the eyes of any bird;

verses.hebrewText: וְ֭הֵם לְדָמָ֣ם יֶאֱרֹ֑בוּ יִ֝צְפְּנ֗וּ לְנַפְשֹׁתָֽם׃
verses.englishText: And these lie in wait for their own blood, they lurk for their own lives.

jps.text: And these lie in wait for their own blood, they lurk for their own lives.

verses.hebrewText: כֵּ֗ן אָ֭רְחֹות כָּל־בֹּ֣צֵֽעַ בָּ֑צַע אֶת־נֶ֖פֶשׁ בְּעָלָ֣יו יִקָּֽח׃ פ
verses.englishText: So are the ways of every one that is greedy of gain; it taketh away the life of the owners thereof.

jps.text: So are the ways of every one that is greedy of gain; it taketh away the life of the owners thereof.

verses.hebrewText: חָ֭כְמֹות בַּח֣וּץ תָּרֹ֑נָּה בָּ֝רְחֹבֹ֗ות תִּתֵּ֥ן קֹולָֽהּ׃
verses.englishText: Wisdom crieth aloud in the streets, she uttereth her voice in the broad places;

jps.text: Wisdom crieth aloud in the streets, she uttereth her voice in the broad places;

verses.hebrewText: בְּרֹ֥אשׁ הֹמִיֹּ֗ות תִּ֫קְרָ֥א בְּפִתְחֵ֖י שְׁעָרִ֥ים בָּעִ֗יר אֲמָרֶ֥יהָ תֹאמֵֽר׃
verses.englishText: She calleth at the head of the noisy streets, at the entrances of the gates, in the city, she uttereth her words:

jps.text: She calleth at the head of the noisy streets, at the entrances of the gates, in the city, she uttereth her words:

verses.hebrewText: עַד־מָתַ֣י ׀ פְּתָיִם֮ תְּֽאֵהֲב֫וּ פֶ֥תִי וְלֵצִ֗ים לָ֭צֹון חָמְד֣וּ לָהֶ֑ם וּ֝כְסִילִ֗ים יִשְׂנְאוּ־דָֽעַת׃
verses.englishText: 'How long, ye thoughtless, will ye love thoughtlessness? And how long will scorners delight them in scorning, and fools hate knowledge?

jps.text: 'How long, ye thoughtless, will ye love thoughtlessness? And how long will scorners delight them in scorning, and fools hate knowledge?

verses.hebrewText: תָּשׁ֗וּבוּ לְֽתֹ֫וכַחְתִּ֥י הִנֵּ֤ה אַבִּ֣יעָה לָכֶ֣ם רוּחִ֑י אֹודִ֖יעָה דְבָרַ֣י אֶתְכֶֽם׃
verses.englishText: Turn you at my reproof; behold, I will pour out my spirit unto you, I will make known my words unto you.

jps.text: Turn you at my reproof; behold, I will pour out my spirit unto you, I will make known my words unto you.

verses.hebrewText: יַ֣עַן קָ֭רָאתִי וַתְּמָאֵ֑נוּ נָטִ֥יתִי יָ֝דִ֗י וְאֵ֣ין מַקְשִֽׁיב׃
verses.englishText: Because I have called, and ye refused, I have stretched out my hand, and no man attended,

jps.text: Because I have called, and ye refused, I have stretched out my hand, and no man attended,

verses.hebrewText: וַתִּפְרְע֥וּ כָל־עֲצָתִ֑י וְ֝תֹוכַחְתִּ֗י לֹ֣א אֲבִיתֶֽם׃
verses.englishText: But ye have set at nought all my counsel, and would none of my reproof;

jps.text: But ye have set at nought all my counsel, and would none of my reproof;

verses.hebrewText: גַּם־אֲ֭נִי בְּאֵידְכֶ֣ם אֶשְׂחָ֑ק אֶ֝לְעַ֗ג בְּבֹ֣א פַחְדְּכֶֽם׃
verses.englishText: I also, in your calamity, will laugh, I will mock when your dread cometh;

jps.text: I also, in your calamity, will laugh, I will mock when your dread cometh;

verses.hebrewText: בְּבֹ֤א *כְשַׁאֲוָה (כְשֹׁואָ֨ה ׀) פַּחְדְּכֶ֗ם וְֽ֭אֵידְכֶם כְּסוּפָ֣ה יֶאֱתֶ֑ה בְּבֹ֥א עֲ֝לֵיכֶ֗ם צָרָ֥ה וְצוּקָֽה׃
verses.englishText: When your dread cometh as a storm, and your calamity cometh on as a whirlwind; when trouble and distress come upon you.

jps.text: When your dread cometh as a storm, and your calamity cometh on as a whirlwind; when trouble and distress come upon you.

verses.hebrewText: אָ֣ז יִ֭קְרָאֻנְנִי וְלֹ֣א אֶֽעֱנֶ֑ה יְ֝שַׁחֲרֻ֗נְנִי וְלֹ֣א יִמְצָאֻֽנְנִי׃
verses.englishText: Then will they call me, but I will not answer, they will seek me earnestly, but they shall not find me.

jps.text: Then will they call me, but I will not answer, they will seek me earnestly, but they shall not find me.

verses.hebrewText: תַּ֭חַת כִּי־שָׂ֣נְאוּ דָ֑עַת וְיִרְאַ֥ת יְ֝הֹוָ֗ה לֹ֣א בָחָֽרוּ׃
verses.englishText: For that they hated knowledge, and did not choose the fear of the LORD;

jps.text: For that they hated knowledge, and did not choose the fear of the LORD;

verses.hebrewText: לֹא־אָב֥וּ לַעֲצָתִ֑י נָ֝אֲצ֗וּ כָּל־תֹּוכַחְתִּֽי׃
verses.englishText: They would none of my counsel, they despised all my reproof.

jps.text: They would none of my counsel, they despised all my reproof.

verses.hebrewText: וְֽ֭יֹאכְלוּ מִפְּרִ֣י דַרְכָּ֑ם וּֽמִמֹּעֲצֹ֖תֵיהֶ֣ם יִשְׂבָּֽעוּ׃
verses.englishText: Therefore shall they eat of the fruit of their own way, and be filled with their own devices.

jps.text: Therefore shall they eat of the fruit of their own way, and be filled with their own devices.

verses.hebrewText: כִּ֤י מְשׁוּבַ֣ת פְּתָיִ֣ם תַּֽהַרְגֵ֑ם וְשַׁלְוַ֖ת כְּסִילִ֣ים תְּאַבְּדֵֽם׃
verses.englishText: For the waywardness of the thoughtless shall slay them, and the confidence of fools shall destroy them.

jps.text: For the waywardness of the thoughtless shall slay them, and the confidence of fools shall destroy them.

verses.hebrewText: וְשֹׁמֵ֣עַֽ לִ֭י יִשְׁכָּן־בֶּ֑טַח וְ֝שַׁאֲנַ֗ן מִפַּ֥חַד רָעָֽה׃ פ
verses.englishText: But whoso hearkeneth unto me shall dwell securely, and shall be quiet without fear of evil.'

jps.text: But whoso hearkeneth unto me shall dwell securely, and shall be quiet without fear of evil.'

verses.hebrewText: בְּ֭נִי אִם־תִּקַּ֣ח אֲמָרָ֑י וּ֝מִצְוֹתַ֗י תִּצְפֹּ֥ן אִתָּֽךְ׃
verses.englishText: My son, if thou wilt receive my words, and lay up my commandments with thee;

jps.text: My son, if thou wilt receive my words, and lay up my commandments with thee;

verses.hebrewText: לְהַקְשִׁ֣יב לַֽחָכְמָ֣ה אָזְנֶ֑ךָ תַּטֶּ֥ה לִ֝בְּךָ֗ לַתְּבוּנָֽה׃
verses.englishText: So that thou make thine ear attend unto wisdom, and thy heart incline to discernment;

jps.text: So that thou make thine ear attend unto wisdom, and thy heart incline to discernment;

verses.hebrewText: כִּ֤י אִ֣ם לַבִּינָ֣ה תִקְרָ֑א לַ֝תְּבוּנָ֗ה תִּתֵּ֥ן קֹולֶֽךָ׃
verses.englishText: Yea, if thou call for understanding, and lift up thy voice for discernment;

jps.text: Yea, if thou call for understanding, and lift up thy voice for discernment;

verses.hebrewText: אִם־תְּבַקְשֶׁ֥נָּה כַכָּ֑סֶף וְֽכַמַּטְמֹונִ֥ים תַּחְפְּשֶֽׂנָּה׃
verses.englishText: If thou seek her as silver, and search for her as for hid treasures;

jps.text: If thou seek her as silver, and search for her as for hid treasures;

verses.hebrewText: אָ֗ז תָּ֭בִין יִרְאַ֣ת יְהוָ֑ה וְדַ֖עַת אֱלֹהִ֣ים תִּמְצָֽא׃
verses.englishText: Then shalt thou understand the fear of the LORD, and find the knowledge of God.

jps.text: Then shalt thou understand the fear of the LORD, and find the knowledge of God.

verses.hebrewText: כִּֽי־יְ֭הוָה יִתֵּ֣ן חָכְמָ֑ה מִ֝פִּ֗יו דַּ֣עַת וּתְבוּנָֽה׃
verses.englishText: For the LORD giveth wisdom, out of His mouth cometh knowledge and discernment;

jps.text: For the LORD giveth wisdom, out of His mouth cometh knowledge and discernment;

verses.hebrewText: *וְצָפַן (יִצְפֹּ֣ן) לַ֭יְשָׁרִים תּוּשִׁיָּ֑ה מָ֝גֵ֗ן לְהֹ֣לְכֵי תֹֽם׃
verses.englishText: He layeth up sound wisdom for the upright, He is a shield to them that walk in integrity;

jps.text: He layeth up sound wisdom for the upright, He is a shield to them that walk in integrity;

verses.hebrewText: לִ֭נְצֹר אָרְחֹ֣ות מִשְׁפָּ֑ט וְדֶ֖רֶךְ *חֲסִידֹו (חֲסִידָ֣יו) יִשְׁמֹֽר׃
verses.englishText: That He may guard the paths of justice, and preserve the way of His godly ones.

jps.text: That He may guard the paths of justice, and preserve the way of His godly ones.

verses.hebrewText: אָ֗ז תָּ֭בִין צֶ֣דֶק וּמִשְׁפָּ֑ט וּ֝מֵישָׁרִ֗ים כָּל־מַעְגַּל־טֹֽוב׃
verses.englishText: Then shalt thou understand righteousness and justice, and equity, yea, every good path.

jps.text: Then shalt thou understand righteousness and justice, and equity, yea, every good path.

verses.hebrewText: כִּֽי־תָבֹ֣וא חָכְמָ֣ה בְלִבֶּ֑ךָ וְ֝דַ֗עַת לְֽנַפְשְׁךָ֥ יִנְעָֽם׃
verses.englishText: For wisdom shall enter into thy heart, and knowledge shall be pleasant unto thy soul;

jps.text: For wisdom shall enter into thy heart, and knowledge shall be pleasant unto thy soul;

verses.hebrewText: מְ֭זִמָּה תִּשְׁמֹ֥ר עָלֶ֗יךָ תְּבוּנָ֥ה תִנְצְרֶֽכָּה׃
verses.englishText: Discretion shall watch over thee, discernment shall guard thee;

jps.text: Discretion shall watch over thee, discernment shall guard thee;

verses.hebrewText: לְ֭הַצִּ֣ילְךָ מִדֶּ֣רֶךְ רָ֑ע מֵ֝אִ֗ישׁ מְדַבֵּ֥ר תַּהְפֻּכֹֽות׃
verses.englishText: To deliver thee from the way of evil, from the men that speak froward things;

jps.text: To deliver thee from the way of evil, from the men that speak froward things;

verses.hebrewText: הַ֭עֹ֣זְבִים אָרְחֹ֣ות יֹ֑שֶׁר לָ֝לֶ֗כֶת בְּדַרְכֵי־חֹֽשֶׁךְ׃
verses.englishText: Who leave the paths of uprightness, to walk in the ways of darkness;

jps.text: Who leave the paths of uprightness, to walk in the ways of darkness;

verses.hebrewText: הַ֭שְּׂמֵחִים לַעֲשֹׂ֥ות רָ֑ע יָ֝גִ֗ילוּ בְּֽתַהְפֻּכֹ֥ות רָֽע׃
verses.englishText: Who rejoice to do evil, and delight in the frowardness of evil;

jps.text: Who rejoice to do evil, and delight in the frowardness of evil;

verses.hebrewText: אֲשֶׁ֣ר אָרְחֹתֵיהֶ֣ם עִקְּשִׁ֑ים וּ֝נְלֹוזִ֗ים בְּמַעְגְּלֹותָֽם׃
verses.englishText: Who are crooked in their ways, and perverse in their paths;

jps.text: Who are crooked in their ways, and perverse in their paths;

verses.hebrewText: לְ֭הַצִּ֣ילְךָ מֵאִשָּׁ֣ה זָרָ֑ה מִ֝נָּכְרִיָּ֗ה אֲמָרֶ֥יהָ הֶחֱלִֽיקָה׃
verses.englishText: To deliver thee from the strange woman, even from the alien woman that maketh smooth her words;

jps.text: To deliver thee from the strange woman, even from the alien woman that maketh smooth her words;

verses.hebrewText: הַ֭עֹזֶבֶת אַלּ֣וּף נְעוּרֶ֑יהָ וְאֶת־בְּרִ֖ית אֱלֹהֶ֣יהָ שָׁכֵֽחָה׃
verses.englishText: That forsaketh the lord of her youth, and forgetteth the covenant of her God.

jps.text: That forsaketh the lord of her youth, and forgetteth the covenant of her God.

verses.hebrewText: כִּ֤י שָׁ֣חָה אֶל־מָ֣וֶת בֵּיתָ֑הּ וְאֶל־רְ֝פָאִ֗ים מַעְגְּלֹתֶֽיהָ׃
verses.englishText: For her house sinketh down unto death, and her paths unto the shades;

jps.text: For her house sinketh down unto death, and her paths unto the shades;

verses.hebrewText: כָּל־בָּ֭אֶיהָ לֹ֣א יְשׁוּב֑וּן וְלֹֽא־יַ֝שִּׂ֗יגוּ אָרְחֹ֥ות חַיִּֽים׃
verses.englishText: None that go unto her return, neither do they attain unto the paths of life;

jps.text: None that go unto her return, neither do they attain unto the paths of life;

verses.hebrewText: לְמַ֗עַן תֵּ֭לֵךְ בְּדֶ֣רֶךְ טֹובִ֑ים וְאָרְחֹ֖ות צַדִּיקִ֣ים תִּשְׁמֹֽר׃
verses.englishText: That thou mayest walk in the way of good men, and keep the paths of the righteous.

jps.text: That thou mayest walk in the way of good men, and keep the paths of the righteous.

verses.hebrewText: כִּֽי־יְשָׁרִ֥ים יִשְׁכְּנוּ־אָ֑רֶץ וּ֝תְמִימִ֗ים יִוָּ֥תְרוּ בָֽהּ׃
verses.englishText: For the upright shall dwell in the land, and the whole-hearted shall remain in it.

jps.text: For the upright shall dwell in the land, and the whole-hearted shall remain in it.

verses.hebrewText: וּ֭רְשָׁעִים מֵאֶ֣רֶץ יִכָּרֵ֑תוּ וּ֝בֹוגְדִ֗ים יִסְּח֥וּ מִמֶּֽנָּה׃ פ
verses.englishText: But the wicked shall be cut off from the land, and the faithless shall be plucked up out of it.

jps.text: But the wicked shall be cut off from the land, and the faithless shall be plucked up out of it.

verses.hebrewText: בְּ֭נִי תֹּורָתִ֣י אַל־תִּשְׁכָּ֑ח וּ֝מִצְוֹתַ֗י יִצֹּ֥ר לִבֶּֽךָ׃
verses.englishText: My son, forget not my teaching; but let thy heart keep my commandments;

jps.text: My son, forget not my teaching; but let thy heart keep my commandments;

verses.hebrewText: כִּ֤י אֹ֣רֶךְ יָ֭מִים וּשְׁנֹ֣ות חַיִּ֑ים וְ֝שָׁלֹ֗ום יֹוסִ֥יפוּ לָֽךְ׃
verses.englishText: For length of days, and years of life, and peace, will they add to thee.

jps.text: For length of days, and years of life, and peace, will they add to thee.

verses.hebrewText: חֶ֥סֶד וֶאֱמֶ֗ת אַֽל־יַעַ֫זְבֻ֥ךָ קָשְׁרֵ֥ם עַל־גַּרְגְּרֹותֶ֑יךָ כָּ֝תְבֵ֗ם עַל־ל֥וּחַ לִבֶּֽךָ׃
verses.englishText: Let not kindness and truth forsake thee; bind them about thy neck, write them upon the table of thy heart;

jps.text: Let not kindness and truth forsake thee; bind them about thy neck, write them upon the table of thy heart;

verses.hebrewText: וּמְצָא־חֵ֖ן וְשֵֽׂכֶל־טֹ֑וב בְּעֵינֵ֖י אֱלֹהִ֣ים וְאָדָֽם׃ פ
verses.englishText: So shalt thou find grace and good favour in the sight of God and man.

jps.text: So shalt thou find grace and good favour in the sight of God and man.

verses.hebrewText: בְּטַ֣ח אֶל־יְ֭הוָה בְּכָל־לִבֶּ֑ךָ וְאֶל־בִּֽ֝ינָתְךָ֗ אַל־תִּשָּׁעֵֽן׃
verses.englishText: Trust in the LORD with all thy heart, and lean not upon thine own understanding.

jps.text: Trust in the LORD with all thy heart, and lean not upon thine own understanding.

verses.hebrewText: בְּכָל־דְּרָכֶ֥יךָ דָעֵ֑הוּ וְ֝ה֗וּא יְיַשֵּׁ֥ר אֹֽרְחֹתֶֽיךָ׃
verses.englishText: In all thy ways acknowledge Him, and He will direct thy paths.

jps.text: In all thy ways acknowledge Him, and He will direct thy paths.

verses.hebrewText: אַל־תְּהִ֣י חָכָ֣ם בְּעֵינֶ֑יךָ יְרָ֥א אֶת־יְ֝הוָ֗ה וְס֣וּר מֵרָֽע׃
verses.englishText: Be not wise in thine own eyes; fear the LORD, and depart from evil;

jps.text: Be not wise in thine own eyes; fear the LORD, and depart from evil;

verses.hebrewText: רִ֭פְאוּת תְּהִ֣י לְשָׁרֶּ֑ךָ וְ֝שִׁקּ֗וּי לְעַצְמֹותֶֽיךָ׃
verses.englishText: It shall be health to thy navel, and marrow to thy bones.

jps.text: It shall be health to thy navel, and marrow to thy bones.

verses.hebrewText: כַּבֵּ֣ד אֶת־יְ֭הוָה מֵהֹונֶ֑ךָ וּ֝מֵרֵאשִׁ֗ית כָּל־תְּבוּאָתֶֽךָ׃
verses.englishText: Honour the LORD with thy substance, and with the first-fruits of all thine increase;

jps.text: Honour the LORD with thy substance, and with the first-fruits of all thine increase;

verses.hebrewText: וְיִמָּלְא֣וּ אֲסָמֶ֣יךָ שָׂבָ֑ע וְ֝תִירֹ֗ושׁ יְקָבֶ֥יךָ יִפְרֹֽצוּ׃ פ
verses.englishText: So shall thy barns be filled with plenty, and thy vats shall overflow with new wine.

jps.text: So shall thy barns be filled with plenty, and thy vats shall overflow with new wine.

verses.hebrewText: מוּסַ֣ר יְ֭הוָה בְּנִ֣י אַל־תִּמְאָ֑ס וְאַל־תָּ֝קֹ֗ץ בְּתֹוכַחְתֹּֽו׃
verses.englishText: My son, despise not the chastening of the LORD, neither spurn thou His correction;

jps.text: My son, despise not the chastening of the LORD, neither spurn thou His correction;

verses.hebrewText: כִּ֤י אֶ֥ת אֲשֶׁ֣ר יֶאֱהַ֣ב יְהוָ֣ה יֹוכִ֑יחַ וּ֝כְאָ֗ב אֶת־בֵּ֥ן יִרְצֶֽה׃
verses.englishText: For whom the LORD loveth He correcteth, even as a father the son in whom he delighteth.

jps.text: For whom the LORD loveth He correcteth, even as a father the son in whom he delighteth.

verses.hebrewText: אַשְׁרֵ֣י אָ֭דָם מָצָ֣א חָכְמָ֑ה וְ֝אָדָ֗ם יָפִ֥יק תְּבוּנָֽה׃
verses.englishText: Happy is the man that findeth wisdom, and the man that obtaineth understanding.

jps.text: Happy is the man that findeth wisdom, and the man that obtaineth understanding.

verses.hebrewText: כִּ֤י טֹ֣וב סַ֭חְרָהּ מִסְּחַר־כָּ֑סֶף וּ֝מֵחָר֗וּץ תְּבוּאָתָֽהּ׃
verses.englishText: For the merchandise of it is better than the merchandise of silver, and the gain thereof than fine gold.

jps.text: For the merchandise of it is better than the merchandise of silver, and the gain thereof than fine gold.

verses.hebrewText: יְקָ֣רָה הִ֭יא *מִפְּנִיִּים (מִפְּנִינִ֑ים) וְכָל־חֲ֝פָצֶ֗יךָ לֹ֣א יִֽשְׁווּ־בָֽהּ׃
verses.englishText: She is more precious than rubies; and all the things thou canst desire are not to be compared unto her.

jps.text: She is more precious than rubies; and all the things thou canst desire are not to be compared unto her.

verses.hebrewText: אֹ֣רֶךְ יָ֭מִים בִּֽימִינָ֑הּ בִּ֝שְׂמֹאולָ֗הּ עֹ֣שֶׁר וְכָבֹֽוד׃
verses.englishText: Length of days is in her right hand; in her left hand are riches and honour.

jps.text: Length of days is in her right hand; in her left hand are riches and honour.

verses.hebrewText: דְּרָכֶ֥יהָ דַרְכֵי־נֹ֑עַם וְֽכָל־נְתִ֖יבֹותֶ֣יהָ שָׁלֹֽום׃
verses.englishText: Her ways are ways of pleasantness, and all her paths are peace.

jps.text: Her ways are ways of pleasantness, and all her paths are peace.

verses.hebrewText: עֵץ־חַיִּ֣ים הִ֭יא לַמַּחֲזִיקִ֣ים בָּ֑הּ וְֽתֹמְכֶ֥יהָ מְאֻשָּֽׁר׃ פ
verses.englishText: She is a tree of life to them that lay hold upon her, and happy is every one that holdest her fast.

jps.text: She is a tree of life to them that lay hold upon her, and happy is every one that holdest her fast.

verses.hebrewText: יְֽהוָ֗ה בְּחָכְמָ֥ה יָֽסַד־אָ֑רֶץ כֹּונֵ֥ן שָׁ֝מַ֗יִם בִּתְבוּנָֽה׃
verses.englishText: The LORD by wisdom founded the earth; by understanding He established the heavens.

jps.text: The LORD by wisdom founded the earth; by understanding He established the heavens.

verses.hebrewText: בְּ֭דַעְתֹּו תְּהֹומֹ֣ות נִבְקָ֑עוּ וּ֝שְׁחָקִ֗ים יִרְעֲפוּ־טָֽל׃
verses.englishText: By His knowledge the depths were broken up, and the skies drop down the dew.

jps.text: By His knowledge the depths were broken up, and the skies drop down the dew.

verses.hebrewText: בְּ֭נִי אַל־יָלֻ֣זוּ מֵעֵינֶ֑יךָ נְצֹ֥ר תֻּ֝שִׁיָּ֗ה וּמְזִמָּֽה׃
verses.englishText: My son, let not them depart from thine eyes; keep sound wisdom and discretion;

jps.text: My son, let not them depart from thine eyes; keep sound wisdom and discretion;

verses.hebrewText: וְיִֽהְי֣וּ חַיִּ֣ים לְנַפְשֶׁ֑ךָ וְ֝חֵ֗ן לְגַרְגְּרֹתֶֽיךָ׃
verses.englishText: So shall they be life unto thy soul, and grace to thy neck.

jps.text: So shall they be life unto thy soul, and grace to thy neck.

verses.hebrewText: אָ֤ז תֵּלֵ֣ךְ לָבֶ֣טַח דַּרְכֶּ֑ךָ וְ֝רַגְלְךָ֗ לֹ֣א תִגֹּֽוף׃
verses.englishText: Then shalt thou walk in thy way securely, and thou shalt not dash thy foot.

jps.text: Then shalt thou walk in thy way securely, and thou shalt not dash thy foot.

verses.hebrewText: אִם־תִּשְׁכַּ֥ב לֹֽא־תִפְחָ֑ד וְ֝שָׁכַבְתָּ֗ וְֽעָרְבָ֥ה שְׁנָתֶֽךָ׃
verses.englishText: When thou liest down, thou shalt not be afraid; yea, thou shalt lie down, and thy sleep shall be sweet.

jps.text: When thou liest down, thou shalt not be afraid; yea, thou shalt lie down, and thy sleep shall be sweet.

verses.hebrewText: אַל־תִּ֭ירָא מִפַּ֣חַד פִּתְאֹ֑ם וּמִשֹּׁאַ֥ת רְ֝שָׁעִ֗ים כִּ֣י תָבֹֽא׃
verses.englishText: Be not afraid of sudden terror, neither of the destruction of the wicked, when it cometh;

jps.text: Be not afraid of sudden terror, neither of the destruction of the wicked, when it cometh;

verses.hebrewText: כִּֽי־יְ֭הוָה יִהְיֶ֣ה בְכִסְלֶ֑ךָ וְשָׁמַ֖ר רַגְלְךָ֣ מִלָּֽכֶד׃
verses.englishText: For the LORD will be thy confidence, and will keep thy foot from being caught.

jps.text: For the LORD will be thy confidence, and will keep thy foot from being caught.

verses.hebrewText: אַל־תִּמְנַע־טֹ֥וב מִבְּעָלָ֑יו בִּהְיֹ֨ות לְאֵ֖ל *יָדֶיךָ (יָדְךָ֣) לַעֲשֹֽׂות׃
verses.englishText: Withhold not good from him to whom it is due, when it is in the power of thy hand to do it.

jps.text: Withhold not good from him to whom it is due, when it is in the power of thy hand to do it.

verses.hebrewText: אַל־תֹּ֘אמַ֤ר *לְרֵעֶיךָ (לְרֵֽעֲךָ֨ ׀) לֵ֣ךְ וָ֭שׁוּב וּמָחָ֥ר אֶתֵּ֗ן וְיֵ֣שׁ אִתָּֽךְ׃
verses.englishText: Say not unto thy neighbour: 'Go, and come again, and to-morrow I will give'; when thou hast it by thee.

jps.text: Say not unto thy neighbour: 'Go, and come again, and to-morrow I will give'; when thou hast it by thee.

verses.hebrewText: אַל־תַּחֲרֹ֣שׁ עַל־רֵעֲךָ֣ רָעָ֑ה וְהֽוּא־יֹושֵׁ֖ב לָבֶ֣טַח אִתָּֽךְ׃
verses.englishText: Devise not evil against thy neighbour, seeing he dwelleth securely by thee.

jps.text: Devise not evil against thy neighbour, seeing he dwelleth securely by thee.

verses.hebrewText: אַל־*תָּרֹוב (תָּרִ֣יב) עִם־אָדָ֣ם חִנָּ֑ם אִם־לֹ֖א גְמָלְךָ֣ רָעָֽה׃
verses.englishText: Strive not with a man without cause, if he have done thee no harm.

jps.text: Strive not with a man without cause, if he have done thee no harm.

verses.hebrewText: אַל־תְּ֭קַנֵּא בְּאִ֣ישׁ חָמָ֑ס וְאַל־תִּ֝בְחַ֗ר בְּכָל־דְּרָכָֽיו׃
verses.englishText: Envy thou not the man of violence, and choose none of his ways.

jps.text: Envy thou not the man of violence, and choose none of his ways.

verses.hebrewText: כִּ֤י תֹועֲבַ֣ת יְהוָ֣ה נָלֹ֑וז וְֽאֶת־יְשָׁרִ֥ים סֹודֹֽו׃
verses.englishText: For the perverse is an abomination to the LORD; but His counsel is with the upright.

jps.text: For the perverse is an abomination to the LORD; but His counsel is with the upright.

verses.hebrewText: מְאֵרַ֣ת יְ֭הוָה בְּבֵ֣ית רָשָׁ֑ע וּנְוֵ֖ה צַדִּיקִ֣ים יְבָרֵֽךְ׃
verses.englishText: The curse of the LORD is in the house of the wicked; but He blesseth the habitation of the righteous.

jps.text: The curse of the LORD is in the house of the wicked; but He blesseth the habitation of the righteous.

verses.hebrewText: אִם־לַלֵּצִ֥ים הֽוּא־יָלִ֑יץ *וְלַעֲנִיִּים (וְ֝לַעֲנָוִ֗ים) יִתֶּן־חֵֽן׃
verses.englishText: If it concerneth the scorners, He scorneth them, but unto the humble He giveth grace.

jps.text: If it concerneth the scorners, He scorneth them, but unto the humble He giveth grace.

verses.hebrewText: כָּ֭בֹוד חֲכָמִ֣ים יִנְחָ֑לוּ וּ֝כְסִילִ֗ים מֵרִ֥ים קָלֹֽון׃ פ
verses.englishText: The wise shall inherit honour; but as for the fools, they carry away shame.

jps.text: The wise shall inherit honour; but as for the fools, they carry away shame.

verses.hebrewText: שִׁמְע֣וּ בָ֭נִים מ֣וּסַר אָ֑ב וְ֝הַקְשִׁ֗יבוּ לָדַ֥עַת בִּינָֽה׃
verses.englishText: Hear, ye children, the instruction of a father, and attend to know understanding.

jps.text: Hear, ye children, the instruction of a father, and attend to know understanding.

verses.hebrewText: כִּ֤י לֶ֣קַח טֹ֭וב נָתַ֣תִּי לָכֶ֑ם תֹּֽ֝ורָתִ֗י אַֽל־תַּעֲזֹֽבוּ׃
verses.englishText: For I give you good doctrine; forsake ye not my teaching.

jps.text: For I give you good doctrine; forsake ye not my teaching.

verses.hebrewText: כִּי־בֵ֭ן הָיִ֣יתִי לְאָבִ֑י רַ֥ךְ וְ֝יָחִ֗יד לִפְנֵ֥י אִמִּֽי׃
verses.englishText: For I was a son unto my father, tender and an only one in the sight of my mother.

jps.text: For I was a son unto my father, tender and an only one in the sight of my mother.

verses.hebrewText: וַיֹּרֵ֗נִי וַיֹּ֥אמֶר לִ֗י יִֽתְמָךְ־דְּבָרַ֥י לִבֶּ֑ךָ שְׁמֹ֖ר מִצְוֹתַ֣י וֽ͏ֶחְיֵֽה׃
verses.englishText: And he taught me, and said unto me: 'Let thy heart hold fast my words, keep my commandments, and live;

jps.text: And he taught me, and said unto me: 'Let thy heart hold fast my words, keep my commandments, and live;

verses.hebrewText: קְנֵ֣ה חָ֭כְמָה קְנֵ֣ה בִינָ֑ה אַל־תִּשְׁכַּ֥ח וְאַל־תֵּ֝֗ט מֵֽאִמְרֵי־פִֽי׃
verses.englishText: Get wisdom, get understanding; forget not, neither decline from the words of my mouth;

jps.text: Get wisdom, get understanding; forget not, neither decline from the words of my mouth;

verses.hebrewText: אַל־תַּעַזְבֶ֥הָ וְתִשְׁמְרֶ֑ךָּ אֱהָבֶ֥הָ וְתִצְּרֶֽךָּ׃
verses.englishText: Forsake her not, and she will preserve thee; love her, and she will keep thee.

jps.text: Forsake her not, and she will preserve thee; love her, and she will keep thee.

verses.hebrewText: רֵאשִׁ֣ית חָ֭כְמָה קְנֵ֣ה חָכְמָ֑ה וּבְכָל־קִ֝נְיָנְךָ֗ קְנֵ֣ה בִינָֽה׃
verses.englishText: The beginning of wisdom is: Get wisdom; yea, with all thy getting get understanding.

jps.text: The beginning of wisdom is: Get wisdom; yea, with all thy getting get understanding.

verses.hebrewText: סַלְסְלֶ֥הָ וּֽתְרֹומְמֶ֑ךָּ תְּ֝כַבֵּ֗דְךָ כִּ֣י תְחַבְּקֶֽנָּה׃
verses.englishText: Extol her, and she will exalt thee; she will bring thee to honour, when thou dost embrace her.

jps.text: Extol her, and she will exalt thee; she will bring thee to honour, when thou dost embrace her.

verses.hebrewText: תִּתֵּ֣ן לְ֭רֹאשְׁךָ לִוְיַת־חֵ֑ן עֲטֶ֖רֶת תִּפְאֶ֣רֶת תְּמַגְּנֶֽךָּ׃
verses.englishText: She will give to thy head a chaplet of grace; a crown of glory will she bestow on thee.'

jps.text: She will give to thy head a chaplet of grace; a crown of glory will she bestow on thee.'

verses.hebrewText: שְׁמַ֣ע בְּ֭נִי וְקַ֣ח אֲמָרָ֑י וְיִרְבּ֥וּ לְ֝ךָ֗ שְׁנֹ֣ות חַיִּֽים׃
verses.englishText: Hear, O my son, and receive my sayings; and the years of thy life shall be many.

jps.text: Hear, O my son, and receive my sayings; and the years of thy life shall be many.

verses.hebrewText: בְּדֶ֣רֶךְ חָ֭כְמָה הֹרֵתִ֑יךָ הִ֝דְרַכְתִּ֗יךָ בְּמַעְגְּלֵי־יֹֽשֶׁר׃
verses.englishText: I have taught thee in the way of wisdom; I have led thee in paths of uprightness.

jps.text: I have taught thee in the way of wisdom; I have led thee in paths of uprightness.

verses.hebrewText: בְּֽ֭לֶכְתְּךָ לֹא־יֵצַ֣ר צַעֲדֶ֑ךָ וְאִם־תָּ֝ר֗וּץ לֹ֣א תִכָּשֵֽׁל׃
verses.englishText: When thou goest, thy step shall not be straitened; and if thou runnest, thou shalt not stumble.

jps.text: When thou goest, thy step shall not be straitened; and if thou runnest, thou shalt not stumble.

verses.hebrewText: הַחֲזֵ֣ק בַּמּוּסָ֣ר אַל־תֶּ֑רֶף נִ֝צְּרֶ֗הָ כִּי־הִ֥יא חַיֶּֽיךָ׃
verses.englishText: Take fast hold of instruction, let her not go; keep her, for she is thy life.

jps.text: Take fast hold of instruction, let her not go; keep her, for she is thy life.

verses.hebrewText: בְּאֹ֣רַח רְ֭שָׁעִים אַל־תָּבֹ֑א וְאַל־תְּ֝אַשֵּׁ֗ר בְּדֶ֣רֶךְ רָעִֽים׃
verses.englishText: Enter not into the path of the wicked, and walk not in the way of evil men.

jps.text: Enter not into the path of the wicked, and walk not in the way of evil men.

verses.hebrewText: פְּרָעֵ֥הוּ אַל־תַּעֲבָר־בֹּ֑ו שְׂטֵ֖ה מֵעָלָ֣יו וַעֲבֹֽור׃
verses.englishText: Avoid it, pass not by it; turn from it, and pass on.

jps.text: Avoid it, pass not by it; turn from it, and pass on.

verses.hebrewText: כִּ֤י לֹ֣א יִֽ֭שְׁנוּ אִם־לֹ֣א יָרֵ֑עוּ וְֽנִגְזְלָ֥ה שְׁ֝נָתָ֗ם אִם־לֹ֥א *יִכְשֹׁולוּ (יַכְשִֽׁילוּ)׃
verses.englishText: For they sleep not, except they have done evil; and their sleep is taken away, unless they cause some to fall.

jps.text: For they sleep not, except they have done evil; and their sleep is taken away, unless they cause some to fall.

verses.hebrewText: כִּ֣י לָ֭חֲמוּ לֶ֣חֶם רֶ֑שַׁע וְיֵ֖ין חֲמָסִ֣ים יִשְׁתּֽוּ׃
verses.englishText: For they eat the bread of wickedness, and drink the wine of violence.

jps.text: For they eat the bread of wickedness, and drink the wine of violence.

verses.hebrewText: וְאֹ֣רַח צַ֭דִּיקִים כְּאֹ֣ור נֹ֑גַהּ הֹולֵ֥ךְ וָ֝אֹ֗ור עַד־נְכֹ֥ון הַיֹּֽום׃
verses.englishText: But the path of the righteous is as the light of dawn, that shineth more and more unto the perfect day.

jps.text: But the path of the righteous is as the light of dawn, that shineth more and more unto the perfect day.

verses.hebrewText: דֶּ֣רֶךְ רְ֭שָׁעִים כָּֽאֲפֵלָ֑ה לֹ֥א יָ֝דְע֗וּ בַּמֶּ֥ה יִכָּשֵֽׁלוּ׃ פ
verses.englishText: The way of the wicked is as darkness; they know not at what they stumble.

jps.text: The way of the wicked is as darkness; they know not at what they stumble.

verses.hebrewText: בְּ֭נִי לִדְבָרַ֣י הַקְשִׁ֑יבָה לַ֝אֲמָרַ֗י הַט־אָזְנֶֽךָ׃
verses.englishText: My son, attend to my words; incline thine ear unto my sayings.

jps.text: My son, attend to my words; incline thine ear unto my sayings.

verses.hebrewText: אַל־יַלִּ֥יזוּ מֵעֵינֶ֑יךָ שָׁ֝מְרֵ֗ם בְּתֹ֣וךְ לְבָבֶֽךָ׃
verses.englishText: Let them not depart from thine eyes; keep them in the midst of thy heart.

jps.text: Let them not depart from thine eyes; keep them in the midst of thy heart.

verses.hebrewText: כִּֽי־חַיִּ֣ים הֵ֭ם לְמֹצְאֵיהֶ֑ם וּֽלְכָל־בְּשָׂרֹ֥ו מַרְפֵּֽא׃
verses.englishText: For they are life unto those that find them, and health to all their flesh.

jps.text: For they are life unto those that find them, and health to all their flesh.

verses.hebrewText: מִֽכָּל־מִ֭שְׁמָר נְצֹ֣ר לִבֶּ֑ךָ כִּֽי־מִ֝מֶּ֗נּוּ תֹּוצְאֹ֥ות חַיִּֽים׃
verses.englishText: Above all that thou guardest keep thy heart; for out of it are the issues of life.

jps.text: Above all that thou guardest keep thy heart; for out of it are the issues of life.

verses.hebrewText: הָסֵ֣ר מִ֭מְּךָ עִקְּשׁ֣וּת פֶּ֑ה וּלְז֥וּת שְׂ֝פָתַ֗יִם הַרְחֵ֥ק מִמֶּֽךָּ׃
verses.englishText: Put away from thee a froward mouth, and perverse lips put far from thee.

jps.text: Put away from thee a froward mouth, and perverse lips put far from thee.

verses.hebrewText: עֵ֭ינֶיךָ לְנֹ֣כַח יַבִּ֑יטוּ וְ֝עַפְעַפֶּ֗יךָ יַיְשִׁ֥רוּ נֶגְדֶּֽךָ׃
verses.englishText: Let thine eyes look right on, and let thine eyelids look straight before thee.

jps.text: Let thine eyes look right on, and let thine eyelids look straight before thee.

verses.hebrewText: פַּ֭לֵּס מַעְגַּ֣ל רַגְלֶ֑ךָ וְֽכָל־דְּרָכֶ֥יךָ יִכֹּֽנוּ׃
verses.englishText: Make plain the path of thy feet, and let all thy ways be established.

jps.text: Make plain the path of thy feet, and let all thy ways be established.

verses.hebrewText: אַֽל־תֵּט־יָמִ֥ין וּשְׂמֹ֑אול הָסֵ֖ר רַגְלְךָ֣ מֵרָֽע׃
verses.englishText: Turn not to the right hand nor to the left; remove thy foot from evil.

jps.text: Turn not to the right hand nor to the left; remove thy foot from evil.

verses.hebrewText: בְּ֭נִי לְחָכְמָתִ֣י הַקְשִׁ֑יבָה לִ֝תְבוּנָתִ֗י הַט־אָזְנֶֽךָ׃
verses.englishText: My son, attend unto my wisdom; incline thine ear to my understanding;

jps.text: My son, attend unto my wisdom; incline thine ear to my understanding;

verses.hebrewText: לִשְׁמֹ֥ר מְזִמֹּ֑ות וְ֝דַ֗עַת שְׂפָתֶ֥יךָ יִנְצֹֽרוּ׃
verses.englishText: That thou mayest preserve discretion, and that thy lips may keep knowledge.

jps.text: That thou mayest preserve discretion, and that thy lips may keep knowledge.

verses.hebrewText: כִּ֤י נֹ֣פֶת תִּ֭טֹּפְנָה שִׂפְתֵ֣י זָרָ֑ה וְחָלָ֖ק מִשֶּׁ֣מֶן חִכָּֽהּ׃
verses.englishText: For the lips of a strange woman drop honey, and her mouth is smoother than oil;

jps.text: For the lips of a strange woman drop honey, and her mouth is smoother than oil;

verses.hebrewText: וְֽ֭אַחֲרִיתָהּ מָרָ֣ה כַֽלַּעֲנָ֑ה חַ֝דָּ֗ה כְּחֶ֣רֶב פִּיֹּֽות׃
verses.englishText: But her end is bitter as wormwood, sharp as a two-edged sword.

jps.text: But her end is bitter as wormwood, sharp as a two-edged sword.

verses.hebrewText: רַ֭גְלֶיהָ יֹרְדֹ֣ות מָ֑וֶת שְׁ֝אֹ֗ול צְעָדֶ֥יהָ יִתְמֹֽכוּ׃
verses.englishText: Her feet go down to death; her steps take hold on the nether-world;

jps.text: Her feet go down to death; her steps take hold on the nether-world;

verses.hebrewText: אֹ֣רַח חַ֭יִּים פֶּן־תְּפַלֵּ֑ס נָע֥וּ מַ֝עְגְּלֹתֶ֗יהָ לֹ֣א תֵדֽ͏ָע׃ פ
verses.englishText: Lest she should walk the even path of life, her ways wander, but she knoweth it not.

jps.text: Lest she should walk the even path of life, her ways wander, but she knoweth it not.

verses.hebrewText: וְעַתָּ֣ה בָ֭נִים שִׁמְעוּ־לִ֑י וְאַל־תָּ֝ס֗וּרוּ מֵאִמְרֵי־פִֽי׃
verses.englishText: Now therefore, O ye children, hearken unto me, and depart not from the words of my mouth.

jps.text: Now therefore, O ye children, hearken unto me, and depart not from the words of my mouth.

verses.hebrewText: הַרְחֵ֣ק מֵעָלֶ֣יהָ דַרְכֶּ֑ךָ וְאַל־תִּ֝קְרַ֗ב אֶל־פֶּ֥תַח בֵּיתָֽהּ׃
verses.englishText: Remove thy way far from her, and come not nigh the door of her house;

jps.text: Remove thy way far from her, and come not nigh the door of her house;

verses.hebrewText: פֶּן־תִּתֵּ֣ן לַאֲחֵרִ֣ים הֹודֶ֑ךָ וּ֝שְׁנֹתֶ֗יךָ לְאַכְזָרִֽי׃
verses.englishText: Lest thou give thy vigour unto others, and thy years unto the cruel;

jps.text: Lest thou give thy vigour unto others, and thy years unto the cruel;

verses.hebrewText: פֶּֽן־יִשְׂבְּע֣וּ זָרִ֣ים כֹּחֶ֑ךָ וַ֝עֲצָבֶ֗יךָ בְּבֵ֣ית נָכְרֽ͏ִי׃
verses.englishText: Lest strangers be filled with thy strength, and thy labours be in the house of an alien;

jps.text: Lest strangers be filled with thy strength, and thy labours be in the house of an alien;

verses.hebrewText: וְנָהַמְתָּ֥ בְאַחֲרִיתֶ֑ךָ בִּכְלֹ֥ות בְּ֝שָׂרְךָ֗ וּשְׁאֵרֶֽךָ׃
verses.englishText: And thou moan, when thine end cometh, when thy flesh and thy body are consumed,

jps.text: And thou moan, when thine end cometh, when thy flesh and thy body are consumed,

verses.hebrewText: וְֽאָמַרְתָּ֗ אֵ֭יךְ שָׂנֵ֣אתִי מוּסָ֑ר וְ֝תֹוכַ֗חַת נָאַ֥ץ לִבִּֽי׃
verses.englishText: And say: 'How have I hated instruction, and my heart despised reproof;

jps.text: And say: 'How have I hated instruction, and my heart despised reproof;

verses.hebrewText: וְֽלֹא־שָׁ֭מַעְתִּי בְּקֹ֣ול מֹורָ֑י וְ֝לִֽמְלַמְּדַ֗י לֹא־הִטִּ֥יתִי אָזְנִֽי׃
verses.englishText: Neither have I hearkened to the voice of my teachers, nor inclined mine ear to them that instructed me!

jps.text: Neither have I hearkened to the voice of my teachers, nor inclined mine ear to them that instructed me!

verses.hebrewText: כִּ֭מְעַט הָיִ֣יתִי בְכָל־רָ֑ע בְּתֹ֖וךְ קָהָ֣ל וְעֵדָֽה׃
verses.englishText: I was well nigh in all evil in the midst of the congregation and assembly.'

jps.text: I was well nigh in all evil in the midst of the congregation and assembly.'

verses.hebrewText: שְׁתֵה־מַ֥יִם מִבֹּורֶ֑ךָ וְ֝נֹזְלִ֗ים מִתֹּ֥וךְ בְּאֵרֶֽךָ׃
verses.englishText: Drink waters out of thine own cistern, and running waters out of thine own well.

jps.text: Drink waters out of thine own cistern, and running waters out of thine own well.

verses.hebrewText: יָפ֣וּצוּ מַעְיְנֹתֶ֣יךָ ח֑וּצָה בָּ֝רְחֹבֹ֗ות פַּלְגֵי־מָֽיִם׃
verses.englishText: Let thy springs be dispersed abroad, and courses of water in the streets.

jps.text: Let thy springs be dispersed abroad, and courses of water in the streets.

verses.hebrewText: יִֽהְיוּ־לְךָ֥ לְבַדֶּ֑ךָ וְאֵ֖ין לְזָרִ֣ים אִתָּֽךְ׃
verses.englishText: Let them be only thine own, and not strangers' with thee.

jps.text: Let them be only thine own, and not strangers' with thee.

verses.hebrewText: יְהִֽי־מְקֹורְךָ֥ בָר֑וּךְ וּ֝שְׂמַ֗ח מֵאֵ֥שֶׁת נְעוּרֶֽךָ׃
verses.englishText: Let thy fountain be blessed; and have joy of the wife of thy youth.

jps.text: Let thy fountain be blessed; and have joy of the wife of thy youth.

verses.hebrewText: אַיֶּ֥לֶת אֲהָבִ֗ים וְֽיַעֲלַ֫ת־חֵ֥ן דַּ֭דֶּיהָ יְרַוֻּ֣ךָ בְכָל־עֵ֑ת בְּ֝אַהֲבָתָ֗הּ תִּשְׁגֶּ֥ה תָמִֽיד׃
verses.englishText: A lovely hind and a graceful doe, let her breasts satisfy thee at all times; with her love be thou ravished always.

jps.text: A lovely hind and a graceful doe, let her breasts satisfy thee at all times; with her love be thou ravished always.

verses.hebrewText: וְלָ֤מָּה תִשְׁגֶּ֣ה בְנִ֣י בְזָרָ֑ה וּ֝תְחַבֵּ֗ק חֵ֣ק נָכְרִיָּֽה׃
verses.englishText: Why then wilt thou, my son, be ravished with a strange woman, and embrace the bosom of an alien?

jps.text: Why then wilt thou, my son, be ravished with a strange woman, and embrace the bosom of an alien?

verses.hebrewText: כִּ֤י נֹ֨כַח ׀ עֵינֵ֣י יְ֭הוָה דַּרְכֵי־אִ֑ישׁ וְֽכָל־מַעְגְּלֹתָ֥יו מְפַלֵּֽס׃
verses.englishText: For the ways of man are before the eyes of the LORD, and He maketh even all his paths.

jps.text: For the ways of man are before the eyes of the LORD, and He maketh even all his paths.

verses.hebrewText: עַֽוֹונֹותָ֗יו יִלְכְּדֻנֹ֥ו אֶת־הָרָשָׁ֑ע וּבְחַבְלֵ֥י חַ֝טָּאתֹ֗ו יִתָּמֵֽךְ׃
verses.englishText: His own iniquities shall ensnare the wicked, and he shall be holden with the cords of his sin.

jps.text: His own iniquities shall ensnare the wicked, and he shall be holden with the cords of his sin.

verses.hebrewText: ה֗וּא יָ֭מוּת בְּאֵ֣ין מוּסָ֑ר וּבְרֹ֖ב אִוַּלְתֹּ֣ו יִשְׁגֶּֽה׃ פ
verses.englishText: He shall die for lack of instruction; and in the greatness of his folly he shall reel.

jps.text: He shall die for lack of instruction; and in the greatness of his folly he shall reel.

verses.hebrewText: בְּ֭נִי אִם־עָרַ֣בְתָּ לְרֵעֶ֑ךָ תָּקַ֖עְתָּ לַזָּ֣ר כַּפֶּֽיךָ׃
verses.englishText: My son, if thou art become surety for thy neighbour, if thou hast struck thy hands for a stranger —

jps.text: My son, if thou art become surety for thy neighbour, if thou hast struck thy hands for a stranger —

verses.hebrewText: נֹוקַ֥שְׁתָּ בְאִמְרֵי־פִ֑יךָ נִ֝לְכַּ֗דְתָּ בְּאִמְרֵי־פִֽיךָ׃
verses.englishText: Thou art snared by the words of thy mouth, thou art caught by the words of thy mouth —

jps.text: Thou art snared by the words of thy mouth, thou art caught by the words of thy mouth —

verses.hebrewText: עֲשֵׂ֨ה זֹ֥את אֵפֹ֪וא ׀ בְּנִ֡י וְֽהִנָּצֵ֗ל כִּ֘י בָ֤אתָ בְכַף־רֵעֶ֑ךָ לֵ֥ךְ הִ֝תְרַפֵּ֗ס וּרְהַ֥ב רֵעֶֽיךָ׃
verses.englishText: Do this now, my son, and deliver thyself, seeing thou art come into the hand of thy neighbour; go, humble thyself, and urge thy neighbour.

jps.text: Do this now, my son, and deliver thyself, seeing thou art come into the hand of thy neighbour; go, humble thyself, and urge thy neighbour.

verses.hebrewText: אַל־תִּתֵּ֣ן שֵׁנָ֣ה לְעֵינֶ֑יךָ וּ֝תְנוּמָ֗ה לְעַפְעַפֶּֽיךָ׃
verses.englishText: Give not sleep to thine eyes, nor slumber to thine eyelids.

jps.text: Give not sleep to thine eyes, nor slumber to thine eyelids.

verses.hebrewText: הִ֭נָּצֵל כִּצְבִ֣י מִיָּ֑ד וּ֝כְצִפֹּ֗ור מִיַּ֥ד יָקֽוּשׁ׃ פ
verses.englishText: Deliver thyself as a gazelle from the hand of the hunter, and as a bird from the hand of the fowler.

jps.text: Deliver thyself as a gazelle from the hand of the hunter, and as a bird from the hand of the fowler.

verses.hebrewText: לֵֽךְ־אֶל־נְמָלָ֥ה עָצֵ֑ל רְאֵ֖ה דְרָכֶ֣יהָ וַחֲכָֽם׃
verses.englishText: Go to the ant, thou sluggard; consider her ways, and be wise;

jps.text: Go to the ant, thou sluggard; consider her ways, and be wise;

verses.hebrewText: אֲשֶׁ֖ר אֵֽין־לָ֥הּ קָצִ֗ין שֹׁטֵ֥ר וּמֹשֵֽׁל׃
verses.englishText: Which having no chief, overseer, or ruler,

jps.text: Which having no chief, overseer, or ruler,

verses.hebrewText: תָּכִ֣ין בַּקַּ֣יִץ לַחְמָ֑הּ אָגְרָ֥ה בַ֝קָּצִ֗יר מַאֲכָלָֽהּ׃
verses.englishText: Provideth her bread in the summer, and gatherest her food in the harvest.

jps.text: Provideth her bread in the summer, and gatherest her food in the harvest.

verses.hebrewText: עַד־מָתַ֖י עָצֵ֥ל ׀ תִּשְׁכָּ֑ב מָ֝תַ֗י תָּק֥וּם מִשְּׁנָתֶֽךָ׃
verses.englishText: How long wilt thou sleep, O sluggard? When wilt thou arise out of thy sleep?

jps.text: How long wilt thou sleep, O sluggard? When wilt thou arise out of thy sleep?

verses.hebrewText: מְעַ֣ט שֵׁ֭נֹות מְעַ֣ט תְּנוּמֹ֑ות מְעַ֓ט ׀ חִבֻּ֖ק יָדַ֣יִם לִשְׁכָּֽב׃
verses.englishText: 'Yet a little sleep, a little slumber, a little folding of the hands to sleep' —

jps.text: 'Yet a little sleep, a little slumber, a little folding of the hands to sleep' —

verses.hebrewText: וּבָֽא־כִמְהַלֵּ֥ךְ רֵאשֶׁ֑ךָ וּ֝מַחְסֹֽרְךָ֗ כְּאִ֣ישׁ מָגֵֽן׃ פ
verses.englishText: So shall thy poverty come as a runner, and thy want as an armed man.

jps.text: So shall thy poverty come as a runner, and thy want as an armed man.

verses.hebrewText: אָדָ֣ם בְּ֭לִיַּעַל אִ֣ישׁ אָ֑וֶן הֹ֝ולֵ֗ךְ עִקְּשׁ֥וּת פֶּֽה׃
verses.englishText: A base person, a man of iniquity, is he that walketh with a froward mouth;

jps.text: A base person, a man of iniquity, is he that walketh with a froward mouth;

verses.hebrewText: קֹרֵ֣ץ בְּ֭עֵינָיו מֹלֵ֣ל בְּרַגְלָ֑ו מֹ֝רֶ֗ה בְּאֶצְבְּעֹתָֽיו׃
verses.englishText: That winketh with his eyes, that scrapeth with his feet, that pointeth with his fingers;

jps.text: That winketh with his eyes, that scrapeth with his feet, that pointeth with his fingers;

verses.hebrewText: תַּֽהְפֻּכֹ֨ות ׀ בְּלִבֹּ֗ו חֹרֵ֣שׁ רָ֣ע בְּכָל־עֵ֑ת *מְדָנִים (מִדְיָנִ֥ים) יְשַׁלֵּֽחַ׃
verses.englishText: Frowardness is in his heart, he deviseth evil continually; he soweth discord.

jps.text: Frowardness is in his heart, he deviseth evil continually; he soweth discord.

verses.hebrewText: עַל־כֵּ֗ן פִּ֭תְאֹם יָבֹ֣וא אֵידֹ֑ו פֶּ֥תַע יִ֝שָּׁבֵ֗ר וְאֵ֣ין מַרְפֵּֽא׃ פ
verses.englishText: Therefore shall his calamity come suddenly; on a sudden shall he be broken, and that without remedy.

jps.text: Therefore shall his calamity come suddenly; on a sudden shall he be broken, and that without remedy.

verses.hebrewText: שֶׁשׁ־הֵ֭נָּה שָׂנֵ֣א יְהוָ֑ה וְ֝שֶׁ֗בַע *תֹּועֲבֹות (תֹּועֲבַ֥ת) נַפְשֹֽׁו׃
verses.englishText: There are six things which the LORD hateth, yea, seven which are an abomination unto Him:

jps.text: There are six things which the LORD hateth, yea, seven which are an abomination unto Him:

verses.hebrewText: עֵינַ֣יִם רָ֭מֹות לְשֹׁ֣ון שָׁ֑קֶר וְ֝יָדַ֗יִם שֹׁפְכֹ֥ות דָּם־נָקִֽי׃
verses.englishText: Haughty eyes, a lying tongue, and hands that shed innocent blood;

jps.text: Haughty eyes, a lying tongue, and hands that shed innocent blood;

verses.hebrewText: לֵ֗ב חֹ֭רֵשׁ מַחְשְׁבֹ֣ות אָ֑וֶן רַגְלַ֥יִם מְ֝מַהֲרֹ֗ות לָר֥וּץ לָֽרָעָה׃
verses.englishText: A heart that deviseth wicked thoughts, feet that are swift in running to evil;

jps.text: A heart that deviseth wicked thoughts, feet that are swift in running to evil;

verses.hebrewText: יָפִ֣יחַ כְּ֭זָבִים עֵ֣ד שָׁ֑קֶר וּמְשַׁלֵּ֥חַ מְ֝דָנִ֗ים בֵּ֣ין אַחִֽים׃ פ
verses.englishText: A false witness that breatheth out lies, and he that soweth discord among brethren.

jps.text: A false witness that breatheth out lies, and he that soweth discord among brethren.

verses.hebrewText: נְצֹ֣ר בְּ֭נִי מִצְוַ֣ת אָבִ֑יךָ וְאַל־תִּ֝טֹּ֗שׁ תֹּורַ֥ת אִמֶּֽךָ׃
verses.englishText: My son, keep the commandment of thy father, and forsake not the teaching of thy mother;

jps.text: My son, keep the commandment of thy father, and forsake not the teaching of thy mother;

verses.hebrewText: קָשְׁרֵ֣ם עַל־לִבְּךָ֣ תָמִ֑יד עָ֝נְדֵ֗ם עַל־גַּרְגְּרֹתֶֽךָ׃
verses.englishText: Bind them continually upon thy heart, tie them about thy neck.

jps.text: Bind them continually upon thy heart, tie them about thy neck.

verses.hebrewText: בְּהִתְהַלֶּכְךָ֨ ׀ תַּנְחֶ֬ה אֹתָ֗ךְ בְּֽ֭שָׁכְבְּךָ תִּשְׁמֹ֣ר עָלֶ֑יךָ וַ֝הֲקִיצֹ֗ותָ הִ֣יא תְשִׂיחֶֽךָ׃
verses.englishText: When thou walkest, it shall lead thee, when thou liest down, it shall watch over thee; and when thou awakest, it shall talk with thee.

jps.text: When thou walkest, it shall lead thee, when thou liest down, it shall watch over thee; and when thou awakest, it shall talk with thee.

verses.hebrewText: כִּ֤י נֵ֣ר מִ֭צְוָה וְתֹ֣ורָה אֹ֑ור וְדֶ֥רֶךְ חַ֝יִּ֗ים תֹּוכְחֹ֥ות מוּסָֽר׃
verses.englishText: For the commandment is a lamp, and the teaching is light, and reproofs of instruction are the way of life;

jps.text: For the commandment is a lamp, and the teaching is light, and reproofs of instruction are the way of life;

verses.hebrewText: לִ֭שְׁמָרְךָ מֵאֵ֣שֶׁת רָ֑ע מֵֽ֝חֶלְקַ֗ת לָשֹׁ֥ון נָכְרִיָּֽה׃
verses.englishText: To keep thee from the evil woman, from the smoothness of the alien tongue.

jps.text: To keep thee from the evil woman, from the smoothness of the alien tongue.

verses.hebrewText: אַל־תַּחְמֹ֣ד יָ֭פְיָהּ בִּלְבָבֶ֑ךָ וְאַל־תִּ֝קָּֽחֲךָ֗ בְּעַפְעַפֶּֽיהָ׃
verses.englishText: Lust not after her beauty in thy heart; neither let her captivate thee with her eyelids.

jps.text: Lust not after her beauty in thy heart; neither let her captivate thee with her eyelids.

verses.hebrewText: כִּ֤י בְעַד־אִשָּׁ֥ה זֹונָ֗ה עַֽד־כִּכַּ֫ר לָ֥חֶם וְאֵ֥שֶׁת אִ֑ישׁ נֶ֖פֶשׁ יְקָרָ֣ה תָצֽוּד׃ פ
verses.englishText: For on account of a harlot a man is brought to a loaf of bread, but the adulteress hunteth for the precious life.

jps.text: For on account of a harlot a man is brought to a loaf of bread, but the adulteress hunteth for the precious life.

verses.hebrewText: הֲיַחְתֶּ֤ה אִ֓ישׁ אֵ֬שׁ בְּחֵיקֹ֑ו וּ֝בְגָדָ֗יו לֹ֣א תִשָּׂרַֽפְנָה׃
verses.englishText: Can a man take fire in his bosom, and his clothes not be burned?

jps.text: Can a man take fire in his bosom, and his clothes not be burned?

verses.hebrewText: אִם־יְהַלֵּ֣ךְ אִ֭ישׁ עַל־הַגֶּחָלִ֑ים וְ֝רַגְלָ֗יו לֹ֣א תִכָּוֶֽינָה׃
verses.englishText: Or can one walk upon hot coals, and his feet not be scorched?

jps.text: Or can one walk upon hot coals, and his feet not be scorched?

verses.hebrewText: כֵּ֗ן הַ֭בָּא אֶל־אֵ֣שֶׁת רֵעֵ֑הוּ לֹ֥א יִ֝נָּקֶ֗ה כָּֽל־הַנֹּגֵ֥עַ בָּֽהּ׃
verses.englishText: So he that goeth in to his neighbour's wife; whosoever toucheth her shall not go unpunished.

jps.text: So he that goeth in to his neighbour's wife; whosoever toucheth her shall not go unpunished.

verses.hebrewText: לֹא־יָב֣וּזוּ לַ֭גַּנָּב כִּ֣י יִגְנֹ֑וב לְמַלֵּ֥א נַ֝פְשֹׁ֗ו כִּ֣י יִרְעָֽב׃
verses.englishText: Men do not despise a thief, if he steal to satisfy his soul when he is hungry;

jps.text: Men do not despise a thief, if he steal to satisfy his soul when he is hungry;

verses.hebrewText: וְ֭נִמְצָא יְשַׁלֵּ֣ם שִׁבְעָתָ֑יִם אֶת־כָּל־הֹ֖ון בֵּיתֹ֣ו יִתֵּֽן׃
verses.englishText: But if he be found, he must restore sevenfold, he must give all the substance of his house.

jps.text: But if he be found, he must restore sevenfold, he must give all the substance of his house.

verses.hebrewText: נֹאֵ֣ף אִשָּׁ֣ה חֲסַר־לֵ֑ב מַֽשְׁחִ֥ית נַ֝פְשֹׁ֗ו ה֣וּא יַעֲשֶֽׂנָּה׃
verses.englishText: He that committeth adultery with a woman lacketh understanding; he doeth it that would destroy his own soul.

jps.text: He that committeth adultery with a woman lacketh understanding; he doeth it that would destroy his own soul.

verses.hebrewText: נֶֽגַע־וְקָלֹ֥ון יִמְצָ֑א וְ֝חֶרְפָּתֹ֗ו לֹ֣א תִמָּחֶֽה׃
verses.englishText: Wounds and dishonour shall he get, and his reproach shall not be wiped away.

jps.text: Wounds and dishonour shall he get, and his reproach shall not be wiped away.

verses.hebrewText: כִּֽי־קִנְאָ֥ה חֲמַת־גָּ֑בֶר וְלֹֽא־יַ֝חְמֹ֗ול בְּיֹ֣ום נָקָֽם׃
verses.englishText: For jealousy is the rage of a man, and he will not spare in the day of vengeance.

jps.text: For jealousy is the rage of a man, and he will not spare in the day of vengeance.

verses.hebrewText: לֹא־יִ֭שָּׂא פְּנֵ֣י כָל־כֹּ֑פֶר וְלֹֽא־יֹ֝אבֶ֗ה כִּ֣י תַרְבֶּה־שֹֽׁחַד׃ פ
verses.englishText: He will not regard any ransom; neither will he rest content, though thou givest many gifts.

jps.text: He will not regard any ransom; neither will he rest content, though thou givest many gifts.

verses.hebrewText: בְּ֭נִי שְׁמֹ֣ר אֲמָרָ֑י וּ֝מִצְוֹתַ֗י תִּצְפֹּ֥ן אִתָּֽךְ׃
verses.englishText: My son, keep my words, and lay up my commandments with thee.

jps.text: My son, keep my words, and lay up my commandments with thee.

verses.hebrewText: שְׁמֹ֣ר מִצְוֹתַ֣י וֶחְיֵ֑ה וְ֝תֹורָתִ֗י כְּאִישֹׁ֥ון עֵינֶֽיךָ׃
verses.englishText: Keep my commandments and live, and my teaching as the apple of thine eye.

jps.text: Keep my commandments and live, and my teaching as the apple of thine eye.

verses.hebrewText: קָשְׁרֵ֥ם עַל־אֶצְבְּעֹתֶ֑יךָ כָּ֝תְבֵ֗ם עַל־ל֥וּחַ לִבֶּֽךָ׃
verses.englishText: Bind them upon thy fingers, write them upon the table of thy heart.

jps.text: Bind them upon thy fingers, write them upon the table of thy heart.

verses.hebrewText: אֱמֹ֣ר לַֽ֭חָכְמָה אֲחֹ֣תִי אָ֑תְּ וּ֝מֹדָ֗ע לַבִּינָ֥ה תִקְרָֽא׃
verses.englishText: Say unto wisdom: 'Thou art my sister', and call understanding thy kinswoman;

jps.text: Say unto wisdom: 'Thou art my sister', and call understanding thy kinswoman;

verses.hebrewText: לִ֭שְׁמָרְךָ מֵאִשָּׁ֣ה זָרָ֑ה מִ֝נָּכְרִיָּ֗ה אֲמָרֶ֥יהָ הֶחֱלִֽיקָה׃
verses.englishText: That they may keep thee from the strange woman, from the alien woman that maketh smooth her words.

jps.text: That they may keep thee from the strange woman, from the alien woman that maketh smooth her words.

verses.hebrewText: כִּ֭י בְּחַלֹּ֣ון בֵּיתִ֑י בְּעַ֖ד אֶשְׁנַבִּ֣י נִשְׁקָֽפְתִּי׃
verses.englishText: For at the window of my house I looked forth through my lattice;

jps.text: For at the window of my house I looked forth through my lattice;

verses.hebrewText: וָאֵ֤רֶא בַפְּתָאיִ֗ם אָ֘בִ֤ינָה בַבָּנִ֗ים נַ֣עַר חֲסַר־לֵֽב׃
verses.englishText: And I beheld among the thoughtless ones, I discerned among the youths, a young man void of understanding,

jps.text: And I beheld among the thoughtless ones, I discerned among the youths, a young man void of understanding,

verses.hebrewText: עֹבֵ֣ר בַּ֭שּׁוּק אֵ֣צֶל פִּנָּ֑הּ וְדֶ֖רֶךְ בֵּיתָ֣הּ יִצְעָֽד׃
verses.englishText: Passing through the street near her corner, and he went the way to her house;

jps.text: Passing through the street near her corner, and he went the way to her house;

verses.hebrewText: בְּנֶֽשֶׁף־בְּעֶ֥רֶב יֹ֑ום בְּאִישֹׁ֥ון לַ֝֗יְלָה וַאֲפֵלָֽה׃
verses.englishText: In the twilight, in the evening of the day, in the blackness of night and the darkness.

jps.text: In the twilight, in the evening of the day, in the blackness of night and the darkness.

verses.hebrewText: וְהִנֵּ֣ה אִ֭שָּׁה לִקְרָאתֹ֑ו שִׁ֥ית זֹ֝ונָ֗ה וּנְצֻ֥רַת לֵֽב׃
verses.englishText: And, behold, there met him a woman with the attire of a harlot, and wily of heart.

jps.text: And, behold, there met him a woman with the attire of a harlot, and wily of heart.

verses.hebrewText: הֹמִיָּ֣ה הִ֣יא וְסֹרָ֑רֶת בְּ֝בֵיתָ֗הּ לֹא־יִשְׁכְּנ֥וּ רַגְלֶֽיהָ׃
verses.englishText: She is riotous and rebellious, her feet abide not in her house;

jps.text: She is riotous and rebellious, her feet abide not in her house;

verses.hebrewText: פַּ֤עַם ׀ בַּח֗וּץ פַּ֥עַם בָּרְחֹבֹ֑ות וְאֵ֖צֶל כָּל־פִּנָּ֣ה תֶאֱרֹֽב׃
verses.englishText: Now she is in the streets, now in the broad places, and lieth in wait at every corner.

jps.text: Now she is in the streets, now in the broad places, and lieth in wait at every corner.

verses.hebrewText: וְהֶחֱזִ֣יקָה בֹּ֖ו וְנָ֣שְׁקָה־לֹּ֑ו הֵעֵ֥זָה פָ֝נֶ֗יהָ וַתֹּ֣אמַר לֹֽו׃
verses.englishText: So she caught him, and kissed him, and with an impudent face she said unto him:

jps.text: So she caught him, and kissed him, and with an impudent face she said unto him:

verses.hebrewText: זִבְחֵ֣י שְׁלָמִ֣ים עָלָ֑י הַ֝יֹּ֗ום שִׁלַּ֥מְתִּי נְדָרָֽי׃
verses.englishText: 'Sacrifices of peace-offerings were due from me; this day have I paid my vows.

jps.text: 'Sacrifices of peace-offerings were due from me; this day have I paid my vows.

verses.hebrewText: עַל־כֵּ֭ן יָצָ֣אתִי לִקְרָאתֶ֑ךָ לְשַׁחֵ֥ר פָּ֝נֶ֗יךָ וָאֶמְצָאֶֽךָּ׃
verses.englishText: Therefore came I forth to meet thee, to seek thy face, and I have found thee.

jps.text: Therefore came I forth to meet thee, to seek thy face, and I have found thee.

verses.hebrewText: מַ֭רְבַדִּים רָבַ֣דְתִּי עַרְשִׂ֑י חֲ֝טֻבֹ֗ות אֵט֥וּן מִצְרָֽיִם׃
verses.englishText: I have decked my couch with coverlets, with striped cloths of the yarn of Egypt.

jps.text: I have decked my couch with coverlets, with striped cloths of the yarn of Egypt.

verses.hebrewText: נַ֥פְתִּי מִשְׁכָּבִ֑י מֹ֥ר אֲ֝הָלִ֗ים וְקִנָּמֹֽון׃
verses.englishText: I have perfumed my bed with myrrh, aloes, and cinnamon.

jps.text: I have perfumed my bed with myrrh, aloes, and cinnamon.

verses.hebrewText: לְכָ֤ה נִרְוֶ֣ה דֹ֭דִים עַד־הַבֹּ֑קֶר נִ֝תְעַלְּסָ֗ה בָּאֳהָבִֽים׃
verses.englishText: Come, let us take our fill of love until the morning; let us solace ourselves with loves.

jps.text: Come, let us take our fill of love until the morning; let us solace ourselves with loves.

verses.hebrewText: כִּ֤י אֵ֣ין הָאִ֣ישׁ בְּבֵיתֹ֑ו הָ֝לַ֗ךְ בְּדֶ֣רֶךְ מֵרָחֹֽוק׃
verses.englishText: For my husband is not at home, he is gone a long journey;

jps.text: For my husband is not at home, he is gone a long journey;

verses.hebrewText: צְֽרֹור־הַ֭כֶּסֶף לָקַ֣ח בְּיָדֹ֑ו לְיֹ֥ום הַ֝כֵּ֗סֶא יָבֹ֥א בֵיתֹֽו׃
verses.englishText: He hath taken the bag of money with him; he will come home at the full moon.'

jps.text: He hath taken the bag of money with him; he will come home at the full moon.'

verses.hebrewText: הִ֭טַּתּוּ בְּרֹ֣ב לִקְחָ֑הּ בְּחֵ֥לֶק שְׂ֝פָתֶ֗יהָ תַּדִּיחֶֽנּוּ׃
verses.englishText: With her much fair speech she causeth him to yield, with the blandishment of her lips she enticeth him away.

jps.text: With her much fair speech she causeth him to yield, with the blandishment of her lips she enticeth him away.

verses.hebrewText: הֹ֤ולֵ֥ךְ אַחֲרֶ֗יהָ פִּ֫תְאֹ֥ם כְּ֭שֹׁור אֶל־טָ֣בַח יָבֹ֑וא וּ֝כְעֶ֗כֶס אֶל־מוּסַ֥ר אֱוֽ͏ִיל׃
verses.englishText: He goeth after her straightway, as an ox that goeth to the slaughter, or as one in fetters to the correction of the fool;

jps.text: He goeth after her straightway, as an ox that goeth to the slaughter, or as one in fetters to the correction of the fool;

verses.hebrewText: עַ֤ד יְפַלַּ֪ח חֵ֡ץ כְּֽבֵדֹ֗ו כְּמַהֵ֣ר צִפֹּ֣ור אֶל־פָּ֑ח וְלֹֽא־יָ֝דַ֗ע כִּֽי־בְנַפְשֹׁ֥ו הֽוּא׃ פ
verses.englishText: Till an arrow strike through his liver; as a bird hasteneth to the snare — and knoweth not that it is at the cost of his life.

jps.text: Till an arrow strike through his liver; as a bird hasteneth to the snare — and knoweth not that it is at the cost of his life.

verses.hebrewText: וְעַתָּ֣ה בָ֭נִים שִׁמְעוּ־לִ֑י וְ֝הַקְשִׁ֗יבוּ לְאִמְרֵי־פִֽי׃
verses.englishText: Now therefore, O ye children, hearken unto me, and attend to the words of my mouth.

jps.text: Now therefore, O ye children, hearken unto me, and attend to the words of my mouth.

verses.hebrewText: אַל־יֵ֣שְׂטְ אֶל־דְּרָכֶ֣יהָ לִבֶּ֑ךָ אַל־תֵּ֝תַע בִּנְתִיבֹותֶֽיהָ׃
verses.englishText: Let not thy heart decline to her ways, go not astray in her paths.

jps.text: Let not thy heart decline to her ways, go not astray in her paths.

verses.hebrewText: כִּֽי־רַבִּ֣ים חֲלָלִ֣ים הִפִּ֑ילָה וַ֝עֲצֻמִ֗ים כָּל־הֲרֻגֶֽיהָ׃
verses.englishText: For she hath cast down many wounded; yea, a mighty host are all her slain.

jps.text: For she hath cast down many wounded; yea, a mighty host are all her slain.

verses.hebrewText: דַּרְכֵ֣י שְׁאֹ֣ול בֵּיתָ֑הּ יֹ֝רְדֹ֗ות אֶל־חַדְרֵי־מָֽוֶת׃ פ
verses.englishText: Her house is the way to the nether-world, going down to the chambers of death.

jps.text: Her house is the way to the nether-world, going down to the chambers of death.

verses.hebrewText: הֲלֹֽא־חָכְמָ֥ה תִקְרָ֑א וּ֝תְבוּנָ֗ה תִּתֵּ֥ן קֹולָֽהּ׃
verses.englishText: Doth not wisdom call, and understanding put forth her voice?

jps.text: Doth not wisdom call, and understanding put forth her voice?

verses.hebrewText: בְּרֹאשׁ־מְרֹומִ֥ים עֲלֵי־דָ֑רֶךְ בֵּ֖ית נְתִיבֹ֣ות נִצָּֽבָה׃
verses.englishText: In the top of high places by the way, where the paths meet, she standeth;

jps.text: In the top of high places by the way, where the paths meet, she standeth;

verses.hebrewText: לְיַד־שְׁעָרִ֥ים לְפִי־קָ֑רֶת מְבֹ֖וא פְתָחִ֣ים תָּרֹֽנָּה׃
verses.englishText: Beside the gates, at the entry of the city, at the coming in at the doors, she crieth aloud:

jps.text: Beside the gates, at the entry of the city, at the coming in at the doors, she crieth aloud:

verses.hebrewText: אֲלֵיכֶ֣ם אִישִׁ֣ים אֶקְרָ֑א וְ֝קֹולִ֗י אֶל־בְּנֵ֥י אָדָֽם׃
verses.englishText: 'Unto you, O men, I call, and my voice is to the sons of men.

jps.text: 'Unto you, O men, I call, and my voice is to the sons of men.

verses.hebrewText: הָבִ֣ינוּ פְתָאיִ֣ם עָרְמָ֑ה וּ֝כְסִילִ֗ים הָבִ֥ינוּ לֵֽב׃
verses.englishText: O ye thoughtless, understand prudence, and, ye fools, be ye of an understanding heart.

jps.text: O ye thoughtless, understand prudence, and, ye fools, be ye of an understanding heart.

verses.hebrewText: שִׁ֭מְעוּ כִּֽי־נְגִידִ֣ים אֲדַבֵּ֑ר וּמִפְתַּ֥ח שְׂ֝פָתַ֗י מֵישָׁרִֽים׃
verses.englishText: Hear, for I will speak excellent things, and the opening of my lips shall be right things.

jps.text: Hear, for I will speak excellent things, and the opening of my lips shall be right things.

verses.hebrewText: כִּֽי־אֱ֭מֶת יֶהְגֶּ֣ה חִכִּ֑י וְתֹועֲבַ֖ת שְׂפָתַ֣י רֶֽשַׁע׃
verses.englishText: For my mouth shall utter truth, and wickedness is an abomination to my lips.

jps.text: For my mouth shall utter truth, and wickedness is an abomination to my lips.

verses.hebrewText: בְּצֶ֥דֶק כָּל־אִמְרֵי־פִ֑י אֵ֥ין בָּ֝הֶ֗ם נִפְתָּ֥ל וְעִקֵּֽשׁ׃
verses.englishText: All the words of my mouth are in righteousness, there is nothing perverse or crooked in them.

jps.text: All the words of my mouth are in righteousness, there is nothing perverse or crooked in them.

verses.hebrewText: כֻּלָּ֣ם נְ֭כֹחִים לַמֵּבִ֑ין וִֽ֝ישָׁרִ֗ים לְמֹ֣צְאֵי דָֽעַת׃
verses.englishText: They are all plain to him that understandeth, and right to them that find knowledge.

jps.text: They are all plain to him that understandeth, and right to them that find knowledge.

verses.hebrewText: קְחֽוּ־מוּסָרִ֥י וְאַל־כָּ֑סֶף וְ֝דַ֗עַת מֵחָר֥וּץ נִבְחָֽר׃
verses.englishText: Receive my instruction, and not silver, and knowledge rather than choice gold.

jps.text: Receive my instruction, and not silver, and knowledge rather than choice gold.

verses.hebrewText: כִּֽי־טֹובָ֣ה חָ֭כְמָה מִפְּנִינִ֑ים וְכָל־חֲ֝פָצִ֗ים לֹ֣א יִֽשְׁווּ־בָֽהּ׃
verses.englishText: For wisdom is better than rubies, and all things desirable are not to be compared unto her.

jps.text: For wisdom is better than rubies, and all things desirable are not to be compared unto her.

verses.hebrewText: אֲ‍ֽנִי־חָ֭כְמָה שָׁכַ֣נְתִּי עָרְמָ֑ה וְדַ֖עַת מְזִמֹּ֣ות אֶמְצָֽא׃
verses.englishText: I wisdom dwell with prudence, and find out knowledge of devices.

jps.text: I wisdom dwell with prudence, and find out knowledge of devices.

verses.hebrewText: יִֽרְאַ֣ת יְהוָה֮ שְֽׂנֹ֫את רָ֥ע גֵּ֘אָ֤ה וְגָאֹ֨ון ׀ וְדֶ֣רֶךְ רָ֭ע וּפִ֨י תַהְפֻּכֹ֬ות שָׂנֵֽאתִי׃
verses.englishText: The fear of the LORD is to hate evil; pride, and arrogancy, and the evil way, and the froward mouth, do I hate.

jps.text: The fear of the LORD is to hate evil; pride, and arrogancy, and the evil way, and the froward mouth, do I hate.

verses.hebrewText: לִֽי־עֵ֭צָה וְתוּשִׁיָּ֑ה אֲנִ֥י בִ֝ינָ֗ה לִ֣י גְבוּרָֽה׃
verses.englishText: Counsel is mine, and sound wisdom; I am understanding, power is mine.

jps.text: Counsel is mine, and sound wisdom; I am understanding, power is mine.

verses.hebrewText: בִּ֭י מְלָכִ֣ים יִמְלֹ֑כוּ וְ֝רֹוזְנִ֗ים יְחֹ֣קְקוּ צֶֽדֶק׃
verses.englishText: By me kings reign, and princes decree justice.

jps.text: By me kings reign, and princes decree justice.

verses.hebrewText: בִּ֭י שָׂרִ֣ים יָשֹׂ֑רוּ וּ֝נְדִיבִ֗ים כָּל־שֹׁ֥פְטֵי צֶֽדֶק׃
verses.englishText: By me princes rule, and nobles, even all the judges of the earth.

jps.text: By me princes rule, and nobles, even all the judges of the earth.

verses.hebrewText: אֲ֭נִי *אֹהֲבֶיהָ (אֹהֲבַ֣י) אֵהָ֑ב וּ֝מְשַׁחֲרַ֗י יִמְצָאֻֽנְנִי׃
verses.englishText: I love them that love me, and those that seek me earnestly shall find me.

jps.text: I love them that love me, and those that seek me earnestly shall find me.

verses.hebrewText: עֹֽשֶׁר־וְכָבֹ֥וד אִתִּ֑י הֹ֥ון עָ֝תֵ֗ק וּצְדָקָֽה׃
verses.englishText: Riches and honour are with me; yea, enduring riches and righteousness.

jps.text: Riches and honour are with me; yea, enduring riches and righteousness.

verses.hebrewText: טֹ֣וב פִּ֭רְיִי מֵחָר֣וּץ וּמִפָּ֑ז וּ֝תְבוּאָתִ֗י מִכֶּ֥סֶף נִבְחָֽר׃
verses.englishText: My fruit is better than gold, yea, than fine gold; and my produce than choice silver.

jps.text: My fruit is better than gold, yea, than fine gold; and my produce than choice silver.

verses.hebrewText: בְּאֹֽרַח־צְדָקָ֥ה אֲהַלֵּ֑ך בְּ֝תֹ֗וךְ נְתִיבֹ֥ות מִשְׁפָּֽט׃
verses.englishText: I walk in the way of righteousness, in the midst of the paths of justice;

jps.text: I walk in the way of righteousness, in the midst of the paths of justice;

verses.hebrewText: לְהַנְחִ֖יל אֹהֲבַ֥י ׀ יֵ֑שׁ וְאֹצְרֹ֖תֵיהֶ֣ם אֲמַלֵּֽא׃ פ
verses.englishText: That I may cause those that love me to inherit substance, and that I may fill their treasuries.

jps.text: That I may cause those that love me to inherit substance, and that I may fill their treasuries.

verses.hebrewText: יְֽהוָ֗ה קָ֭נָנִי רֵאשִׁ֣ית דַּרְכֹּ֑ו קֶ֖דֶם מִפְעָלָ֣יו מֵאָֽז׃
verses.englishText: The LORD made me as the beginning of His way, the first of His works of old.

jps.text: The LORD made me as the beginning of His way, the first of His works of old.

verses.hebrewText: מֵ֭עֹולָם נִסַּ֥כְתִּי מֵרֹ֗אשׁ מִקַּדְמֵי־אָֽרֶץ׃
verses.englishText: I was set up from everlasting, from the beginning, or ever the earth was.

jps.text: I was set up from everlasting, from the beginning, or ever the earth was.

verses.hebrewText: בְּאֵין־תְּהֹמֹ֥ות חֹולָ֑לְתִּי בְּאֵ֥ין מַ֝עְיָנֹ֗ות נִכְבַּדֵּי־מָֽיִם׃
verses.englishText: When there were no depths, I was brought forth; when there were no fountains abounding with water.

jps.text: When there were no depths, I was brought forth; when there were no fountains abounding with water.

verses.hebrewText: בְּטֶ֣רֶם הָרִ֣ים הָטְבָּ֑עוּ לִפְנֵ֖י גְבָעֹ֣ות חֹולָֽלְתִּי׃
verses.englishText: Before the mountains were settled, before the hills was I brought forth;

jps.text: Before the mountains were settled, before the hills was I brought forth;

verses.hebrewText: עַד־לֹ֣א עָ֭שָׂה אֶ֣רֶץ וְחוּצֹ֑ות וְ֝רֹ֗אשׁ עָפְרֹ֥ות תֵּבֵֽל׃
verses.englishText: While as yet He had not made the earth, nor the fields, nor the beginning of the dust of the world.

jps.text: While as yet He had not made the earth, nor the fields, nor the beginning of the dust of the world.

verses.hebrewText: בַּהֲכִינֹ֣ו שָׁ֭מַיִם שָׁ֣ם אָ֑נִי בְּח֥וּקֹו ח֝֗וּג עַל־פְּנֵ֥י תְהֹֽום׃
verses.englishText: When He established the heavens, I was there; when He set a circle upon the face of the deep,

jps.text: When He established the heavens, I was there; when He set a circle upon the face of the deep,

verses.hebrewText: בְּאַמְּצֹ֣ו שְׁחָקִ֣ים מִמָּ֑עַל בַּ֝עֲזֹ֗וז עִינֹ֥ות תְּהֹום׃
verses.englishText: When He made firm the skies above, when the fountains of the deep showed their might,

jps.text: When He made firm the skies above, when the fountains of the deep showed their might,

verses.hebrewText: בְּשׂ֘וּמֹ֤ו לַיָּ֨ם ׀ חֻקֹּ֗ו וּ֭מַיִם לֹ֣א יַֽעַבְרוּ־פִ֑יו בְּ֝חוּקֹ֗ו מֹ֣וסְדֵי אָֽרֶץ׃
verses.englishText: When He gave to the sea His decree, that the waters should not transgress His commandment, when He appointed the foundations of the earth;

jps.text: When He gave to the sea His decree, that the waters should not transgress His commandment, when He appointed the foundations of the earth;

verses.hebrewText: וָֽאֶהְיֶ֥ה אֶצְלֹ֗ו אָ֫מֹ֥ון וָֽאֶהְיֶ֣ה שַׁ֭עֲשֻׁעִים יֹ֤ום ׀ יֹ֑ום מְשַׂחֶ֖קֶת לְפָנָ֣יו בְּכָל־עֵֽת׃
verses.englishText: Then I was by Him, as a nursling; and I was daily all delight, playing always before Him,

jps.text: Then I was by Him, as a nursling; and I was daily all delight, playing always before Him,

verses.hebrewText: מְ֭שַׂחֶקֶת בְּתֵבֵ֣ל אַרְצֹ֑ו וְ֝שַׁעֲשֻׁעַ֗י אֶת־בְּנֵ֥י אָדָֽם׃ פ
verses.englishText: Playing in His habitable earth, and my delights are with the sons of men.

jps.text: Playing in His habitable earth, and my delights are with the sons of men.

verses.hebrewText: וְעַתָּ֣ה בָ֭נִים שִׁמְעוּ־לִ֑י וְ֝אַשְׁרֵ֗י דְּרָכַ֥י יִשְׁמֹֽרוּ׃
verses.englishText: Now therefore, ye children, hearken unto me; for happy are they that keep my ways.

jps.text: Now therefore, ye children, hearken unto me; for happy are they that keep my ways.

verses.hebrewText: שִׁמְע֖וּ מוּסָ֥ר וַחֲכָ֗מוּ וְאַל־תִּפְרָֽעוּ׃
verses.englishText: Hear instruction, and be wise, and refuse it not.

jps.text: Hear instruction, and be wise, and refuse it not.

verses.hebrewText: אַ֥שְֽׁרֵי אָדָם֮ שֹׁמֵ֪עַֽ֫ לִ֥י לִשְׁקֹ֣ד עַל־דַּ֭לְתֹתַי יֹ֤ום ׀ יֹ֑ום לִ֝שְׁמֹ֗ר מְזוּזֹ֥ת פְּתָחָֽי׃
verses.englishText: Happy is the man that hearkeneth to me, watching daily at my gates, waiting at the posts of my doors.

jps.text: Happy is the man that hearkeneth to me, watching daily at my gates, waiting at the posts of my doors.

verses.hebrewText: כִּ֣י מֹ֭צְאִי *מֹצְאֵי (מָצָ֣א) חַיִּ֑ים וַיָּ֥פֶק רָ֝צֹ֗ון מֵיְהוָֽה׃
verses.englishText: For whoso findeth me findeth life, and obtaineth favour of the LORD.

jps.text: For whoso findeth me findeth life, and obtaineth favour of the LORD.

verses.hebrewText: וְֽ֭חֹטְאִי חֹמֵ֣ס נַפְשֹׁ֑ו כָּל־מְ֝שַׂנְאַ֗י אָ֣הֲבוּ מָֽוֶת׃ פ
verses.englishText: But he that misseth me wrongeth his own soul; all they that hate me love death.'

jps.text: But he that misseth me wrongeth his own soul; all they that hate me love death.'

verses.hebrewText: חָ֭כְמֹות בָּנְתָ֣ה בֵיתָ֑הּ חָצְבָ֖ה עַמּוּדֶ֣יהָ שִׁבְעָֽה׃
verses.englishText: Wisdom hath builded her house, she hath hewn out her seven pillars;

jps.text: Wisdom hath builded her house, she hath hewn out her seven pillars;

verses.hebrewText: טָבְחָ֣ה טִ֭בְחָהּ מָסְכָ֣ה יֵינָ֑הּ אַ֝֗ף עָֽרְכָ֥ה שֻׁלְחָנָֽהּ׃
verses.englishText: She hath prepared her meat, she hath mingled her wine; she hath also furnished her table.

jps.text: She hath prepared her meat, she hath mingled her wine; she hath also furnished her table.

verses.hebrewText: שָֽׁלְחָ֣ה נַעֲרֹתֶ֣יהָ תִקְרָ֑א עַל־גַּ֝פֵּ֗י מְרֹ֣מֵי קָֽרֶת׃
verses.englishText: She hath sent forth her maidens, she calleth, upon the highest places of the city:

jps.text: She hath sent forth her maidens, she calleth, upon the highest places of the city:

verses.hebrewText: מִי־פֶ֭תִי יָסֻ֣ר הֵ֑נָּה חֲסַר־לֵ֝֗ב אָ֣מְרָה לֹּֽו׃
verses.englishText: 'Whoso is thoughtless, let him turn in hither'; as for him that lacketh understanding, she saith to him:

jps.text: 'Whoso is thoughtless, let him turn in hither'; as for him that lacketh understanding, she saith to him:

verses.hebrewText: לְ֭כוּ לַחֲמ֣וּ בְֽלַחֲמִ֑י וּ֝שְׁת֗וּ בְּיַ֣יִן מָסָֽכְתִּי׃
verses.englishText: 'Come, eat of my bread, and drink of the wine which I have mingled.

jps.text: 'Come, eat of my bread, and drink of the wine which I have mingled.

verses.hebrewText: עִזְב֣וּ פְתָאיִ֣ם וִֽחְי֑וּ וְ֝אִשְׁר֗וּ בְּדֶ֣רֶךְ בִּינָֽה׃
verses.englishText: Forsake all thoughtlessness, and live; and walk in the way of understanding.

jps.text: Forsake all thoughtlessness, and live; and walk in the way of understanding.

verses.hebrewText: יֹ֤סֵ֨ר ׀ לֵ֗ץ לֹקֵ֣חַֽ לֹ֣ו קָלֹ֑ון וּמֹוכִ֖יחַ לְרָשָׁ֣ע מוּמֹֽו׃
verses.englishText: He that correcteth a scorner getteth to himself shame, and he that reproveth a wicked man, it becometh unto him a blot.

jps.text: He that correcteth a scorner getteth to himself shame, and he that reproveth a wicked man, it becometh unto him a blot.

verses.hebrewText: אַל־תֹּ֣וכַח לֵ֭ץ פֶּן־יִשְׂנָאֶ֑ךָּ הֹוכַ֥ח לְ֝חָכָ֗ם וְיֶאֱהָבֶֽךָּ׃
verses.englishText: Reprove not a scorner, lest he hate thee; reprove a wise man, and he will love thee.

jps.text: Reprove not a scorner, lest he hate thee; reprove a wise man, and he will love thee.

verses.hebrewText: תֵּ֣ן לְ֭חָכָם וְיֶחְכַּם־עֹ֑וד הֹודַ֥ע לְ֝צַדִּ֗יק וְיֹ֣וסֶף לֶֽקַח׃ פ
verses.englishText: Give to a wise man, and he will be yet wiser; teach a righteous man, and he will increase in learning.

jps.text: Give to a wise man, and he will be yet wiser; teach a righteous man, and he will increase in learning.

verses.hebrewText: תְּחִלַּ֣ת חָ֭כְמָה יִרְאַ֣ת יְהוָ֑ה וְדַ֖עַת קְדֹשִׁ֣ים בִּינָֽה׃
verses.englishText: The fear of the LORD is the beginning of wisdom, and the knowledge of the All-holy is understanding.

jps.text: The fear of the LORD is the beginning of wisdom, and the knowledge of the All-holy is understanding.

verses.hebrewText: כִּי־בִ֭י יִרְבּ֣וּ יָמֶ֑יךָ וְיֹוסִ֥יפוּ לְּ֝ךָ֗ שְׁנֹ֣ות חַיִּֽים׃
verses.englishText: For by me thy days shall be multiplied, and the years of thy life shall be increased.

jps.text: For by me thy days shall be multiplied, and the years of thy life shall be increased.

verses.englishText: If thou art wise, thou art wise for thyself; and if thou scornest, thou alone shalt bear it.'

jps.text: If thou art wise, thou art wise for thyself; and if thou scornest, thou alone shalt bear it.'

verses.hebrewText: אֵ֣שֶׁת כְּ֭סִילוּת הֹֽמִיָּ֑ה פְּ֝תַיּ֗וּת וּבַל־יָ֥דְעָה מָּֽה׃
verses.englishText: The woman Folly is riotous; she is thoughtless, and knoweth nothing.

jps.text: The woman Folly is riotous; she is thoughtless, and knoweth nothing.

verses.hebrewText: וְֽ֭יָשְׁבָה לְפֶ֣תַח בֵּיתָ֑הּ עַל־כִּ֝סֵּ֗א מְרֹ֣מֵי קָֽרֶת׃
verses.englishText: And she sitteth at the door of her house, on a seat in the high places of the city,

jps.text: And she sitteth at the door of her house, on a seat in the high places of the city,

verses.hebrewText: לִקְרֹ֥א לְעֹֽבְרֵי־דָ֑רֶךְ הַֽ֝מְיַשְּׁרִ֗ים אֹֽרְחֹותָֽם׃
verses.englishText: To call to them that pass by, who go right on their ways:

jps.text: To call to them that pass by, who go right on their ways:

verses.hebrewText: מִי־פֶ֭תִי יָסֻ֣ר הֵ֑נָּה וַחֲסַר־לֵ֝֗ב וְאָ֣מְרָה לֹּֽו׃
verses.englishText: 'Whoso is thoughtless, let him turn in hither'; and as for him that lacketh understanding, she saith to him:

jps.text: 'Whoso is thoughtless, let him turn in hither'; and as for him that lacketh understanding, she saith to him:

verses.hebrewText: מַֽיִם־גְּנוּבִ֥ים יִמְתָּ֑קוּ וְלֶ֖חֶם סְתָרִ֣ים יִנְעָֽם׃
verses.englishText: 'Stolen waters are sweet, and bread eaten in secret is pleasant.'

jps.text: 'Stolen waters are sweet, and bread eaten in secret is pleasant.'

verses.hebrewText: וְֽלֹא־יָ֭דַע כִּֽי־רְפָאִ֣ים שָׁ֑ם בְּעִמְקֵ֖י שְׁאֹ֣ול קְרֻאֶֽיהָ׃ פ
verses.englishText: But he knoweth not that the shades are there; that her guests are in the depths of the nether-world.

jps.text: But he knoweth not that the shades are there; that her guests are in the depths of the nether-world.

verses.hebrewText: מִשְׁלֵ֗י שְׁלֹ֫מֹ֥ה פ בֵּ֣ן חָ֭כָם יְשַׂמַּח־אָ֑ב וּבֵ֥ן כְּ֝סִ֗יל תּוּגַ֥ת אִמֹּֽו׃
verses.englishText: The proverbs of Solomon. A wise son maketh a glad father; but a foolish son is the grief of his mother.

jps.text: The proverbs of Solomon. A wise son maketh a glad father; but a foolish son is the grief of his mother.

verses.hebrewText: לֹא־יֹ֭ועִילוּ אֹוצְרֹ֣ות רֶ֑שַׁע וּ֝צְדָקָ֗ה תַּצִּ֥יל מִמָּֽוֶת׃
verses.englishText: Treasures of wickedness profit nothing; but righteousness delivereth from death.

jps.text: Treasures of wickedness profit nothing; but righteousness delivereth from death.

verses.hebrewText: לֹֽא־יַרְעִ֣יב יְ֭הוָה נֶ֣פֶשׁ צַדִּ֑יק וְהַוַּ֖ת רְשָׁעִ֣ים יֶהְדֹּֽף׃
verses.englishText: The LORD will not suffer the soul of the righteous to famish; but He thrusteth away the desire of the wicked.

jps.text: The LORD will not suffer the soul of the righteous to famish; but He thrusteth away the desire of the wicked.

verses.hebrewText: רָ֗אשׁ עֹשֶׂ֥ה כַף־רְמִיָּ֑ה וְיַ֖ד חָרוּצִ֣ים תַּעֲשִֽׁיר׃
verses.englishText: He becometh poor that dealeth with a slack hand; but the hand of the diligent maketh rich.

jps.text: He becometh poor that dealeth with a slack hand; but the hand of the diligent maketh rich.

verses.hebrewText: אֹגֵ֣ר בַּ֭קַּיִץ בֵּ֣ן מַשְׂכִּ֑יל נִרְדָּ֥ם בַּ֝קָּצִ֗יר בֵּ֣ן מֵבִֽישׁ׃
verses.englishText: A wise son gathereth in summer; but a son that doeth shamefully sleepeth in harvest.

jps.text: A wise son gathereth in summer; but a son that doeth shamefully sleepeth in harvest.

verses.hebrewText: בְּ֭רָכֹות לְרֹ֣אשׁ צַדִּ֑יק וּפִ֥י רְ֝שָׁעִ֗ים יְכַסֶּ֥ה חָמָֽס׃
verses.englishText: Blessings are upon the head of the righteous; but the mouth of the wicked concealeth violence.

jps.text: Blessings are upon the head of the righteous; but the mouth of the wicked concealeth violence.

verses.hebrewText: זֵ֣כֶר צַ֭דִּיק לִבְרָכָ֑ה וְשֵׁ֖ם רְשָׁעִ֣ים יִרְקָֽב׃
verses.englishText: The memory of the righteous shall be for a blessing; but the name of the wicked shall rot.

jps.text: The memory of the righteous shall be for a blessing; but the name of the wicked shall rot.

verses.hebrewText: חֲכַם־לֵ֭ב יִקַּ֣ח מִצְוֹ֑ת וֶאֱוִ֥יל שְׂ֝פָתַ֗יִם יִלָּבֵֽט׃
verses.englishText: The wise in heart will receive commandments; but a prating fool shall fall.

jps.text: The wise in heart will receive commandments; but a prating fool shall fall.

verses.hebrewText: הֹולֵ֣ךְ בַּ֭תֹּם יֵ֣לֶךְ בֶּ֑טַח וּמְעַקֵּ֥שׁ דְּ֝רָכָ֗יו יִוָּדֵֽעַ׃
verses.englishText: He that walketh uprightly walketh securely; but he that perverteth his ways shall be found out.

jps.text: He that walketh uprightly walketh securely; but he that perverteth his ways shall be found out.

verses.hebrewText: קֹ֣רֵֽץ עַ֭יִן יִתֵּ֣ן עַצָּ֑בֶת וֶאֱוִ֥יל שְׂ֝פָתַ֗יִם יִלָּבֵֽט׃
verses.englishText: He that winketh with the eye causeth sorrow; and a prating fool shall fall.

jps.text: He that winketh with the eye causeth sorrow; and a prating fool shall fall.

verses.hebrewText: מְקֹ֣ור חַ֭יִּים פִּ֣י צַדִּ֑יק וּפִ֥י רְ֝שָׁעִ֗ים יְכַסֶּ֥ה חָמָֽס׃
verses.englishText: The mouth of the righteous is a fountain of life; but the mouth of the wicked concealeth violence.

jps.text: The mouth of the righteous is a fountain of life; but the mouth of the wicked concealeth violence.

verses.hebrewText: שִׂ֭נְאָה תְּעֹורֵ֣ר מְדָנִ֑ים וְעַ֥ל כָּל־פְּ֝שָׁעִ֗ים תְּכַסֶּ֥ה אַהֲבָֽה׃
verses.englishText: Hatred stirreth up strifes; but love covereth all transgressions.

jps.text: Hatred stirreth up strifes; but love covereth all transgressions.

verses.hebrewText: בְּשִׂפְתֵ֣י נָ֭בֹון תִּמָּצֵ֣א חָכְמָ֑ה וְ֝שֵׁ֗בֶט לְגֵ֣ו חֲסַר־לֵֽב׃
verses.englishText: In the lips of him that hath discernment wisdom is found; but a rod is for the back of him that is void of understanding.

jps.text: In the lips of him that hath discernment wisdom is found; but a rod is for the back of him that is void of understanding.

verses.hebrewText: חֲכָמִ֥ים יִצְפְּנוּ־דָ֑עַת וּפִֽי־אֱ֝וִיל מְחִתָּ֥ה קְרֹבָֽה׃
verses.englishText: Wise men lay up knowledge; but the mouth of the foolish is an imminent ruin.

jps.text: Wise men lay up knowledge; but the mouth of the foolish is an imminent ruin.

verses.hebrewText: הֹ֣ון עָ֭שִׁיר קִרְיַ֣ת עֻזֹּ֑ו מְחִתַּ֖ת דַּלִּ֣ים רֵישָֽׁם׃
verses.englishText: The rich man's wealth is his strong city; the ruin of the poor is their poverty.

jps.text: The rich man's wealth is his strong city; the ruin of the poor is their poverty.

verses.hebrewText: פְּעֻלַּ֣ת צַדִּ֣יק לְחַיִּ֑ים תְּבוּאַ֖ת רָשָׁ֣ע לְחַטָּֽאת׃
verses.englishText: The wages of the righteous is life; the increase of the wicked is sin.

jps.text: The wages of the righteous is life; the increase of the wicked is sin.

verses.hebrewText: אֹ֣רַח לְ֭חַיִּים שֹׁומֵ֣ר מוּסָ֑ר וְעֹוזֵ֖ב תֹּוכַ֣חַת מַתְעֶֽה׃
verses.englishText: He is in the way of life that heedeth instruction; but he that forsaketh reproof erreth.

jps.text: He is in the way of life that heedeth instruction; but he that forsaketh reproof erreth.

verses.hebrewText: מְכַסֶּ֣ה שִׂ֭נְאָה שִׂפְתֵי־שָׁ֑קֶר וּמֹוצִ֥א דִ֝בָּ֗ה ה֣וּא כְסִֽיל׃
verses.englishText: He that hideth hatred is of lying lips; and he that uttereth a slander is a fool.

jps.text: He that hideth hatred is of lying lips; and he that uttereth a slander is a fool.

verses.hebrewText: בְּרֹ֣ב דְּ֭בָרִים לֹ֣א יֶחְדַּל־פָּ֑שַׁע וְחֹשֵׂ֖ךְ שְׂפָתָ֣יו מַשְׂכִּֽיל׃
verses.englishText: In the multitude of words there wanteth not transgression; but he that refraineth his lips is wise.

jps.text: In the multitude of words there wanteth not transgression; but he that refraineth his lips is wise.

verses.hebrewText: כֶּ֣סֶף נִ֭בְחָר לְשֹׁ֣ון צַדִּ֑יק לֵ֖ב רְשָׁעִ֣ים כִּמְעָֽט׃
verses.englishText: The tongue of the righteous is as choice silver; the heart of the wicked is little worth.

jps.text: The tongue of the righteous is as choice silver; the heart of the wicked is little worth.

verses.hebrewText: שִׂפְתֵ֣י צַ֭דִּיק יִרְע֣וּ רַבִּ֑ים וֶֽ֝אֱוִילִ֗ים בַּחֲסַר־לֵ֥ב יָמֽוּתוּ׃
verses.englishText: The lips of the righteous feed many; but the foolish die for want of understanding.

jps.text: The lips of the righteous feed many; but the foolish die for want of understanding.

verses.hebrewText: בִּרְכַּ֣ת יְ֭הוָה הִ֣יא תַעֲשִׁ֑יר וְלֹֽא־יֹוסִ֖ף עֶ֣צֶב עִמָּֽהּ׃
verses.englishText: The blessing of the LORD, it maketh rich, and toil addeth nothing thereto.

jps.text: The blessing of the LORD, it maketh rich, and toil addeth nothing thereto.

verses.hebrewText: כִּשְׂחֹ֣וק לִ֭כְסִיל עֲשֹׂ֣ות זִמָּ֑ה וְ֝חָכְמָ֗ה לְאִ֣ישׁ תְּבוּנָֽה׃
verses.englishText: It is as sport to a fool to do wickedness, and so is wisdom to a man of discernment.

jps.text: It is as sport to a fool to do wickedness, and so is wisdom to a man of discernment.

verses.hebrewText: מְגֹורַ֣ת רָ֭שָׁע הִ֣יא תְבֹואֶ֑נּוּ וְתַאֲוַ֖ת צַדִּיקִ֣ים יִתֵּֽן׃
verses.englishText: The fear of the wicked, it shall come upon him; and the desire of the righteous shall be granted.

jps.text: The fear of the wicked, it shall come upon him; and the desire of the righteous shall be granted.
