verses.hebrewText: כַּעֲבֹ֣ור ס֭וּפָה וְאֵ֣ין רָשָׁ֑ע וְ֝צַדִּ֗יק יְסֹ֣וד עֹולָֽם׃
verses.englishText: When the whirlwind passeth, the wicked is no more; but the righteous is an everlasting foundation.

jps.text: When the whirlwind passeth, the wicked is no more; but the righteous is an everlasting foundation.

verses.hebrewText: כַּחֹ֤מֶץ ׀ לַשִּׁנַּ֗יִם וְכֶעָשָׁ֥ן לָעֵינָ֑יִם כֵּ֥ן הֶ֝עָצֵ֗ל לְשֹׁלְחָֽיו׃
verses.englishText: As vinegar to the teeth, and as smoke to the eyes, so is the sluggard to them that send him.

jps.text: As vinegar to the teeth, and as smoke to the eyes, so is the sluggard to them that send him.

verses.hebrewText: יִרְאַ֣ת יְ֭הוָה תֹּוסִ֣יף יָמִ֑ים וּשְׁנֹ֖ות רְשָׁעִ֣ים תִּקְצֹֽרְנָה׃
verses.englishText: The fear of the LORD prolongeth days; but the years of the wicked shall be shortened.

jps.text: The fear of the LORD prolongeth days; but the years of the wicked shall be shortened.

verses.hebrewText: תֹּוחֶ֣לֶת צַדִּיקִ֣ים שִׂמְחָ֑ה וְתִקְוַ֖ת רְשָׁעִ֣ים תֹּאבֵֽד׃
verses.englishText: The hope of the righteous is gladness; but the expectation of the wicked shall perish.

jps.text: The hope of the righteous is gladness; but the expectation of the wicked shall perish.

verses.hebrewText: מָעֹ֣וז לַ֭תֹּם דֶּ֣רֶךְ יְהוָ֑ה וּ֝מְחִתָּ֗ה לְפֹ֣עֲלֵי אָֽוֶן׃
verses.englishText: The way of the LORD is a stronghold to the upright, but ruin to the workers of iniquity.

jps.text: The way of the LORD is a stronghold to the upright, but ruin to the workers of iniquity.

verses.hebrewText: צַדִּ֣יק לְעֹולָ֣ם בַּל־יִמֹּ֑וט וּ֝רְשָׁעִ֗ים לֹ֣א יִשְׁכְּנוּ־אָֽרֶץ׃
verses.englishText: The righteous shall never be moved; but the wicked shall not inhabit the land.

jps.text: The righteous shall never be moved; but the wicked shall not inhabit the land.

verses.hebrewText: פִּֽי־צַ֭דִּיק יָנ֣וּב חָכְמָ֑ה וּלְשֹׁ֥ון תַּ֝הְפֻּכֹ֗ות תִּכָּרֵֽת׃
verses.englishText: The mouth of the righteous buddeth with wisdom; but the froward tongue shall be cut off.

jps.text: The mouth of the righteous buddeth with wisdom; but the froward tongue shall be cut off.

verses.hebrewText: שִׂפְתֵ֣י צַ֭דִּיק יֵדְע֣וּן רָצֹ֑ון וּפִ֥י רְ֝שָׁעִ֗ים תַּהְפֻּכֹֽות׃
verses.englishText: The lips of the righteous know what is acceptable; but the mouth of the wicked is all frowardness.

jps.text: The lips of the righteous know what is acceptable; but the mouth of the wicked is all frowardness.

verses.hebrewText: מֹאזְנֵ֣י מִ֭רְמָה תֹּועֲבַ֣ת יְהוָ֑ה וְאֶ֖בֶן שְׁלֵמָ֣ה רְצֹונֹֽו׃
verses.englishText: A false balance is an abomination to the LORD; but a perfect weight is His delight.

jps.text: A false balance is an abomination to the LORD; but a perfect weight is His delight.

verses.hebrewText: בָּֽא־זָ֭דֹון וַיָּבֹ֣א קָלֹ֑ון וְֽאֶת־צְנוּעִ֥ים חָכְמָֽה׃
verses.englishText: When pride cometh, then cometh shame; but with the lowly is wisdom.

jps.text: When pride cometh, then cometh shame; but with the lowly is wisdom.

verses.hebrewText: תֻּמַּ֣ת יְשָׁרִ֣ים תַּנְחֵ֑ם וְסֶ֖לֶף בֹּוגְדִ֣ים *וְשַׁדָּם (יְשָׁדֵּֽם)׃
verses.englishText: The integrity of the upright shall guide them; but the perverseness of the faithless shall destroy them.

jps.text: The integrity of the upright shall guide them; but the perverseness of the faithless shall destroy them.

verses.hebrewText: לֹא־יֹועִ֣יל הֹ֭ון בְּיֹ֣ום עֶבְרָ֑ה וּ֝צְדָקָ֗ה תַּצִּ֥יל מִמָּֽוֶת׃
verses.englishText: Riches profit not in the day of wrath; but righteousness delivereth from death.

jps.text: Riches profit not in the day of wrath; but righteousness delivereth from death.

verses.hebrewText: צִדְקַ֣ת תָּ֭מִים תְּיַשֵּׁ֣ר דַּרְכֹּ֑ו וּ֝בְרִשְׁעָתֹ֗ו יִפֹּ֥ל רָשָֽׁע׃
verses.englishText: The righteousness of the sincere shall make straight his way; but the wicked shall fall by his own wickedness.

jps.text: The righteousness of the sincere shall make straight his way; but the wicked shall fall by his own wickedness.

verses.hebrewText: צִדְקַ֣ת יְ֭שָׁרִים תַּצִּילֵ֑ם וּ֝בְהַוַּ֗ת בֹּגְדִ֥ים יִלָּכֵֽדוּ׃
verses.englishText: The righteousness of the upright shall deliver them; but the faithless shall be trapped in their own crafty device.

jps.text: The righteousness of the upright shall deliver them; but the faithless shall be trapped in their own crafty device.

verses.hebrewText: בְּמֹ֤ות אָדָ֣ם רָ֭שָׁע תֹּאבַ֣ד תִּקְוָ֑ה וְתֹוחֶ֖לֶת אֹונִ֣ים אָבָֽדָה׃
verses.englishText: When a wicked man dieth, his expectation shall perish, and the hope of strength perisheth.

jps.text: When a wicked man dieth, his expectation shall perish, and the hope of strength perisheth.

verses.hebrewText: צַ֭דִּיק מִצָּרָ֣ה נֶחֱלָ֑ץ וַיָּבֹ֖א רָשָׁ֣ע תַּחְתָּֽיו׃
verses.englishText: The righteous is delivered out of trouble, and the wicked cometh in his stead.

jps.text: The righteous is delivered out of trouble, and the wicked cometh in his stead.

verses.hebrewText: בְּפֶ֗ה חָ֭נֵף יַשְׁחִ֣ת רֵעֵ֑הוּ וּ֝בְדַ֗עַת צַדִּיקִ֥ים יֵחָלֵֽצוּ׃
verses.englishText: With his mouth the impious man destroyeth his neighbour; but through knowledge shall the righteous be delivered.

jps.text: With his mouth the impious man destroyeth his neighbour; but through knowledge shall the righteous be delivered.

verses.hebrewText: בְּט֣וּב צַ֭דִּיקִים תַּעֲלֹ֣ץ קִרְיָ֑ה וּבַאֲבֹ֖ד רְשָׁעִ֣ים רִנָּֽה׃
verses.englishText: When it goeth well with the righteous, the city rejoiceth; and when the wicked perish, there is joy.

jps.text: When it goeth well with the righteous, the city rejoiceth; and when the wicked perish, there is joy.

verses.hebrewText: בְּבִרְכַּ֣ת יְ֭שָׁרִים תָּר֣וּם קָ֑רֶת וּבְפִ֥י רְ֝שָׁעִ֗ים תֵּהָרֵֽס׃
verses.englishText: By the blessing of the upright a city is exalted; but it is overthrown by the mouth of the wicked.

jps.text: By the blessing of the upright a city is exalted; but it is overthrown by the mouth of the wicked.

verses.hebrewText: בָּז־לְרֵעֵ֥הוּ חֲסַר־לֵ֑ב וְאִ֖ישׁ תְּבוּנֹ֣ות יַחֲרִֽישׁ׃
verses.englishText: He that despiseth his neighbour lacketh understanding; but a man of discernment holdeth his peace.

jps.text: He that despiseth his neighbour lacketh understanding; but a man of discernment holdeth his peace.

verses.hebrewText: הֹולֵ֣ךְ רָ֭כִיל מְגַלֶּה־סֹּ֑וד וְנֶאֱמַן־ר֝֗וּחַ מְכַסֶּ֥ה דָבָֽר׃
verses.englishText: He that goeth about as a talebearer revealeth secrets; but he that is of a faithful spirit concealeth a matter.

jps.text: He that goeth about as a talebearer revealeth secrets; but he that is of a faithful spirit concealeth a matter.

verses.hebrewText: בְּאֵ֣ין תַּ֭חְבֻּלֹות יִפָּל־עָ֑ם וּ֝תְשׁוּעָ֗ה בְּרֹ֣ב יֹועֵֽץ׃
verses.englishText: Where no wise direction is, a people falleth; but in the multitude of counsellors there is safety.

jps.text: Where no wise direction is, a people falleth; but in the multitude of counsellors there is safety.

verses.hebrewText: רַע־יֵ֭רֹועַ כִּי־עָ֣רַב זָ֑ר וְשֹׂנֵ֖א תֹקְעִ֣ים בֹּוטֵֽחַ׃
verses.englishText: He that is surety for a stranger shall smart for it; but he that hateth them that strike hands is secure.

jps.text: He that is surety for a stranger shall smart for it; but he that hateth them that strike hands is secure.

verses.hebrewText: אֵֽשֶׁת־חֵ֭ן תִּתְמֹ֣ךְ כָּבֹ֑וד וְ֝עָרִיצִ֗ים יִתְמְכוּ־עֹֽשֶׁר׃
verses.englishText: A gracious woman obtaineth honour; and strong men obtain riches.

jps.text: A gracious woman obtaineth honour; and strong men obtain riches.

verses.hebrewText: גֹּמֵ֣ל נַ֭פְשֹׁו אִ֣ישׁ חָ֑סֶד וְעֹכֵ֥ר שְׁ֝אֵרֹ֗ו אַכְזָרִֽי׃
verses.englishText: The merciful man doeth good to his own soul; but he that is cruel troubleth his own flesh.

jps.text: The merciful man doeth good to his own soul; but he that is cruel troubleth his own flesh.

verses.hebrewText: רָשָׁ֗ע עֹשֶׂ֥ה פְעֻלַּת־שָׁ֑קֶר וְזֹרֵ֥עַ צְ֝דָקָ֗ה שֶׂ֣כֶר אֱמֶֽת׃
verses.englishText: The wicked earneth deceitful wages; but he that soweth righteousness hath a sure reward.

jps.text: The wicked earneth deceitful wages; but he that soweth righteousness hath a sure reward.

verses.hebrewText: כֵּן־צְדָקָ֥ה לְחַיִּ֑ים וּמְרַדֵּ֖ף רָעָ֣ה לְמֹותֹֽו׃
verses.englishText: Stedfast righteousness tendeth to life; but he that pursueth evil pursueth it to his own death.

jps.text: Stedfast righteousness tendeth to life; but he that pursueth evil pursueth it to his own death.

verses.hebrewText: תֹּועֲבַ֣ת יְ֭הוָה עִקְּשֵׁי־לֵ֑ב וּ֝רְצֹונֹ֗ו תְּמִ֣ימֵי דָֽרֶךְ׃
verses.englishText: They that are perverse in heart are an abomination to the LORD; but such as are upright in their way are His delight.

jps.text: They that are perverse in heart are an abomination to the LORD; but such as are upright in their way are His delight.

verses.hebrewText: יָ֣ד לְ֭יָד לֹא־יִנָּ֣קֶה רָּ֑ע וְזֶ֖רַע צַדִּיקִ֣ים נִמְלָֽט׃
verses.englishText: My hand upon it! the evil man shall not be unpunished; but the seed of the righteous shall escape.

jps.text: My hand upon it! the evil man shall not be unpunished; but the seed of the righteous shall escape.

verses.hebrewText: נֶ֣זֶם זָ֭הָב בְּאַ֣ף חֲזִ֑יר אִשָּׁ֥ה יָ֝פָ֗ה וְסָ֣רַת טָֽעַם׃
verses.englishText: As a ring of gold in a swine's snout, so is a fair woman that turneth aside from discretion.

jps.text: As a ring of gold in a swine's snout, so is a fair woman that turneth aside from discretion.

verses.hebrewText: תַּאֲוַ֣ת צַדִּיקִ֣ים אַךְ־טֹ֑וב תִּקְוַ֖ת רְשָׁעִ֣ים עֶבְרָֽה׃
verses.englishText: The desire of the righteous is only good; but the expectation of the wicked is wrath.

jps.text: The desire of the righteous is only good; but the expectation of the wicked is wrath.

verses.hebrewText: יֵ֣שׁ מְ֭פַזֵּר וְנֹוסָ֥ף עֹ֑וד וְחֹושֵׂ֥ךְ מִ֝יֹּ֗שֶׁר אַךְ־לְמַחְסֹֽור׃
verses.englishText: There is that scattereth, and yet increaseth; and there is that withholdeth more than is meet, but it tendeth only to want.

jps.text: There is that scattereth, and yet increaseth; and there is that withholdeth more than is meet, but it tendeth only to want.

verses.hebrewText: נֶֽפֶשׁ־בְּרָכָ֥ה תְדֻשָּׁ֑ן וּ֝מַרְוֶ֗ה גַּם־ה֥וּא יֹורֶֽא׃
verses.englishText: The beneficent soul shall be made rich, and he that satisfieth abundantly shall be satisfied also himself.

jps.text: The beneficent soul shall be made rich, and he that satisfieth abundantly shall be satisfied also himself.

verses.hebrewText: מֹ֣נֵֽעַ בָּ֭ר יִקְּבֻ֣הוּ לְאֹ֑ום וּ֝בְרָכָ֗ה לְרֹ֣אשׁ מַשְׁבִּֽיר׃
verses.englishText: He that withholdeth corn, the people shall curse him; but blessing shall be upon the head of him that selleth it.

jps.text: He that withholdeth corn, the people shall curse him; but blessing shall be upon the head of him that selleth it.

verses.hebrewText: שֹׁ֣חֵֽר טֹ֭וב יְבַקֵּ֣שׁ רָצֹ֑ון וְדֹרֵ֖שׁ רָעָ֣ה תְבֹואֶֽנּוּ׃
verses.englishText: He that diligently seeketh good seeketh favour; but he that searcheth for evil, it shall come unto him.

jps.text: He that diligently seeketh good seeketh favour; but he that searcheth for evil, it shall come unto him.

verses.hebrewText: בֹּוטֵ֣חַ בְּ֭עָשְׁרֹו ה֣וּא יִפֹּ֑ל וְ֝כֶעָלֶ֗ה צַדִּיקִ֥ים יִפְרָֽחוּ׃
verses.englishText: He that trusteth in his riches shall fall; but the righteous shall flourish as foliage.

jps.text: He that trusteth in his riches shall fall; but the righteous shall flourish as foliage.

verses.hebrewText: עֹוכֵ֣ר בֵּ֭יתֹו יִנְחַל־ר֑וּחַ וְעֶ֥בֶד אֱ֝וִ֗יל לַחֲכַם־לֵֽב׃
verses.englishText: He that troubleth his own house shall inherit the wind; and the foolish shall be servant to the wise of heart.

jps.text: He that troubleth his own house shall inherit the wind; and the foolish shall be servant to the wise of heart.

verses.hebrewText: פְּֽרִי־צַ֭דִּיק עֵ֣ץ חַיִּ֑ים וְלֹקֵ֖חַ נְפָשֹׂ֣ות חָכָֽם׃
verses.englishText: The fruit of the righteous is a tree of life; and he that is wise winneth souls.

jps.text: The fruit of the righteous is a tree of life; and he that is wise winneth souls.

verses.hebrewText: הֵ֣ן צַ֭דִּיק בָּאָ֣רֶץ יְשֻׁלָּ֑ם אַ֝֗ף כִּֽי־רָשָׁ֥ע וְחֹוטֵֽא׃
verses.englishText: Behold, the righteous shall be requited in the earth; how much more the wicked and the sinner!

jps.text: Behold, the righteous shall be requited in the earth; how much more the wicked and the sinner!

verses.hebrewText: אֹהֵ֣ב מ֖וּסָר אֹ֣הֵֽב דָּ֑עַת וְשֹׂנֵ֖א תֹוכַ֣חַת בָּֽעַר׃
verses.englishText: Whoso loveth knowledge loveth correction; but he that is brutish hateth reproof.

jps.text: Whoso loveth knowledge loveth correction; but he that is brutish hateth reproof.

verses.hebrewText: טֹ֗וב יָפִ֣יק רָ֭צֹון מֵיְהוָ֑ה וְאִ֖ישׁ מְזִמֹּ֣ות יַרְשִֽׁיעַ׃
verses.englishText: A good man shall obtain favour of the LORD; but a man of wicked devices will He condemn.

jps.text: A good man shall obtain favour of the LORD; but a man of wicked devices will He condemn.

verses.hebrewText: לֹא־יִכֹּ֣ון אָדָ֣ם בְּרֶ֑שַׁע וְשֹׁ֥רֶשׁ צַ֝דִּיקִ֗ים בַּל־יִמֹּֽוט׃
verses.englishText: A man shall not be established by wickedness; but the root of the righteous shall never be moved.

jps.text: A man shall not be established by wickedness; but the root of the righteous shall never be moved.

verses.hebrewText: אֵֽשֶׁת־חַ֭יִל עֲטֶ֣רֶת בַּעְלָ֑הּ וּכְרָקָ֖ב בְּעַצְמֹותָ֣יו מְבִישָֽׁה׃
verses.englishText: A virtuous woman is a crown to her husband; but she that doeth shamefully is as rottenness in his bones.

jps.text: A virtuous woman is a crown to her husband; but she that doeth shamefully is as rottenness in his bones.

verses.hebrewText: מַחְשְׁבֹ֣ות צַדִּיקִ֣ים מִשְׁפָּ֑ט תַּחְבֻּלֹ֖ות רְשָׁעִ֣ים מִרְמָֽה׃
verses.englishText: The thoughts of the righteous are right; but the counsels of the wicked are deceit.

jps.text: The thoughts of the righteous are right; but the counsels of the wicked are deceit.

verses.hebrewText: דִּבְרֵ֣י רְשָׁעִ֣ים אֱרָב־דָּ֑ם וּפִ֥י יְ֝שָׁרִ֗ים יַצִּילֵֽם׃
verses.englishText: The words of the wicked are to lie in wait for blood; but the mouth of the upright shall deliver them.

jps.text: The words of the wicked are to lie in wait for blood; but the mouth of the upright shall deliver them.

verses.hebrewText: הָפֹ֣וךְ רְשָׁעִ֣ים וְאֵינָ֑ם וּבֵ֖ית צַדִּיקִ֣ים יַעֲמֹֽד׃
verses.englishText: The wicked are overthrown, and are not; but the house of the righteous shall stand.

jps.text: The wicked are overthrown, and are not; but the house of the righteous shall stand.

verses.hebrewText: לְֽפִי־שִׂ֭כְלֹו יְהֻלַּל־אִ֑ישׁ וְנַעֲוֵה־לֵ֝֗ב יִהְיֶ֥ה לָבֽוּז׃
verses.englishText: A man shall be commended according to his intelligence; but he that is of a distorted understanding shall be despised.

jps.text: A man shall be commended according to his intelligence; but he that is of a distorted understanding shall be despised.

verses.hebrewText: טֹ֣וב נִ֭קְלֶה וְעֶ֣בֶד לֹ֑ו מִ֝מְּתַכַּבֵּ֗ד וַחֲסַר־לָֽחֶם׃
verses.englishText: Better is he that is lightly esteemed, and hath a servant, than he that playeth the man of rank, and lacketh bread.

jps.text: Better is he that is lightly esteemed, and hath a servant, than he that playeth the man of rank, and lacketh bread.

verses.hebrewText: יֹודֵ֣עַ צַ֭דִּיק נֶ֣פֶשׁ בְּהֶמְתֹּ֑ו וְֽרַחֲמֵ֥י רְ֝שָׁעִ֗ים אַכְזָרִֽי׃
verses.englishText: A righteous man regardeth the life of his beast; but the tender mercies of the wicked are cruel.

jps.text: A righteous man regardeth the life of his beast; but the tender mercies of the wicked are cruel.

verses.hebrewText: עֹבֵ֣ד אַ֭דְמָתֹו יִֽשְׂבַּֽע־לָ֑חֶם וּמְרַדֵּ֖ף רֵיקִ֣ים חֲסַר־לֵֽב׃
verses.englishText: He that tilleth his ground shall have plenty of bread; but he that followeth after vain things is void of understanding.

jps.text: He that tilleth his ground shall have plenty of bread; but he that followeth after vain things is void of understanding.

verses.hebrewText: חָמַ֣ד רָ֭שָׁע מְצֹ֣וד רָעִ֑ים וְשֹׁ֖רֶשׁ צַדִּיקִ֣ים יִתֵּֽן׃
verses.englishText: The wicked desireth the prey of evil men; but the root of the righteous yieldeth fruit.

jps.text: The wicked desireth the prey of evil men; but the root of the righteous yieldeth fruit.

verses.hebrewText: בְּפֶ֣שַׁע שְׂ֭פָתַיִם מֹוקֵ֣שׁ רָ֑ע וַיֵּצֵ֖א מִצָּרָ֣ה צַדִּֽיק׃
verses.englishText: In the transgression of the lips is a snare to the evil man; but the righteous cometh out of trouble.

jps.text: In the transgression of the lips is a snare to the evil man; but the righteous cometh out of trouble.

verses.hebrewText: מִפְּרִ֣י פִי־אִ֭ישׁ יִשְׂבַּע־טֹ֑וב וּגְמ֥וּל יְדֵי־אָ֝דָ֗ם *יָשׁוּב (יָשִׁ֥יב) לֹֽו׃
verses.englishText: A man shall be satisfied with good by the fruit of his mouth, and the doings of a man's hands shall be rendered unto him.

jps.text: A man shall be satisfied with good by the fruit of his mouth, and the doings of a man's hands shall be rendered unto him.

verses.hebrewText: דֶּ֣רֶךְ אֱ֭וִיל יָשָׁ֣ר בְּעֵינָ֑יו וְשֹׁמֵ֖עַ לְעֵצָ֣ה חָכָֽם׃
verses.englishText: The way of a fool is straight in his own eyes; but he that is wise hearkeneth unto counsel.

jps.text: The way of a fool is straight in his own eyes; but he that is wise hearkeneth unto counsel.

verses.hebrewText: אֱוִ֗יל בַּ֭יֹּום יִוָּדַ֣ע כַּעְסֹ֑ו וְכֹסֶ֖ה קָלֹ֣ון עָרֽוּם׃
verses.englishText: A fool's vexation is presently known; but a prudent man concealeth shame.

jps.text: A fool's vexation is presently known; but a prudent man concealeth shame.

verses.hebrewText: יָפִ֣יחַ אֱ֭מוּנָה יַגִּ֣יד צֶ֑דֶק וְעֵ֖ד שְׁקָרִ֣ים מִרְמָֽה׃
verses.englishText: He that breatheth forth truth uttereth righteousness; but a false witness deceit.

jps.text: He that breatheth forth truth uttereth righteousness; but a false witness deceit.

verses.hebrewText: יֵ֣שׁ בֹּ֖וטֶה כְּמַדְקְרֹ֣ות חָ֑רֶב וּלְשֹׁ֖ון חֲכָמִ֣ים מַרְפֵּֽא׃
verses.englishText: There is that speaketh like the piercings of a sword; but the tongue of the wise is health.

jps.text: There is that speaketh like the piercings of a sword; but the tongue of the wise is health.

verses.hebrewText: שְֽׂפַת־אֱ֭מֶת תִּכֹּ֣ון לָעַ֑ד וְעַד־אַ֝רְגִּ֗יעָה לְשֹׁ֣ון שָֽׁקֶר׃
verses.englishText: The lip of truth shall be established for ever; but a lying tongue is but for a moment.

jps.text: The lip of truth shall be established for ever; but a lying tongue is but for a moment.

verses.hebrewText: מִ֭רְמָה בְּלֶב־חֹ֣רְשֵׁי רָ֑ע וּֽלְיֹעֲצֵ֖י שָׁלֹ֣ום שִׂמְחָֽה׃
verses.englishText: Deceit is in the heart of them that devise evil; but to the counsellors of peace is joy.

jps.text: Deceit is in the heart of them that devise evil; but to the counsellors of peace is joy.

verses.hebrewText: לֹא־יְאֻנֶּ֣ה לַצַּדִּ֣יק כָּל־אָ֑וֶן וּ֝רְשָׁעִ֗ים מָ֣לְאוּ רָֽע׃
verses.englishText: There shall no mischief befall the righteous; but the wicked are filled with evil.

jps.text: There shall no mischief befall the righteous; but the wicked are filled with evil.

verses.hebrewText: תֹּועֲבַ֣ת יְ֭הוָה שִׂפְתֵי־שָׁ֑קֶר וְעֹשֵׂ֖י אֱמוּנָ֣ה רְצֹונֹֽו׃
verses.englishText: Lying lips are an abomination to the LORD; but they that deal truly are His delight.

jps.text: Lying lips are an abomination to the LORD; but they that deal truly are His delight.

verses.hebrewText: אָדָ֣ם עָ֭רוּם כֹּ֣סֶה דָּ֑עַת וְלֵ֥ב כְּ֝סִילִ֗ים יִקְרָ֥א אִוֶּֽלֶת׃
verses.englishText: A prudent man concealeth knowledge; but the heart of fools proclaimeth foolishness.

jps.text: A prudent man concealeth knowledge; but the heart of fools proclaimeth foolishness.

verses.hebrewText: יַד־חָרוּצִ֥ים תִּמְשֹׁ֑ול וּ֝רְמִיָּ֗ה תִּהְיֶ֥ה לָמַֽס׃
verses.englishText: The hand of the diligent shall bear rule; but the slothful shall be under tribute.

jps.text: The hand of the diligent shall bear rule; but the slothful shall be under tribute.

verses.hebrewText: דְּאָגָ֣ה בְלֶב־אִ֣ישׁ יַשְׁחֶ֑נָּה וְדָבָ֖ר טֹ֣וב יְשַׂמְּחֶֽנָּה׃
verses.englishText: Care in the heart of a man boweth it down; but a good word maketh it glad.

jps.text: Care in the heart of a man boweth it down; but a good word maketh it glad.

verses.hebrewText: יָתֵ֣ר מֵרֵעֵ֣הוּ צַדִּ֑יק וְדֶ֖רֶךְ רְשָׁעִ֣ים תַּתְעֵֽם׃
verses.englishText: The righteous is guided by his friend; but the way of the wicked leadeth them astray.

jps.text: The righteous is guided by his friend; but the way of the wicked leadeth them astray.

verses.hebrewText: לֹא־יַחֲרֹ֣ךְ רְמִיָּ֣ה צֵידֹ֑ו וְהֹון־אָדָ֖ם יָקָ֣ר חָרֽוּץ׃
verses.englishText: The slothful man shall not hunt his prey; but the precious substance of men is to be diligent.

jps.text: The slothful man shall not hunt his prey; but the precious substance of men is to be diligent.

verses.hebrewText: בְּאֹֽרַח־צְדָקָ֥ה חַיִּ֑ים וְדֶ֖רֶךְ נְתִיבָ֣ה אַל־מָֽוֶת׃
verses.englishText: In the way of righteousness is life, and in the pathway thereof there is no death.

jps.text: In the way of righteousness is life, and in the pathway thereof there is no death.

verses.hebrewText: בֵּ֣ן חָ֭כָם מ֣וּסַר אָ֑ב וְ֝לֵ֗ץ לֹא־שָׁמַ֥ע גְּעָרָֽה׃
verses.englishText: A wise son is instructed of his father; but a scorner heareth not rebuke.

jps.text: A wise son is instructed of his father; but a scorner heareth not rebuke.

verses.hebrewText: מִפְּרִ֣י פִי־אִ֭ישׁ יֹ֣אכַל טֹ֑וב וְנֶ֖פֶשׁ בֹּגְדִ֣ים חָמָֽס׃
verses.englishText: A man shall eat good from the fruit of his mouth; but the desire of the faithless is violence.

jps.text: A man shall eat good from the fruit of his mouth; but the desire of the faithless is violence.

verses.hebrewText: נֹצֵ֣ר פִּ֭יו שֹׁמֵ֣ר נַפְשֹׁ֑ו פֹּשֵׂ֥ק שְׂ֝פָתָ֗יו מְחִתָּה־לֹֽו׃
verses.englishText: He that guardeth his mouth keepeth his life; but for him that openeth wide his lips there shall be ruin.

jps.text: He that guardeth his mouth keepeth his life; but for him that openeth wide his lips there shall be ruin.

verses.hebrewText: מִתְאַוָּ֣ה וָ֭אַיִן נַפְשֹׁ֣ו עָצֵ֑ל וְנֶ֖פֶשׁ חָרֻצִ֣ים תְּדֻשָּֽׁן׃
verses.englishText: The soul of the sluggard desireth, and hath nothing; but the soul of the diligent shall be abundantly gratified.

jps.text: The soul of the sluggard desireth, and hath nothing; but the soul of the diligent shall be abundantly gratified.

verses.hebrewText: דְּבַר־שֶׁ֭קֶר יִשְׂנָ֣א צַדִּ֑יק וְ֝רָשָׁ֗ע יַבְאִ֥ישׁ וְיַחְפִּֽיר׃
verses.englishText: A righteous man hateth lying; but a wicked man behaveth vilely and shamefully.

jps.text: A righteous man hateth lying; but a wicked man behaveth vilely and shamefully.

verses.hebrewText: צְ֭דָקָה תִּצֹּ֣ר תָּם־דָּ֑רֶךְ וְ֝רִשְׁעָ֗ה תְּסַלֵּ֥ף חַטָּֽאת׃
verses.englishText: Righteousness guardeth him that is upright in the way; but wickedness overthroweth the sinner.

jps.text: Righteousness guardeth him that is upright in the way; but wickedness overthroweth the sinner.

verses.hebrewText: יֵ֣שׁ מִ֭תְעַשֵּׁר וְאֵ֣ין כֹּ֑ל מִ֝תְרֹושֵׁ֗שׁ וְהֹ֣ון רָֽב׃
verses.englishText: There is that pretendeth himself rich, yet hath nothing; there is that pretendeth himself poor, yet hath great wealth.

jps.text: There is that pretendeth himself rich, yet hath nothing; there is that pretendeth himself poor, yet hath great wealth.

verses.hebrewText: כֹּ֣פֶר נֶֽפֶשׁ־אִ֣ישׁ עָשְׁרֹ֑ו וְ֝רָ֗שׁ לֹא־שָׁמַ֥ע גְּעָרָֽה׃
verses.englishText: The ransom of a man's life are his riches; but the poor heareth no threatening.

jps.text: The ransom of a man's life are his riches; but the poor heareth no threatening.

verses.hebrewText: אֹור־צַדִּיקִ֥ים יִשְׂמָ֑ח וְנֵ֖ר רְשָׁעִ֣ים יִדְעָֽךְ׃
verses.englishText: The light of the righteous rejoiceth; but the lamp of the wicked shall be put out.

jps.text: The light of the righteous rejoiceth; but the lamp of the wicked shall be put out.

verses.hebrewText: רַק־בְּ֭זָדֹון יִתֵּ֣ן מַצָּ֑ה וְאֶת־נֹ֖ועָצִ֣ים חָכְמָֽה׃
verses.englishText: By pride cometh only contention; but with the well-advised is wisdom.

jps.text: By pride cometh only contention; but with the well-advised is wisdom.

verses.hebrewText: הֹ֭ון מֵהֶ֣בֶל יִמְעָ֑ט וְקֹבֵ֖ץ עַל־יָ֣ד יַרְבֶּֽה׃
verses.englishText: Wealth gotten by vanity shall be diminished; but he that gathereth little by little shall increase.

jps.text: Wealth gotten by vanity shall be diminished; but he that gathereth little by little shall increase.

verses.hebrewText: תֹּוחֶ֣לֶת מְ֭מֻשָּׁכָה מַחֲלָה־לֵ֑ב וְעֵ֥ץ חַ֝יִּ֗ים תַּאֲוָ֥ה בָאָֽה׃
verses.englishText: Hope deferred maketh the heart sick; but desire fulfilled is a tree of life.

jps.text: Hope deferred maketh the heart sick; but desire fulfilled is a tree of life.

verses.hebrewText: בָּ֣ז לְ֭דָבָר יֵחָ֣בֶל לֹ֑ו וִירֵ֥א מִ֝צְוָ֗ה ה֣וּא יְשֻׁלָּֽם׃
verses.englishText: Whoso despiseth the word shall suffer thereby; but he that feareth the commandment shall be rewarded.

jps.text: Whoso despiseth the word shall suffer thereby; but he that feareth the commandment shall be rewarded.

verses.hebrewText: תֹּורַ֣ת חָ֭כָם מְקֹ֣ור חַיִּ֑ים לָ֝ס֗וּר מִמֹּ֥קְשֵׁי מָֽוֶת׃
verses.englishText: The teaching of the wise is a fountain of life, to depart from the snares of death.

jps.text: The teaching of the wise is a fountain of life, to depart from the snares of death.

verses.hebrewText: שֵֽׂכֶל־טֹ֭וב יִתֶּן־חֵ֑ן וְדֶ֖רֶךְ בֹּגְדִ֣ים אֵיתָֽן׃
verses.englishText: Good understanding giveth grace; but the way of the faithless is harsh.

jps.text: Good understanding giveth grace; but the way of the faithless is harsh.

verses.hebrewText: כָּל־עָ֭רוּם יַעֲשֶׂ֣ה בְדָ֑עַת וּ֝כְסִ֗יל יִפְרֹ֥שׂ אִוֶּֽלֶת׃
verses.englishText: Every prudent man dealeth with forethought; but a fool unfoldeth folly.

jps.text: Every prudent man dealeth with forethought; but a fool unfoldeth folly.

verses.hebrewText: מַלְאָ֣ךְ רָ֭שָׁע יִפֹּ֣ל בְּרָ֑ע וְצִ֖יר אֱמוּנִ֣ים מַרְפֵּֽא׃
verses.englishText: A wicked messenger falleth into evil; but a faithful ambassador is health.

jps.text: A wicked messenger falleth into evil; but a faithful ambassador is health.

verses.hebrewText: רֵ֣ישׁ וְ֭קָלֹון פֹּורֵ֣עַ מוּסָ֑ר וְשֹׁומֵ֖ר תֹּוכַ֣חַת יְכֻבָּֽד׃
verses.englishText: Poverty and shame shall be to him that refuseth instruction; but he that regardeth reproof shall be honoured.

jps.text: Poverty and shame shall be to him that refuseth instruction; but he that regardeth reproof shall be honoured.

verses.hebrewText: תַּאֲוָ֣ה נִ֭הְיָה תֶעֱרַ֣ב לְנָ֑פֶשׁ וְתֹועֲבַ֥ת כְּ֝סִילִ֗ים ס֣וּר מֵרָֽע׃
verses.englishText: The desire accomplished is sweet to the soul; and it is an abomination to fools to depart from evil.

jps.text: The desire accomplished is sweet to the soul; and it is an abomination to fools to depart from evil.

verses.hebrewText: *הָלֹוךְ (הֹולֵ֣ךְ) אֶת־חֲכָמִ֣ים *וַחֲכָם (יֶחְכָּ֑ם) וְרֹעֶ֖ה כְסִילִ֣ים יֵרֹֽועַ׃
verses.englishText: He that walketh with wise men shall be wise; but the companion of fools shall smart for it.

jps.text: He that walketh with wise men shall be wise; but the companion of fools shall smart for it.

verses.hebrewText: חַ֭טָּאִים תְּרַדֵּ֣ף רָעָ֑ה וְאֶת־צַ֝דִּיקִ֗ים יְשַׁלֶּם־טֹֽוב׃
verses.englishText: Evil pursueth sinners; but to the righteous good shall be repaid.

jps.text: Evil pursueth sinners; but to the righteous good shall be repaid.

verses.hebrewText: טֹ֗וב יַנְחִ֥יל בְּנֵֽי־בָנִ֑ים וְצָפ֥וּן לַ֝צַּדִּ֗יק חֵ֣יל חֹוטֵֽא׃
verses.englishText: A good man leaveth an inheritance to his children's children; and the wealth of the sinner is laid up for the righteous.

jps.text: A good man leaveth an inheritance to his children's children; and the wealth of the sinner is laid up for the righteous.

verses.hebrewText: רָב־אֹ֭כֶל נִ֣יר רָאשִׁ֑ים וְיֵ֥שׁ נִ֝סְפֶּ֗ה בְּלֹ֣א מִשְׁפָּֽט׃
verses.englishText: Much food is in the tillage of the poor; but there is that is swept away by want of righteousness.

jps.text: Much food is in the tillage of the poor; but there is that is swept away by want of righteousness.

verses.hebrewText: חֹושֵׂ֣ךְ שִׁ֭בְטֹו שֹׂונֵ֣א בְנֹ֑ו וְ֝אֹהֲבֹ֗ו שִֽׁחֲרֹ֥ו מוּסָֽר׃
verses.englishText: He that spareth his rod hateth his son; but he that loveth him chasteneth him betimes.

jps.text: He that spareth his rod hateth his son; but he that loveth him chasteneth him betimes.

verses.hebrewText: צַדִּ֗יק אֹ֭כֵל לְשֹׂ֣בַע נַפְשֹׁ֑ו וּבֶ֖טֶן רְשָׁעִ֣ים תֶּחְסָֽר׃ פ
verses.englishText: The righteous eateth to the satisfying of his desire; but the belly of the wicked shall want.

jps.text: The righteous eateth to the satisfying of his desire; but the belly of the wicked shall want.

verses.hebrewText: חַכְמֹ֣ות נָ֭שִׁים בָּנְתָ֣ה בֵיתָ֑הּ וְ֝אִוֶּ֗לֶת בְּיָדֶ֥יהָ תֶהֶרְסֶֽנּוּ׃
verses.englishText: Every wise woman buildeth her house; but the foolish plucketh it down with her hands.

jps.text: Every wise woman buildeth her house; but the foolish plucketh it down with her hands.

verses.hebrewText: הֹולֵ֣ךְ בְּ֭יָשְׁרֹו יְרֵ֣א יְהוָ֑ה וּנְלֹ֖וז דְּרָכָ֣יו בֹּוזֵֽהוּ׃
verses.englishText: He that walketh in his uprightness feareth the LORD; but he that is perverse in his ways despiseth Him.

jps.text: He that walketh in his uprightness feareth the LORD; but he that is perverse in his ways despiseth Him.

verses.hebrewText: בְּֽפִי־אֱ֭וִיל חֹ֣טֶר גַּאֲוָ֑ה וְשִׂפְתֵ֥י חֲ֝כָמִ֗ים תִּשְׁמוּרֵֽם׃
verses.englishText: In the mouth of the foolish is a rod of pride; but the lips of the wise shall preserve them.

jps.text: In the mouth of the foolish is a rod of pride; but the lips of the wise shall preserve them.

verses.hebrewText: בְּאֵ֣ין אֲ֭לָפִים אֵב֣וּס בָּ֑ר וְרָב־תְּ֝בוּאֹ֗ות בְּכֹ֣חַ שֹֽׁור׃
verses.englishText: Where no oxen are, the crib is clean; but much increase is by the strength of the ox.

jps.text: Where no oxen are, the crib is clean; but much increase is by the strength of the ox.

verses.hebrewText: עֵ֣ד אֱ֭מוּנִים לֹ֣א יְכַזֵּ֑ב וְיָפִ֥יחַ כְּ֝זָבִ֗ים עֵ֣ד שָֽׁקֶר׃
verses.englishText: A faithful witness will not lie; but a false witness breatheth forth lies.

jps.text: A faithful witness will not lie; but a false witness breatheth forth lies.

verses.hebrewText: בִּקֶּשׁ־לֵ֣ץ חָכְמָ֣ה וָאָ֑יִן וְדַ֖עַת לְנָבֹ֣ון נָקָֽל׃
verses.englishText: A scorner seeketh wisdom, and findeth it not; but knowledge is easy unto him that hath discernment.

jps.text: A scorner seeketh wisdom, and findeth it not; but knowledge is easy unto him that hath discernment.

verses.hebrewText: לֵ֣ךְ מִ֭נֶּגֶד לְאִ֣ישׁ כְּסִ֑יל וּבַל־יָ֝דַ֗עְתָּ שִׂפְתֵי־דָֽעַת׃
verses.englishText: Go from the presence of a foolish man, for thou wilt not perceive the lips of knowledge.

jps.text: Go from the presence of a foolish man, for thou wilt not perceive the lips of knowledge.

verses.hebrewText: חָכְמַ֣ת עָ֭רוּם הָבִ֣ין דַּרְכֹּ֑ו וְאִוֶּ֖לֶת כְּסִילִ֣ים מִרְמָֽה׃
verses.englishText: The wisdom of the prudent is to look well to his way; but the folly of fools is deceit.

jps.text: The wisdom of the prudent is to look well to his way; but the folly of fools is deceit.

verses.hebrewText: אֱ֭וִלִים יָלִ֣יץ אָשָׁ֑ם וּבֵ֖ין יְשָׁרִ֣ים רָצֹֽון׃
verses.englishText: Amends pleadeth for fools; but among the upright there is good will.

jps.text: Amends pleadeth for fools; but among the upright there is good will.

verses.hebrewText: לֵ֗ב יֹ֭ודֵעַ מָרַּ֣ת נַפְשֹׁ֑ו וּ֝בְשִׂמְחָתֹ֗ו לֹא־יִתְעָ֥רַב זָֽר׃
verses.englishText: The heart knoweth its own bitterness; and with its joy no stranger can intermeddle.

jps.text: The heart knoweth its own bitterness; and with its joy no stranger can intermeddle.

verses.hebrewText: בֵּ֣ית רְ֭שָׁעִים יִשָּׁמֵ֑ד וְאֹ֖הֶל יְשָׁרִ֣ים יַפְרִֽיחַ׃
verses.englishText: The house of the wicked shall be overthrown; but the tent of the upright shall flourish.

jps.text: The house of the wicked shall be overthrown; but the tent of the upright shall flourish.

verses.hebrewText: יֵ֤שׁ דֶּ֣רֶךְ יָ֭שָׁר לִפְנֵי־אִ֑ישׁ וְ֝אַחֲרִיתָ֗הּ דַּרְכֵי־מָֽוֶת׃
verses.englishText: There is a way which seemeth right unto a man, but the end thereof are the ways of death.

jps.text: There is a way which seemeth right unto a man, but the end thereof are the ways of death.

verses.hebrewText: גַּם־בִּשְׂחֹ֥וק יִכְאַב־לֵ֑ב וְאַחֲרִיתָ֖הּ שִׂמְחָ֣ה תוּגָֽה׃
verses.englishText: Even in laughter the heart acheth; and the end of mirth is heaviness.

jps.text: Even in laughter the heart acheth; and the end of mirth is heaviness.

verses.hebrewText: מִדְּרָכָ֣יו יִ֭שְׂבַּע ס֣וּג לֵ֑ב וּ֝מֵעָלָ֗יו אִ֣ישׁ טֹֽוב׃
verses.englishText: The dissembler in heart shall have his fill from his own ways; and a good man shall be satisfied from himself.

jps.text: The dissembler in heart shall have his fill from his own ways; and a good man shall be satisfied from himself.

verses.hebrewText: פֶּ֭תִי יַאֲמִ֣ין לְכָל־דָּבָ֑ר וְ֝עָר֗וּם יָבִ֥ין לַאֲשֻׁרֹֽו׃
verses.englishText: The thoughtless believeth every word; but the prudent man looketh well to his going.

jps.text: The thoughtless believeth every word; but the prudent man looketh well to his going.

verses.hebrewText: חָכָ֣ם יָ֭רֵא וְסָ֣ר מֵרָ֑ע וּ֝כְסִ֗יל מִתְעַבֵּ֥ר וּבֹוטֵֽחַ׃
verses.englishText: A wise man feareth, and departeth from evil; but the fool behaveth overbearingly, and is confident.

jps.text: A wise man feareth, and departeth from evil; but the fool behaveth overbearingly, and is confident.

verses.hebrewText: קְֽצַר־אַ֭פַּיִם יַעֲשֶׂ֣ה אִוֶּ֑לֶת וְאִ֥ישׁ מְ֝זִמֹּ֗ות יִשָּׂנֵֽא׃
verses.englishText: He that is soon angry dealeth foolishly; and a man of wicked devices is hated.

jps.text: He that is soon angry dealeth foolishly; and a man of wicked devices is hated.

verses.hebrewText: נָחֲל֣וּ פְתָאיִ֣ם אִוֶּ֑לֶת וַֽ֝עֲרוּמִ֗ים יַכְתִּ֥רוּ דָֽעַת׃
verses.englishText: The thoughtless come into possession of folly; but the prudent are crowned with knowledge.

jps.text: The thoughtless come into possession of folly; but the prudent are crowned with knowledge.

verses.hebrewText: שַׁח֣וּ רָ֭עִים לִפְנֵ֣י טֹובִ֑ים וּ֝רְשָׁעִ֗ים עַֽל־שַׁעֲרֵ֥י צַדִּֽיק׃
verses.englishText: The evil bow before the good, and the wicked at the gates of the righteous.

jps.text: The evil bow before the good, and the wicked at the gates of the righteous.

verses.hebrewText: גַּם־לְ֭רֵעֵהוּ יִשָּׂ֣נֵא רָ֑שׁ וְאֹהֲבֵ֖י עָשִׁ֣יר רַבִּֽים׃
verses.englishText: The poor is hated even of his own neighbour; but the rich hath many friends.

jps.text: The poor is hated even of his own neighbour; but the rich hath many friends.

verses.hebrewText: בָּז־לְרֵעֵ֥הוּ חֹוטֵ֑א וּמְחֹונֵ֖ן *עֲנָיִים (עֲנָוִ֣ים) אַשְׁרָֽיו׃
verses.englishText: He that despiseth his neighbour sinneth; but he that is gracious unto the humble, happy is he.

jps.text: He that despiseth his neighbour sinneth; but he that is gracious unto the humble, happy is he.

verses.hebrewText: הֲ‍ֽלֹוא־יִ֭תְעוּ חֹ֣רְשֵׁי רָ֑ע וְחֶ֥סֶד וֶ֝אֱמֶ֗ת חֹ֣רְשֵׁי טֹֽוב׃
verses.englishText: Shall they not go astray that devise evil? But mercy and truth shall be for them that devise good.

jps.text: Shall they not go astray that devise evil? But mercy and truth shall be for them that devise good.

verses.hebrewText: בְּכָל־עֶ֭צֶב יִהְיֶ֣ה מֹותָ֑ר וּדְבַר־שְׂ֝פָתַ֗יִם אַךְ־לְמַחְסֹֽור׃
verses.englishText: In all labour there is profit; but the talk of the lips tendeth only to penury.

jps.text: In all labour there is profit; but the talk of the lips tendeth only to penury.

verses.hebrewText: עֲטֶ֣רֶת חֲכָמִ֣ים עָשְׁרָ֑ם אִוֶּ֖לֶת כְּסִילִ֣ים אִוֶּֽלֶת׃
verses.englishText: The crown of the wise is their riches; but the folly of fools remaineth folly.

jps.text: The crown of the wise is their riches; but the folly of fools remaineth folly.

verses.hebrewText: מַצִּ֣יל נְ֭פָשֹׁות עֵ֣ד אֱמֶ֑ת וְיָפִ֖חַ כְּזָבִ֣ים מִרְמָֽה׃
verses.englishText: A true witness delivereth souls; but he that breatheth forth lies is all deceit.

jps.text: A true witness delivereth souls; but he that breatheth forth lies is all deceit.

verses.hebrewText: בְּיִרְאַ֣ת יְ֭הוָה מִבְטַח־עֹ֑ז וּ֝לְבָנָ֗יו יִהְיֶ֥ה מַחְסֶֽה׃
verses.englishText: In the fear of the LORD a man hath strong confidence; and his children shall have a place of refuge.

jps.text: In the fear of the LORD a man hath strong confidence; and his children shall have a place of refuge.

verses.hebrewText: יִרְאַ֣ת יְ֭הוָה מְקֹ֣ור חַיִּ֑ים לָ֝ס֗וּר מִמֹּ֥קְשֵׁי מָֽוֶת׃
verses.englishText: The fear of the LORD is a fountain of life, to depart from the snares of death.

jps.text: The fear of the LORD is a fountain of life, to depart from the snares of death.

verses.hebrewText: בְּרָב־עָ֥ם הַדְרַת־מֶ֑לֶךְ וּבְאֶ֥פֶס לְ֝אֹ֗ם מְחִתַּ֥ת רָזֹֽון׃
verses.englishText: In the multitude of people is the king's glory; but in the want of people is the ruin of the prince.

jps.text: In the multitude of people is the king's glory; but in the want of people is the ruin of the prince.

verses.hebrewText: אֶ֣רֶךְ אַ֭פַּיִם רַב־תְּבוּנָ֑ה וּקְצַר־ר֝֗וּחַ מֵרִ֥ים אִוֶּֽלֶת׃
verses.englishText: He that is slow to anger is of great understanding; but he that is hasty of spirit exalteth folly.

jps.text: He that is slow to anger is of great understanding; but he that is hasty of spirit exalteth folly.

verses.hebrewText: חַיֵּ֣י בְ֭שָׂרִים לֵ֣ב מַרְפֵּ֑א וּרְקַ֖ב עֲצָמֹ֣ות קִנְאָֽה׃
verses.englishText: A tranquil heart is the life of the flesh; but envy is the rottenness of the bones.

jps.text: A tranquil heart is the life of the flesh; but envy is the rottenness of the bones.

verses.hebrewText: עֹ֣שֵֽׁק־דָּ֭ל חֵרֵ֣ף עֹשֵׂ֑הוּ וּ֝מְכַבְּדֹ֗ו חֹנֵ֥ן אֶבְיֹֽון׃
verses.englishText: He that oppresseth the poor blasphemeth his Maker; but he that is gracious unto the needy honoureth Him.

jps.text: He that oppresseth the poor blasphemeth his Maker; but he that is gracious unto the needy honoureth Him.

verses.hebrewText: בְּֽ֭רָעָתֹו יִדָּחֶ֣ה רָשָׁ֑ע וְחֹסֶ֖ה בְמֹותֹ֣ו צַדּֽ͏ִיק׃
verses.englishText: The wicked is thrust down in his misfortune; but the righteous, even when he is brought to death, hath hope.

jps.text: The wicked is thrust down in his misfortune; but the righteous, even when he is brought to death, hath hope.

verses.hebrewText: בְּלֵ֣ב נָ֭בֹון תָּנ֣וּחַ חָכְמָ֑ה וּבְקֶ֥רֶב כְּ֝סִילִ֗ים תִּוָּדֵֽעַ׃
verses.englishText: In the heart of him that hath discernment wisdom resteth; but in the inward part of fools it maketh itself known.

jps.text: In the heart of him that hath discernment wisdom resteth; but in the inward part of fools it maketh itself known.

verses.hebrewText: צְדָקָ֥ה תְרֹֽומֵֽם־גֹּ֑וי וְחֶ֖סֶד לְאֻמִּ֣ים חַטָּֽאת׃
verses.englishText: Righteousness exalteth a nation; but sin is a reproach to any people.

jps.text: Righteousness exalteth a nation; but sin is a reproach to any people.

verses.hebrewText: רְֽצֹון־מֶ֭לֶךְ לְעֶ֣בֶד מַשְׂכִּ֑יל וְ֝עֶבְרָתֹ֗ו תִּהְיֶ֥ה מֵבִֽישׁ׃
verses.englishText: The king's favour is toward a servant that dealeth wisely; but his wrath striketh him that dealeth shamefully.

jps.text: The king's favour is toward a servant that dealeth wisely; but his wrath striketh him that dealeth shamefully.

verses.hebrewText: מַֽעֲנֶה־רַּ֭ךְ יָשִׁ֣יב חֵמָ֑ה וּדְבַר־עֶ֝֗צֶב יַעֲלֶה־אָֽף׃
verses.englishText: A soft answer turneth away wrath; but a grievous word stirreth up anger.

jps.text: A soft answer turneth away wrath; but a grievous word stirreth up anger.

verses.hebrewText: לְשֹׁ֣ון חֲ֭כָמִים תֵּיטִ֣יב דָּ֑עַת וּפִ֥י כְ֝סִילִ֗ים יַבִּ֥יעַ אִוֶּֽלֶת׃
verses.englishText: The tongue of the wise useth knowledge aright; but the mouth of fools poureth out foolishness.

jps.text: The tongue of the wise useth knowledge aright; but the mouth of fools poureth out foolishness.

verses.hebrewText: בְּֽכָל־מָ֭קֹום עֵינֵ֣י יְהוָ֑ה צֹ֝פֹ֗ות רָעִ֥ים וטֹובִֽים׃
verses.englishText: The eyes of the LORD are in every place, keeping watch upon the evil and the good.

jps.text: The eyes of the LORD are in every place, keeping watch upon the evil and the good.

verses.hebrewText: מַרְפֵּ֣א לָ֭שֹׁון עֵ֣ץ חַיִּ֑ים וְסֶ֥לֶף בָּ֝֗הּ שֶׁ֣בֶר בְּרֽוּחַ׃
verses.englishText: A soothing tongue is a tree of life; but perverseness therein is a wound to the spirit.

jps.text: A soothing tongue is a tree of life; but perverseness therein is a wound to the spirit.

verses.hebrewText: אֱוִ֗יל יִ֭נְאַץ מוּסַ֣ר אָבִ֑יו וְשֹׁמֵ֖ר תֹּוכַ֣חַת יַעְרִֽם׃
verses.englishText: A fool despiseth his father's correction; but he that regardeth reproof is prudent.

jps.text: A fool despiseth his father's correction; but he that regardeth reproof is prudent.

verses.hebrewText: בֵּ֣ית צַ֭דִּיק חֹ֣סֶן רָ֑ב וּבִתְבוּאַ֖ת רָשָׁ֣ע נֶעְכָּֽרֶת׃
verses.englishText: In the house of the righteous is much treasure; but in the revenues of the wicked is trouble.

jps.text: In the house of the righteous is much treasure; but in the revenues of the wicked is trouble.

verses.hebrewText: שִׂפְתֵ֣י חֲ֭כָמִים יְזָ֣רוּ דָ֑עַת וְלֵ֖ב כְּסִילִ֣ים לֹא־כֵֽן׃
verses.englishText: The lips of the wise disperse knowledge; but the heart of the foolish is not stedfast.

jps.text: The lips of the wise disperse knowledge; but the heart of the foolish is not stedfast.

verses.hebrewText: זֶ֣בַח רְ֭שָׁעִים תֹּועֲבַ֣ת יְהוָ֑ה וּתְפִלַּ֖ת יְשָׁרִ֣ים רְצֹונֹֽו׃
verses.englishText: The sacrifice of the wicked is an abomination to the LORD; but the prayer of the upright is His delight.

jps.text: The sacrifice of the wicked is an abomination to the LORD; but the prayer of the upright is His delight.

verses.hebrewText: תֹּועֲבַ֣ת יְ֭הוָה דֶּ֣רֶךְ רָשָׁ֑ע וּמְרַדֵּ֖ף צְדָקָ֣ה יֶאֱהָֽב׃
verses.englishText: The way of the wicked is an abomination to the LORD; but He loveth him that followeth after righteousness.

jps.text: The way of the wicked is an abomination to the LORD; but He loveth him that followeth after righteousness.

verses.hebrewText: מוּסָ֣ר רָ֭ע לְעֹזֵ֣ב אֹ֑רַח שֹׂונֵ֖א תֹוכַ֣חַת יָמֽוּת׃
verses.englishText: There is grievous correction for him that forsaketh the way; and he that hateth reproof shall die.

jps.text: There is grievous correction for him that forsaketh the way; and he that hateth reproof shall die.

verses.hebrewText: שְׁאֹ֣ול וַ֭אֲבַדֹּון נֶ֣גֶד יְהוָ֑ה אַ֝֗ף כִּֽי־לִבֹּ֥ות בְּֽנֵי־אָדָֽם׃
verses.englishText: The nether-world and Destruction are before the LORD; how much more then the hearts of the children of men!

jps.text: The nether-world and Destruction are before the LORD; how much more then the hearts of the children of men!

verses.hebrewText: לֹ֣א יֶאֱהַב־לֵ֭ץ הֹוכֵ֣חַֽ לֹ֑ו אֶל־חֲ֝כָמִ֗ים לֹ֣א יֵלֵֽךְ׃
verses.englishText: A scorner loveth not to be reproved; he will not go unto the wise.

jps.text: A scorner loveth not to be reproved; he will not go unto the wise.

verses.hebrewText: לֵ֣ב שָׂ֭מֵחַ יֵיטִ֣ב פָּנִ֑ים וּבְעַצְּבַת־לֵ֝ב ר֣וּחַ נְכֵאָֽה׃
verses.englishText: A merry heart maketh a cheerful countenance; but by sorrow of heart the spirit is broken.

jps.text: A merry heart maketh a cheerful countenance; but by sorrow of heart the spirit is broken.

verses.hebrewText: לֵ֣ב נָ֭בֹון יְבַקֶּשׁ־דָּ֑עַת *וּפְנֵי (וּפִ֥י) כְ֝סִילִ֗ים יִרְעֶ֥ה אִוֶּֽלֶת׃
verses.englishText: The heart of him that hath discernment seeketh knowledge; but the mouth of fools feedeth on folly.

jps.text: The heart of him that hath discernment seeketh knowledge; but the mouth of fools feedeth on folly.

verses.hebrewText: כָּל־יְמֵ֣י עָנִ֣י רָעִ֑ים וְטֹֽוב־לֵ֝֗ב מִשְׁתֶּ֥ה תָמִֽיד׃
verses.englishText: All the days of the poor are evil; but he that is of a merry heart hath a continual feast.

jps.text: All the days of the poor are evil; but he that is of a merry heart hath a continual feast.

verses.hebrewText: טֹוב־מְ֭עַט בְּיִרְאַ֣ת יְהוָ֑ה מֵאֹוצָ֥ר רָ֝֗ב וּמְה֥וּמָה בֹֽו׃
verses.englishText: Better is little with the fear of the LORD, than great treasure and turmoil therewith.

jps.text: Better is little with the fear of the LORD, than great treasure and turmoil therewith.

verses.hebrewText: טֹ֤וב אֲרֻחַ֣ת יָ֭רָק וְאַהֲבָה־שָׁ֑ם מִשֹּׁ֥ור אָ֝ב֗וּס וְשִׂנְאָה־בֹֽו׃
verses.englishText: Better is a dinner of herbs where love is, than a stalled ox and hatred therewith.

jps.text: Better is a dinner of herbs where love is, than a stalled ox and hatred therewith.

verses.hebrewText: אִ֣ישׁ חֵ֭מָה יְגָרֶ֣ה מָדֹ֑ון וְאֶ֥רֶך אַ֝פַּ֗יִם יַשְׁקִ֥יט רִֽיב׃
verses.englishText: A wrathful man stirreth up discord; but he that is slow to anger appeaseth strife.

jps.text: A wrathful man stirreth up discord; but he that is slow to anger appeaseth strife.

verses.hebrewText: דֶּ֣רֶךְ עָ֭צֵל כִּמְשֻׂ֣כַת חָ֑דֶק וְאֹ֖רַח יְשָׁרִ֣ים סְלֻלָֽה׃
verses.englishText: The way of the sluggard is as though hedged by thorns; but the path of the upright is even.

jps.text: The way of the sluggard is as though hedged by thorns; but the path of the upright is even.

verses.hebrewText: בֵּ֣ן חָ֭כָם יְשַׂמַּח־אָ֑ב וּכְסִ֥יל אָ֝דָ֗ם בֹּוזֶ֥ה אִמֹּֽו׃
verses.englishText: A wise son maketh a glad father; but a foolish man despiseth his mother.

jps.text: A wise son maketh a glad father; but a foolish man despiseth his mother.

verses.hebrewText: אִ֭וֶּלֶת שִׂמְחָ֣ה לַחֲסַר־לֵ֑ב וְאִ֥ישׁ תְּ֝בוּנָ֗ה יְיַשֶּׁר־לָֽכֶת׃
verses.englishText: Folly is joy to him that lacketh understanding; but a man of discernment walketh straightforwards.

jps.text: Folly is joy to him that lacketh understanding; but a man of discernment walketh straightforwards.

verses.hebrewText: הָפֵ֣ר מַ֭חֲשָׁבֹות בְּאֵ֣ין סֹ֑וד וּבְרֹ֖ב יֹועֲצִ֣ים תָּקֽוּם׃
verses.englishText: For want of counsel purposes are frustrated; but in the multitude of counsellors they are established.

jps.text: For want of counsel purposes are frustrated; but in the multitude of counsellors they are established.

verses.hebrewText: שִׂמְחָ֣ה לָ֭אִישׁ בְּמַעֲנֵה־פִ֑יו וְדָבָ֖ר בְּעִתֹּ֣ו מַה־טֹּֽוב׃
verses.englishText: A man hath joy in the answer of his mouth; and a word in due season, how good is it!

jps.text: A man hath joy in the answer of his mouth; and a word in due season, how good is it!

verses.hebrewText: אֹ֣רַח חַ֭יִּים לְמַ֣עְלָה לְמַשְׂכִּ֑יל לְמַ֥עַן ס֝֗וּר מִשְּׁאֹ֥ול מָֽטָּה׃
verses.englishText: The path of life goeth upward for the wise, that he may depart from the nether-world beneath.

jps.text: The path of life goeth upward for the wise, that he may depart from the nether-world beneath.

verses.hebrewText: בֵּ֣ית גֵּ֭אִים יִסַּ֥ח ׀ יְהוָ֑ה וְ֝יַצֵּ֗ב גְּב֣וּל אַלְמָנָֽה׃
verses.englishText: The LORD will pluck up the house of the proud; but He will establish the border of the widow.

jps.text: The LORD will pluck up the house of the proud; but He will establish the border of the widow.

verses.hebrewText: תֹּועֲבַ֣ת יְ֭הוָה מַחְשְׁבֹ֣ות רָ֑ע וּ֝טְהֹרִ֗ים אִמְרֵי־נֹֽעַם׃
verses.englishText: The thoughts of wickedness are an abomination to the LORD; but words of pleasantness are pure.

jps.text: The thoughts of wickedness are an abomination to the LORD; but words of pleasantness are pure.

verses.hebrewText: עֹכֵ֣ר בֵּ֭יתֹו בֹּוצֵ֣עַ בָּ֑צַע וְשֹׂונֵ֖א מַתָּנֹ֣ת יִחְיֶֽה׃
verses.englishText: He that is greedy of gain troubleth his own house; but he that hateth gifts shall live.

jps.text: He that is greedy of gain troubleth his own house; but he that hateth gifts shall live.

verses.hebrewText: לֵ֣ב צַ֭דִּיק יֶהְגֶּ֣ה לַעֲנֹ֑ות וּפִ֥י רְ֝שָׁעִ֗ים יַבִּ֥יעַ רָעֹֽות׃
verses.englishText: The heart of the righteous studieth to answer; but the mouth of the wicked poureth out evil things.

jps.text: The heart of the righteous studieth to answer; but the mouth of the wicked poureth out evil things.

verses.hebrewText: רָחֹ֣וק יְ֭הוָה מֵרְשָׁעִ֑ים וּתְפִלַּ֖ת צַדִּיקִ֣ים יִשְׁמָֽע׃
verses.englishText: The LORD is far from the wicked; but He heareth the prayer of the righteous.

jps.text: The LORD is far from the wicked; but He heareth the prayer of the righteous.

verses.hebrewText: מְֽאֹור־עֵ֭ינַיִם יְשַׂמַּֽח־לֵ֑ב שְׁמוּעָ֥ה טֹ֝ובָ֗ה תְּדַשֶּׁן־עָֽצֶם׃
verses.englishText: The light of the eyes rejoiceth the heart; and a good report maketh the bones fat.

jps.text: The light of the eyes rejoiceth the heart; and a good report maketh the bones fat.

verses.hebrewText: אֹ֗זֶן שֹׁ֖מַעַת תֹּוכַ֣חַת חַיִּ֑ים בְּקֶ֖רֶב חֲכָמִ֣ים תָּלִֽין׃
verses.englishText: The ear that hearkeneth to the reproof of life abideth among the wise.

jps.text: The ear that hearkeneth to the reproof of life abideth among the wise.

verses.hebrewText: פֹּורֵ֣עַ מ֖וּסָר מֹואֵ֣ס נַפְשֹׁ֑ו וְשֹׁומֵ֥עַ תֹּ֝וכַ֗חַת קֹ֣ונֶה לֵּֽב׃
verses.englishText: He that refuseth correction despiseth his own soul; but he that hearkeneth to reproof getteth understanding.

jps.text: He that refuseth correction despiseth his own soul; but he that hearkeneth to reproof getteth understanding.

verses.hebrewText: יִרְאַ֣ת יְ֭הוָה מוּסַ֣ר חָכְמָ֑ה וְלִפְנֵ֖י כָבֹ֣וד עֲנָוָֽה׃
verses.englishText: The fear of the LORD is the instruction of wisdom; and before honour goeth humility.

jps.text: The fear of the LORD is the instruction of wisdom; and before honour goeth humility.

verses.hebrewText: לְאָדָ֥ם מַֽעַרְכֵי־לֵ֑ב וּ֝מֵיְהוָ֗ה מַעֲנֵ֥ה לָשֹֽׁון׃
verses.englishText: The preparations of the heart are man's, but the answer of the tongue is from the LORD.

jps.text: The preparations of the heart are man's, but the answer of the tongue is from the LORD.

verses.hebrewText: כָּֽל־דַּרְכֵי־אִ֭ישׁ זַ֣ךְ בְּעֵינָ֑יו וְתֹכֵ֖ן רוּחֹ֣ות יְהוָֽה׃
verses.englishText: All the ways of a man are clean in his own eyes; but the LORD weigheth the spirits.

jps.text: All the ways of a man are clean in his own eyes; but the LORD weigheth the spirits.

verses.hebrewText: גֹּ֣ל אֶל־יְהוָ֣ה מַעֲשֶׂ֑יךָ וְ֝יִכֹּ֗נוּ מַחְשְׁבֹתֶֽיךָ׃
verses.englishText: Commit thy works unto the LORD, and thy thoughts shall be established.

jps.text: Commit thy works unto the LORD, and thy thoughts shall be established.

verses.hebrewText: כֹּ֤ל פָּעַ֣ל יְ֭הוָה לַֽמַּעֲנֵ֑הוּ וְגַם־רָ֝שָׁ֗ע לְיֹ֣ום רָעָֽה׃
verses.englishText: The LORD hath made every things for His own purpose, yea, even the wicked for the day of evil.

jps.text: The LORD hath made every things for His own purpose, yea, even the wicked for the day of evil.

verses.hebrewText: תֹּועֲבַ֣ת יְ֭הוָה כָּל־גְּבַהּ־לֵ֑ב יָ֥ד לְ֝יָ֗ד לֹ֣א יִנָּקֶֽה׃
verses.englishText: Every one that is proud in heart is an abomination to the LORD; my hand upon it! he shall not be unpunished.

jps.text: Every one that is proud in heart is an abomination to the LORD; my hand upon it! he shall not be unpunished.

verses.hebrewText: בְּחֶ֣סֶד וֶ֭אֱמֶת יְכֻפַּ֣ר עָוֹ֑ן וּבְיִרְאַ֥ת יְ֝הוָ֗ה ס֣וּר מֵרָֽע׃
verses.englishText: By mercy and truth iniquity is expiated; and by the fear of the LORD men depart from evil.

jps.text: By mercy and truth iniquity is expiated; and by the fear of the LORD men depart from evil.

verses.hebrewText: בִּרְצֹ֣ות יְ֭הוָה דַּרְכֵי־אִ֑ישׁ גַּם־אֹ֝ויְבָ֗יו יַשְׁלִ֥ם אִתֹּֽו׃
verses.englishText: When a man's ways please the LORD, He maketh even his enemies to be at peace with him.

jps.text: When a man's ways please the LORD, He maketh even his enemies to be at peace with him.

verses.hebrewText: טֹוב־מְ֭עַט בִּצְדָקָ֑ה מֵרֹ֥ב תְּ֝בוּאֹ֗ות בְּלֹ֣א מִשְׁפָּֽט׃
verses.englishText: Better is a little with righteousness than great revenues with injustice.

jps.text: Better is a little with righteousness than great revenues with injustice.

verses.hebrewText: לֵ֣ב אָ֭דָם יְחַשֵּׁ֣ב דַּרְכֹּ֑ו וַֽ֝יהוָ֗ה יָכִ֥ין צַעֲדֹֽו׃
verses.englishText: A man's heart deviseth his way; but the LORD directeth his steps.

jps.text: A man's heart deviseth his way; but the LORD directeth his steps.

verses.hebrewText: קֶ֤סֶם ׀ עַֽל־שִׂפְתֵי־מֶ֑לֶךְ בְּ֝מִשְׁפָּ֗ט לֹ֣א יִמְעַל־פִּֽיו׃
verses.englishText: A divine sentence is in the lips of the king; his mouth trespasseth not in judgment.

jps.text: A divine sentence is in the lips of the king; his mouth trespasseth not in judgment.

verses.hebrewText: פֶּ֤לֶס ׀ וּמֹאזְנֵ֣י מִ֭שְׁפָּט לַֽיהוָ֑ה מַ֝עֲשֵׂ֗הוּ כָּל־אַבְנֵי־כִֽיס׃
verses.englishText: A just balance and scales are the LORD'S; all the weights of the bag are His work.

jps.text: A just balance and scales are the LORD'S; all the weights of the bag are His work.

verses.hebrewText: תֹּועֲבַ֣ת מְ֭לָכִים עֲשֹׂ֣ות רֶ֑שַׁע כִּ֥י בִ֝צְדָקָ֗ה יִכֹּ֥ון כִּסֵּֽא׃
verses.englishText: It is an abomination to kings to commit wickedness; for the throne is established by righteousness.

jps.text: It is an abomination to kings to commit wickedness; for the throne is established by righteousness.

verses.hebrewText: רְצֹ֣ון מְ֭לָכִים שִׂפְתֵי־צֶ֑דֶק וְדֹבֵ֖ר יְשָׁרִ֣ים יֶאֱהָֽב׃
verses.englishText: Righteous lips are the delight of kings; and they love him that speaketh right.

jps.text: Righteous lips are the delight of kings; and they love him that speaketh right.

verses.hebrewText: חֲמַת־מֶ֥לֶךְ מַלְאֲכֵי־מָ֑וֶת וְאִ֖ישׁ חָכָ֣ם יְכַפְּרֶֽנָּה׃
verses.englishText: The wrath of a king is as messengers of death; but a wise man will pacify it.

jps.text: The wrath of a king is as messengers of death; but a wise man will pacify it.

verses.hebrewText: בְּאֹור־פְּנֵי־מֶ֥לֶךְ חַיִּ֑ים וּ֝רְצֹונֹ֗ו כְּעָ֣ב מַלְקֹֽושׁ׃
verses.englishText: In the light of the king's countenance is life; and his favour is as a cloud of the latter rain.

jps.text: In the light of the king's countenance is life; and his favour is as a cloud of the latter rain.

verses.hebrewText: קְֽנֹה־חָכְמָ֗ה מַה־טֹּ֥וב מֵחָר֑וּץ וּקְנֹ֥ות בִּ֝ינָ֗ה נִבְחָ֥ר מִכָּֽסֶף׃
verses.englishText: How much better is it to get wisdom than gold! yea, to get understanding is rather to be chosen than silver.

jps.text: How much better is it to get wisdom than gold! yea, to get understanding is rather to be chosen than silver.

verses.hebrewText: מְסִלַּ֣ת יְ֭שָׁרִים ס֣וּר מֵרָ֑ע שֹׁמֵ֥ר נַ֝פְשֹׁ֗ו נֹצֵ֥ר דַּרְכֹּֽו׃
verses.englishText: The highway of the upright is to depart from evil; he that keepeth his way preserveth his soul.

jps.text: The highway of the upright is to depart from evil; he that keepeth his way preserveth his soul.

verses.hebrewText: לִפְנֵי־שֶׁ֥בֶר גָּאֹ֑ון וְלִפְנֵ֥י כִ֝שָּׁלֹ֗ון גֹּ֣בַהּ רֽוּחַ׃
verses.englishText: Pride goeth before destruction, and a haughty spirit before a fall.

jps.text: Pride goeth before destruction, and a haughty spirit before a fall.

verses.hebrewText: טֹ֣וב שְׁפַל־ר֭וּחַ אֶת־*עֲנִיִּים (עֲנָוִ֑ים) מֵֽחַלֵּ֥ק שָׁ֝לָ֗ל אֶת־גֵּאִֽים׃
verses.englishText: Better it is to be of a lowly spirit with the humble, than to divide the spoil with the proud.

jps.text: Better it is to be of a lowly spirit with the humble, than to divide the spoil with the proud.

verses.hebrewText: מַשְׂכִּ֣יל עַל־דָּ֭בָר יִמְצָא־טֹ֑וב וּבֹוטֵ֖חַ בַּיהוָ֣ה אַשְׁרָֽיו׃
verses.englishText: He that giveth heed unto the word shall find good; and whoso trusteth in the LORD, happy is he.

jps.text: He that giveth heed unto the word shall find good; and whoso trusteth in the LORD, happy is he.

verses.hebrewText: לַחֲכַם־לֵ֭ב יִקָּרֵ֣א נָבֹ֑ון וּמֶ֥תֶק שְׂ֝פָתַ֗יִם יֹסִ֥יף לֶֽקַח׃
verses.englishText: The wise in heart is called a man of discernment; and the sweetness of the lips increaseth learning.

jps.text: The wise in heart is called a man of discernment; and the sweetness of the lips increaseth learning.

verses.hebrewText: מְקֹ֣ור חַ֭יִּים שֵׂ֣כֶל בְּעָלָ֑יו וּמוּסַ֖ר אֱוִלִ֣ים אִוֶּֽלֶת׃
verses.englishText: Understanding is a fountain of life unto him that hath it; but folly is the chastisement of fools.

jps.text: Understanding is a fountain of life unto him that hath it; but folly is the chastisement of fools.

verses.hebrewText: לֵ֣ב חָ֭כָם יַשְׂכִּ֣יל פִּ֑יהוּ וְעַל־שְׂ֝פָתָ֗יו יֹסִ֥יף לֶֽקַח׃
verses.englishText: The heart of the wise teacheth his mouth, and addeth learning to his lips.

jps.text: The heart of the wise teacheth his mouth, and addeth learning to his lips.

verses.hebrewText: צוּף־דְּ֭בַשׁ אִמְרֵי־נֹ֑עַם מָתֹ֥וק לַ֝נֶּפֶשׁ וּמַרְפֵּ֥א לָעָֽצֶם׃
verses.englishText: Pleasant words are as a honeycomb, sweet to the soul, and health to the bones.

jps.text: Pleasant words are as a honeycomb, sweet to the soul, and health to the bones.

verses.hebrewText: יֵ֤שׁ דֶּ֣רֶךְ יָ֭שָׁר לִפְנֵי־אִ֑ישׁ וְ֝אַחֲרִיתָ֗הּ דַּרְכֵי־מָֽוֶת׃
verses.englishText: There is a way which seemeth right unto a man, but the end thereof are the ways of death.

jps.text: There is a way which seemeth right unto a man, but the end thereof are the ways of death.

verses.hebrewText: נֶ֣פֶשׁ עָ֭מֵל עָ֣מְלָה לֹּ֑ו כִּֽי־אָכַ֖ף עָלָ֣יו פִּֽיהוּ׃
verses.englishText: The hunger of the labouring man laboureth for him; for his mouth compelleth him.

jps.text: The hunger of the labouring man laboureth for him; for his mouth compelleth him.

verses.hebrewText: אִ֣ישׁ בְּ֭לִיַּעַל כֹּרֶ֣ה רָעָ֑ה וְעַל־*שְׂפָתָיו (שְׂ֝פָתֹ֗ו) כְּאֵ֣שׁ צָרָֽבֶת׃
verses.englishText: An ungodly man diggeth up evil, and in his lips there is as a burning fire.

jps.text: An ungodly man diggeth up evil, and in his lips there is as a burning fire.

verses.hebrewText: אִ֣ישׁ תַּ֭הְפֻּכֹות יְשַׁלַּ֣ח מָדֹ֑ון וְ֝נִרְגָּ֗ן מַפְרִ֥יד אַלּֽוּף׃
verses.englishText: A froward man soweth strife; and a whisperer separateth familiar friends.

jps.text: A froward man soweth strife; and a whisperer separateth familiar friends.

verses.hebrewText: אִ֣ישׁ חָ֭מָס יְפַתֶּ֣ה רֵעֵ֑הוּ וְ֝הֹולִיכֹ֗ו בְּדֶ֣רֶךְ לֹא־טֹֽוב׃
verses.englishText: A man of violence enticeth his neighbour, and leadeth him into a way that is not good.

jps.text: A man of violence enticeth his neighbour, and leadeth him into a way that is not good.

verses.hebrewText: עֹצֶ֣ה עֵ֭ינָיו לַחְשֹׁ֣ב תַּהְפֻּכֹ֑ות קֹרֵ֥ץ שְׂ֝פָתָ֗יו כִּלָּ֥ה רָעָֽה׃
verses.englishText: He that shutteth his eyes, it is to devise froward things; he that biteth his lips bringeth evil to pass.

jps.text: He that shutteth his eyes, it is to devise froward things; he that biteth his lips bringeth evil to pass.

verses.hebrewText: עֲטֶ֣רֶת תִּפְאֶ֣רֶת שֵׂיבָ֑ה בְּדֶ֥רֶךְ צְ֝דָקָ֗ה תִּמָּצֵֽא׃
verses.englishText: The hoary head is a crown of glory, it is found in the way of righteousness.

jps.text: The hoary head is a crown of glory, it is found in the way of righteousness.

verses.hebrewText: טֹ֤וב אֶ֣רֶךְ אַ֭פַּיִם מִגִּבֹּ֑ור וּמֹשֵׁ֥ל בְּ֝רוּחֹ֗ו מִלֹּכֵ֥ד עִֽיר׃
verses.englishText: He that is slow to anger is better than the mighty; and he that ruleth his spirit than he that taketh a city.

jps.text: He that is slow to anger is better than the mighty; and he that ruleth his spirit than he that taketh a city.

verses.hebrewText: בַּ֭חֵיק יוּטַ֣ל אֶת־הַגֹּורָ֑ל וּ֝מֵיְהוָ֗ה כָּל־מִשְׁפָּטֹֽו׃
verses.englishText: The lot is cast into the lap; but the whole disposing thereof is of the LORD.

jps.text: The lot is cast into the lap; but the whole disposing thereof is of the LORD.

verses.hebrewText: טֹ֤וב פַּ֣ת חֲ֭רֵבָה וְשַׁלְוָה־בָ֑הּ מִ֝בַּ֗יִת מָלֵ֥א זִבְחֵי־רִֽיב׃
verses.englishText: Better is a dry morsel and quietness therewith, than a house full of feasting with strife.

jps.text: Better is a dry morsel and quietness therewith, than a house full of feasting with strife.

verses.hebrewText: עֶֽבֶד־מַשְׂכִּ֗יל יִ֭מְשֹׁל בְּבֵ֣ן מֵבִ֑ישׁ וּבְתֹ֥וךְ אַ֝חִ֗ים יַחֲלֹ֥ק נַחֲלָֽה׃
verses.englishText: A servant that dealeth wisely shall have rule over a son that dealeth shamefully, and shall have part of the inheritance among the brethren.

jps.text: A servant that dealeth wisely shall have rule over a son that dealeth shamefully, and shall have part of the inheritance among the brethren.

verses.hebrewText: מַצְרֵ֣ף לַ֭כֶּסֶף וְכ֣וּר לַזָּהָ֑ב וּבֹחֵ֖ן לִבֹּ֣ות יְהוָֽה׃
verses.englishText: The refining pot is for silver, and the furnace for gold; but the LORD trieth the hearts.

jps.text: The refining pot is for silver, and the furnace for gold; but the LORD trieth the hearts.

verses.hebrewText: מֵ֭רַע מַקְשִׁ֣יב עַל־שְׂפַת־אָ֑וֶן שֶׁ֥קֶר מֵ֝זִין עַל־לְשֹׁ֥ון הַוֹּֽת׃
verses.englishText: A evil-doer giveth heed to wicked lips; and a liar giveth ear to a mischievous tongue.

jps.text: A evil-doer giveth heed to wicked lips; and a liar giveth ear to a mischievous tongue.

verses.hebrewText: לֹעֵ֣ג לָ֭רָשׁ חֵרֵ֣ף עֹשֵׂ֑הוּ שָׂמֵ֥חַ לְ֝אֵ֗יד לֹ֣א יִנָּקֶֽה׃
verses.englishText: Whoso mocketh the poor blasphemeth his Maker; and he that is glad at calamity shall not be unpunished.

jps.text: Whoso mocketh the poor blasphemeth his Maker; and he that is glad at calamity shall not be unpunished.

verses.hebrewText: עֲטֶ֣רֶת זְ֭קֵנִים בְּנֵ֣י בָנִ֑ים וְתִפְאֶ֖רֶת בָּנִ֣ים אֲבֹותָֽם׃
verses.englishText: Children's children are the crown of old men; and the glory of children are their fathers.

jps.text: Children's children are the crown of old men; and the glory of children are their fathers.

verses.hebrewText: לֹא־נָאוָ֣ה לְנָבָ֣ל שְׂפַת־יֶ֑תֶר אַ֝֗ף כִּֽי־לְנָדִ֥יב שְׂפַת־שָֽׁקֶר׃
verses.englishText: Overbearing speech becometh not a churl; much less do lying lips a prince.

jps.text: Overbearing speech becometh not a churl; much less do lying lips a prince.

verses.hebrewText: אֶֽבֶן־חֵ֣ן הַ֭שֹּׁחַד בְּעֵינֵ֣י בְעָלָ֑יו אֶֽל־כָּל־אֲשֶׁ֖ר יִפְנֶ֣ה יַשְׂכִּֽיל׃
verses.englishText: A gift is as a precious stone in the eyes of him that hath it; whithersoever he turneth, he prospereth.

jps.text: A gift is as a precious stone in the eyes of him that hath it; whithersoever he turneth, he prospereth.

verses.hebrewText: מְֽכַסֶּה־פֶּ֭שַׁע מְבַקֵּ֣שׁ אַהֲבָ֑ה וְשֹׁנֶ֥ה בְ֝דָבָ֗ר מַפְרִ֥יד אַלּֽוּף׃
verses.englishText: He that covereth a transgression seeketh love; but he that harpeth on a matter estrangeth a familiar friend.

jps.text: He that covereth a transgression seeketh love; but he that harpeth on a matter estrangeth a familiar friend.

verses.hebrewText: תֵּ֣חַת גְּעָרָ֣ה בְמֵבִ֑ין מֵהַכֹּ֖ות כְּסִ֣יל מֵאָֽה׃
verses.englishText: A rebuke entereth deeper into a man of understanding than a hundred stripes into a fool.

jps.text: A rebuke entereth deeper into a man of understanding than a hundred stripes into a fool.

verses.hebrewText: אַךְ־מְרִ֥י יְבַקֶּשׁ־רָ֑ע וּמַלְאָ֥ךְ אַ֝כְזָרִ֗י יְשֻׁלַּח־בֹּֽו׃
verses.englishText: A rebellious man seeketh only evil; therefore a cruel messenger shall be sent against him.

jps.text: A rebellious man seeketh only evil; therefore a cruel messenger shall be sent against him.

verses.hebrewText: פָּגֹ֬ושׁ דֹּ֣ב שַׁכּ֣וּל בְּאִ֑ישׁ וְאַל־כְּ֝סִ֗יל בְּאִוַּלְתֹּֽו׃
verses.englishText: Let a bear robbed of her whelps meet a man, rather than a fool in his folly.

jps.text: Let a bear robbed of her whelps meet a man, rather than a fool in his folly.

verses.hebrewText: מֵשִׁ֣יב רָ֭עָה תַּ֣חַת טֹובָ֑ה לֹא־*תָמִישׁ (תָמ֥וּשׁ) רָ֝עָ֗ה מִבֵּיתֹֽו׃
verses.englishText: Whoso rewardeth evil for good, evil shall not depart from his house.

jps.text: Whoso rewardeth evil for good, evil shall not depart from his house.

verses.hebrewText: פֹּ֣וטֵֽר מַ֭יִם רֵאשִׁ֣ית מָדֹ֑ון וְלִפְנֵ֥י הִ֝תְגַּלַּ֗ע הָרִ֥יב נְטֹֽושׁ׃
verses.englishText: The beginning of strife is as when one letteth out water; therefore leave off contention, before the quarrel break out.

jps.text: The beginning of strife is as when one letteth out water; therefore leave off contention, before the quarrel break out.

verses.hebrewText: מַצְדִּ֣יק רָ֭שָׁע וּמַרְשִׁ֣יעַ צַדִּ֑יק תֹּועֲבַ֥ת יְ֝הוָ֗ה גַּם־שְׁנֵיהֶֽם׃
verses.englishText: He that justifieth the wicked, and he that condemneth the righteous, even they both are an abomination to the LORD.

jps.text: He that justifieth the wicked, and he that condemneth the righteous, even they both are an abomination to the LORD.

verses.hebrewText: לָמָּה־זֶּ֣ה מְחִ֣יר בְּיַד־כְּסִ֑יל לִקְנֹ֖ות חָכְמָ֣ה וְלֶב־אָֽיִן׃
verses.englishText: Wherefore is there a price in the hand of a fool to buy wisdom, seeing he hath no understanding?

jps.text: Wherefore is there a price in the hand of a fool to buy wisdom, seeing he hath no understanding?

verses.hebrewText: בְּכָל־עֵ֭ת אֹהֵ֣ב הָרֵ֑עַ וְאָ֥ח לְ֝צָרָ֗ה יִוָּלֵֽד׃
verses.englishText: A friend loveth at all times, and a brother is born for adversity.

jps.text: A friend loveth at all times, and a brother is born for adversity.

verses.hebrewText: אָדָ֣ם חֲסַר־לֵ֭ב תֹּוקֵ֣עַ כָּ֑ף עֹרֵ֥ב עֲ֝רֻבָּ֗ה לִפְנֵ֥י רֵעֵֽהוּ׃
verses.englishText: A man void of understanding is he that striketh hands, and becometh surety in the presence of his neighbour.

jps.text: A man void of understanding is he that striketh hands, and becometh surety in the presence of his neighbour.

verses.hebrewText: אֹ֣הֵֽב פֶּ֭שַׁע אֹהֵ֣ב מַצָּ֑ה מַגְבִּ֥יהַּ פִּ֝תְחֹ֗ו מְבַקֶּשׁ־שָֽׁבֶר׃
verses.englishText: He loveth transgression that loveth strife; he that exalteth his gate seeketh destruction.

jps.text: He loveth transgression that loveth strife; he that exalteth his gate seeketh destruction.

verses.hebrewText: עִקֶּשׁ־לֵ֭ב לֹ֣א יִמְצָא־טֹ֑וב וְנֶהְפָּ֥ךְ בִּ֝לְשֹׁונֹ֗ו יִפֹּ֥ול בְּרָעָֽה׃
verses.englishText: He that hath a froward heart findeth no good; and he that hath a perverse tongue falleth into evil.

jps.text: He that hath a froward heart findeth no good; and he that hath a perverse tongue falleth into evil.

verses.hebrewText: יֹלֵ֣ד כְּ֭סִיל לְת֣וּגָה לֹ֑ו וְלֹֽא־יִ֝שְׂמַ֗ח אֲבִ֣י נָבָֽל׃
verses.englishText: He that begetteth a fool doeth it to his sorrow; and the father of a churl hath no joy.

jps.text: He that begetteth a fool doeth it to his sorrow; and the father of a churl hath no joy.

verses.hebrewText: לֵ֣ב שָׂ֭מֵחַ יֵיטִ֣ב גֵּהָ֑ה וְר֥וּחַ נְ֝כֵאָ֗ה תְּיַבֶּשׁ־גָּֽרֶם׃
verses.englishText: A merry heart is a good medicine; but a broken spirit drieth the bones.

jps.text: A merry heart is a good medicine; but a broken spirit drieth the bones.

verses.hebrewText: שֹׁ֣חַד מֵ֭חֵיק רָשָׁ֣ע יִקָּ֑ח לְ֝הַטֹּ֗ות אָרְחֹ֥ות מִשְׁפָּֽט׃
verses.englishText: A wicked man taketh a gift out of the bosom, to pervert the ways of justice.

jps.text: A wicked man taketh a gift out of the bosom, to pervert the ways of justice.

verses.hebrewText: אֶת־פְּנֵ֣י מֵבִ֣ין חָכְמָ֑ה וְעֵינֵ֥י כְ֝סִ֗יל בִּקְצֵה־אָֽרֶץ׃
verses.englishText: Wisdom is before him that hath understanding; but the eyes of a fool are in the ends of the earth.

jps.text: Wisdom is before him that hath understanding; but the eyes of a fool are in the ends of the earth.

verses.hebrewText: כַּ֣עַס לְ֭אָבִיו בֵּ֣ן כְּסִ֑יל וּ֝מֶ֗מֶר לְיֹולַדְתֹּֽו׃
verses.englishText: A foolish son is vexation to his father, and bitterness to her that bore him.

jps.text: A foolish son is vexation to his father, and bitterness to her that bore him.

verses.hebrewText: גַּ֤ם עֲנֹ֣ושׁ לַצַּדִּ֣יק לֹא־טֹ֑וב לְהַכֹּ֖ות נְדִיבִ֣ים עַל־יֹֽשֶׁר׃
verses.englishText: To punish also the righteous is not good, nor to strike the noble for their uprightness.

jps.text: To punish also the righteous is not good, nor to strike the noble for their uprightness.

verses.hebrewText: חֹושֵׂ֣ךְ אֲ֭מָרָיו יֹודֵ֣עַ דָּ֑עַת *וְקַר־ (יְקַר)־ר֝֗וּחַ אִ֣ישׁ תְּבוּנָֽה׃
verses.englishText: He that spareth his words hath knowledge; and he that husbandeth his spirit is a man of discernment.

jps.text: He that spareth his words hath knowledge; and he that husbandeth his spirit is a man of discernment.

verses.hebrewText: גַּ֤ם אֱוִ֣יל מַ֭חֲרִישׁ חָכָ֣ם יֵחָשֵׁ֑ב אֹטֵ֖ם שְׂפָתָ֣יו נָבֹֽון׃
verses.englishText: Even a fool, when he holdeth his peace, is counted wise; and he that shutteth his lips is esteemed as a man of understanding.

jps.text: Even a fool, when he holdeth his peace, is counted wise; and he that shutteth his lips is esteemed as a man of understanding.

verses.hebrewText: לְֽ֭תַאֲוָה יְבַקֵּ֣שׁ נִפְרָ֑ד בְּכָל־תּ֝וּשִׁיָּ֗ה יִתְגַּלָּֽע׃
verses.englishText: He that separateth himself seeketh his own desire, and snarlest against all sound wisdom.

jps.text: He that separateth himself seeketh his own desire, and snarlest against all sound wisdom.

verses.hebrewText: לֹֽא־יַחְפֹּ֣ץ כְּ֭סִיל בִּתְבוּנָ֑ה כִּ֝֗י אִֽם־בְּהִתְגַּלֹּ֥ות לִבֹּֽו׃
verses.englishText: A fool hath no delight in understanding, but only that his heart may lay itself bare.

jps.text: A fool hath no delight in understanding, but only that his heart may lay itself bare.

verses.hebrewText: בְּֽבֹוא־רָ֭שָׁע בָּ֣א גַם־בּ֑וּז וְֽעִם־קָלֹ֥ון חֶרְפָּֽה׃
verses.englishText: When the wicked cometh, there cometh also contempt, and with ignominy reproach.

jps.text: When the wicked cometh, there cometh also contempt, and with ignominy reproach.

verses.hebrewText: מַ֣יִם עֲ֭מֻקִּים דִּבְרֵ֣י פִי־אִ֑ישׁ נַ֥חַל נֹ֝בֵ֗עַ מְקֹ֣ור חָכְמָֽה׃
verses.englishText: The words of a man's mouth are as deep waters; a flowing brook, a fountain of wisdom.

jps.text: The words of a man's mouth are as deep waters; a flowing brook, a fountain of wisdom.

verses.hebrewText: שְׂאֵ֣ת פְּנֵי־רָשָׁ֣ע לֹא־טֹ֑וב לְהַטֹּ֥ות צַ֝דִּ֗יק בַּמִּשְׁפָּֽט׃
verses.englishText: It is not good to respect the person of the wicked, so as to turn aside the righteous in judgment.

jps.text: It is not good to respect the person of the wicked, so as to turn aside the righteous in judgment.

verses.hebrewText: שִׂפְתֵ֣י כְ֭סִיל יָבֹ֣אֽוּ בְרִ֑יב וּ֝פִ֗יו לְֽמַהֲלֻמֹ֥ות יִקְרָֽא׃
verses.englishText: A fool's lips enter into contention, and his mouth calleth for strokes.

jps.text: A fool's lips enter into contention, and his mouth calleth for strokes.

verses.hebrewText: פִּֽי־כְ֭סִיל מְחִתָּה־לֹ֑ו וּ֝שְׂפָתָ֗יו מֹוקֵ֥שׁ נַפְשֹֽׁו׃
verses.englishText: A fool's mouth is his ruin, and his lips are the snare of his soul.

jps.text: A fool's mouth is his ruin, and his lips are the snare of his soul.

verses.hebrewText: דִּבְרֵ֣י נִ֭רְגָּן כְּמִֽתְלַהֲמִ֑ים וְ֝הֵ֗ם יָרְד֥וּ חַדְרֵי־בָֽטֶן׃
verses.englishText: The words of a whisperer are as dainty morsels, and they go down into the innermost parts of the belly.

jps.text: The words of a whisperer are as dainty morsels, and they go down into the innermost parts of the belly.

verses.hebrewText: גַּ֭ם מִתְרַפֶּ֣ה בִמְלַאכְתֹּ֑ו אָ֥ח ה֝֗וּא לְבַ֣עַל מַשְׁחִֽית׃
verses.englishText: Even one that is slack in his work is brother to him that is a destroyer.

jps.text: Even one that is slack in his work is brother to him that is a destroyer.

verses.hebrewText: מִגְדַּל־עֹ֭ז שֵׁ֣ם יְהוָ֑ה בֹּֽו־יָר֖וּץ צַדִּ֣יק וְנִשְׂגָּֽב׃
verses.englishText: The name of the LORD is a strong tower: the righteous runneth into it, and is set up on high.

jps.text: The name of the LORD is a strong tower: the righteous runneth into it, and is set up on high.

verses.hebrewText: הֹ֣ון עָ֭שִׁיר קִרְיַ֣ת עֻזֹּ֑ו וּכְחֹומָ֥ה נִ֝שְׂגָּבָ֗ה בְּמַשְׂכִּיתֹֽו׃
verses.englishText: The rich man's wealth is his strong city, and as a high wall in his own conceit.

jps.text: The rich man's wealth is his strong city, and as a high wall in his own conceit.

verses.hebrewText: לִפְנֵי־שֶׁ֭בֶר יִגְבַּ֣הּ לֵב־אִ֑ישׁ וְלִפְנֵ֖י כָבֹ֣וד עֲנָוֽ͏ָה׃
verses.englishText: Before destruction the heart of a man is haughty, and before honour goeth humility.

jps.text: Before destruction the heart of a man is haughty, and before honour goeth humility.

verses.hebrewText: מֵשִׁ֣יב דָּ֭בָר בְּטֶ֣רֶם יִשְׁמָ֑ע אִוֶּ֥לֶת הִיא־לֹ֝֗ו וּכְלִמָּֽה׃
verses.englishText: He that giveth answer before he heareth, it is folly and confusion unto him.

jps.text: He that giveth answer before he heareth, it is folly and confusion unto him.

verses.hebrewText: רֽוּחַ־אִ֭ישׁ יְכַלְכֵּ֣ל מַחֲלֵ֑הוּ וְר֥וּחַ נְ֝כֵאָ֗ה מִ֣י יִשָּׂאֶֽנָּה׃
verses.englishText: The spirit of a man will sustain his infirmity; but a broken spirit who can bear?

jps.text: The spirit of a man will sustain his infirmity; but a broken spirit who can bear?

verses.hebrewText: לֵ֣ב נָ֭בֹון יִקְנֶה־דָּ֑עַת וְאֹ֥זֶן חֲ֝כָמִ֗ים תְּבַקֶּשׁ־דָּֽעַת׃
verses.englishText: The heart of the prudent getteth knowledge; and the ear of the wise seeketh knowledge.

jps.text: The heart of the prudent getteth knowledge; and the ear of the wise seeketh knowledge.

verses.hebrewText: מַתָּ֣ן אָ֭דָם יַרְחִ֣יב לֹ֑ו וְלִפְנֵ֖י גְדֹלִ֣ים יַנְחֶֽנּוּ׃
verses.englishText: A man's gift maketh room for him, and bringeth him before great men.

jps.text: A man's gift maketh room for him, and bringeth him before great men.

verses.hebrewText: צַדִּ֣יק הָרִאשֹׁ֣ון בְּרִיבֹ֑ו *יָבֹא־ (וּבָֽא)־רֵ֝עֵ֗הוּ וַחֲקָרֹֽו׃
verses.englishText: He that pleadeth his cause first seemeth just; but his neighbour cometh and searcheth him out.

jps.text: He that pleadeth his cause first seemeth just; but his neighbour cometh and searcheth him out.

verses.hebrewText: מִ֭דְיָנִים יַשְׁבִּ֣ית הַגֹּורָ֑ל וּבֵ֖ין עֲצוּמִ֣ים יַפְרִֽיד׃
verses.englishText: The lot causeth strife to cease, and parteth asunder the contentious.

jps.text: The lot causeth strife to cease, and parteth asunder the contentious.

verses.hebrewText: אָ֗ח נִפְשָׁ֥ע מִקִּרְיַת־עֹ֑ז *וּמְדֹונִים (וּ֝מִדְיָנִ֗ים) כִּבְרִ֥יחַ אַרְמֹֽון׃
verses.englishText: A brother offended is harder to be won than a strong city; and their contentions are like the bars of a castle.

jps.text: A brother offended is harder to be won than a strong city; and their contentions are like the bars of a castle.

verses.hebrewText: מִפְּרִ֣י פִי־אִ֭ישׁ תִּשְׂבַּ֣ע בִּטְנֹ֑ו תְּבוּאַ֖ת שְׂפָתָ֣יו יִשְׂבָּֽע׃
verses.englishText: A man's belly shall be filled with the fruit of his mouth; with the increase of his lips shall he be satisfied.

jps.text: A man's belly shall be filled with the fruit of his mouth; with the increase of his lips shall he be satisfied.

verses.hebrewText: מָ֣וֶת וְ֭חַיִּים בְּיַד־לָשֹׁ֑ון וְ֝אֹהֲבֶ֗יהָ יֹאכַ֥ל פִּרְיָֽהּ׃
verses.englishText: Death and life are in the power of the tongue; and they that indulge it shall eat the fruit thereof.

jps.text: Death and life are in the power of the tongue; and they that indulge it shall eat the fruit thereof.

verses.hebrewText: מָצָ֣א אִ֭שָּׁה מָ֣צָא טֹ֑וב וַיָּ֥פֶק רָ֝צֹ֗ון מֵיְהוָֽה׃
verses.englishText: Whoso findeth a wife findeth a great good, and obtaineth favour of the LORD.

jps.text: Whoso findeth a wife findeth a great good, and obtaineth favour of the LORD.

verses.hebrewText: תַּחֲנוּנִ֥ים יְדַבֶּר־רָ֑שׁ וְ֝עָשִׁ֗יר יַעֲנֶ֥ה עַזֹּֽות׃
verses.englishText: The poor useth entreaties; but the rich answereth impudently.

jps.text: The poor useth entreaties; but the rich answereth impudently.

verses.hebrewText: אִ֣ישׁ רֵ֭עִים לְהִתְרֹעֵ֑עַ וְיֵ֥שׁ אֹ֝הֵ֗ב דָּבֵ֥ק מֵאָֽח׃
verses.englishText: There are friends that one hath to his own hurt; but there is a friend that sticketh closer than a brother.

jps.text: There are friends that one hath to his own hurt; but there is a friend that sticketh closer than a brother.

verses.hebrewText: טֹֽוב־רָ֭שׁ הֹולֵ֣ךְ בְּתֻמֹּ֑ו מֵעִקֵּ֥שׁ שְׂ֝פָתָ֗יו וְה֣וּא כְסִֽיל׃
verses.englishText: Better is the poor that walketh in his integrity than he that is perverse in his lips and a fool at the same time.

jps.text: Better is the poor that walketh in his integrity than he that is perverse in his lips and a fool at the same time.

verses.hebrewText: גַּ֤ם בְּלֹא־דַ֣עַת נֶ֣פֶשׁ לֹא־טֹ֑וב וְאָ֖ץ בְּרַגְלַ֣יִם חֹוטֵֽא׃
verses.englishText: Also, that the soul be without knowledge is not good; and he that hasteth with his feet sinneth.

jps.text: Also, that the soul be without knowledge is not good; and he that hasteth with his feet sinneth.

verses.hebrewText: אִוֶּ֣לֶת אָ֭דָם תְּסַלֵּ֣ף דַּרְכֹּ֑ו וְעַל־יְ֝הוָ֗ה יִזְעַ֥ף לִבֹּֽו׃
verses.englishText: The foolishness of man perverteth his way; and his heart fretteth against the LORD.

jps.text: The foolishness of man perverteth his way; and his heart fretteth against the LORD.

verses.hebrewText: הֹ֗ון יֹ֭סִיף רֵעִ֣ים רַבִּ֑ים וְ֝דָ֗ל מֵרֵ֥עהוּ יִפָּרֵֽד׃
verses.englishText: Wealth addeth many friends; but as for the poor, his friend separateth himself from him.

jps.text: Wealth addeth many friends; but as for the poor, his friend separateth himself from him.

verses.hebrewText: עֵ֣ד שְׁ֭קָרִים לֹ֣א יִנָּקֶ֑ה וְיָפִ֥יחַ כְּ֝זָבִ֗ים לֹ֣א יִמָּלֵֽט׃
verses.englishText: A false witness shall not be unpunished; and he that breatheth forth lies shall not escape.

jps.text: A false witness shall not be unpunished; and he that breatheth forth lies shall not escape.

verses.hebrewText: רַ֭בִּים יְחַלּ֣וּ פְנֵֽי־נָדִ֑יב וְכָל־הָ֝רֵ֗עַ לְאִ֣ישׁ מַתָּֽן׃
verses.englishText: Many will entreat the favour of the liberal man; and every man is a friend to him that giveth gifts.

jps.text: Many will entreat the favour of the liberal man; and every man is a friend to him that giveth gifts.

verses.hebrewText: כָּ֥ל אֲחֵי־רָ֨שׁ ׀ שְֽׂנֵאֻ֗הוּ אַ֤ף כִּ֣י מְ֭רֵעֵהוּ רָחֲק֣וּ מִמֶּ֑נּוּ מְרַדֵּ֖ף אֲמָרִ֣ים *לֹא־ (לֹו)־הֵֽמָּה׃
verses.englishText: All the brethren of the poor do hate him; how much more do his friends go far from him! He that pursueth words, they turn against him.

jps.text: All the brethren of the poor do hate him; how much more do his friends go far from him! He that pursueth words, they turn against him.

verses.hebrewText: קֹֽנֶה־לֵּ֭ב אֹהֵ֣ב נַפְשֹׁ֑ו שֹׁמֵ֥ר תְּ֝בוּנָ֗ה לִמְצֹא־טֹֽוב׃
verses.englishText: He that getteth wisdom loveth his own soul; he that keepeth understanding shall find good.

jps.text: He that getteth wisdom loveth his own soul; he that keepeth understanding shall find good.

verses.hebrewText: עֵ֣ד שְׁ֭קָרִים לֹ֣א יִנָּקֶ֑ה וְיָפִ֖יחַ כְּזָבִ֣ים יֹאבֵֽד׃ פ
verses.englishText: A false witness shall not be unpunished; and he that breatheth forth lies shall perish.

jps.text: A false witness shall not be unpunished; and he that breatheth forth lies shall perish.

verses.hebrewText: לֹֽא־נָאוֶ֣ה לִכְסִ֣יל תַּעֲנ֑וּג אַ֝֗ף כִּֽי־לְעֶ֤בֶד ׀ מְשֹׁ֬ל בְּשָׂרִֽים׃
verses.englishText: Luxury is not seemly for a fool; much less for a servant to have rule over princes.

jps.text: Luxury is not seemly for a fool; much less for a servant to have rule over princes.

verses.hebrewText: שֵׂ֣כֶל אָ֭דָם הֶאֱרִ֣יךְ אַפֹּ֑ו וְ֝תִפאַרְתֹּ֗ו עֲבֹ֣ר עַל־פָּֽשַׁע׃
verses.englishText: It is the discretion of a man to be slow to anger, and it is his glory to pass over a transgression.

jps.text: It is the discretion of a man to be slow to anger, and it is his glory to pass over a transgression.

verses.hebrewText: נַ֣הַם כַּ֭כְּפִיר זַ֣עַף מֶ֑לֶךְ וּכְטַ֖ל עַל־עֵ֣שֶׂב רְצֹונֹֽו׃
verses.englishText: The king's wrath is as the roaring of a lion; but his favour is as dew upon the grass.

jps.text: The king's wrath is as the roaring of a lion; but his favour is as dew upon the grass.

verses.hebrewText: הַוֹּ֣ת לְ֭אָבִיו בֵּ֣ן כְּסִ֑יל וְדֶ֥לֶף טֹ֝רֵ֗ד מִדְיְנֵ֥י אִשָּֽׁה׃
verses.englishText: A foolish son is the calamity of his father; and the contentions of a wife are a continual dropping.

jps.text: A foolish son is the calamity of his father; and the contentions of a wife are a continual dropping.

verses.hebrewText: בַּ֣יִת וָ֭הֹון נַחֲלַ֣ת אָבֹ֑ות וּ֝מֵיְהוָ֗ה אִשָּׁ֥ה מַשְׂכָּֽלֶת׃
verses.englishText: House and riches are the inheritance of fathers; but a prudent wife is from the LORD.

jps.text: House and riches are the inheritance of fathers; but a prudent wife is from the LORD.

verses.hebrewText: עַ֭צְלָה תַּפִּ֣יל תַּרְדֵּמָ֑ה וְנֶ֖פֶשׁ רְמִיָּ֣ה תִרְעָֽב׃
verses.englishText: Slothfulness casteth into a deep sleep; and the idle soul shall suffer hunger.

jps.text: Slothfulness casteth into a deep sleep; and the idle soul shall suffer hunger.

verses.hebrewText: שֹׁמֵ֣ר מִ֭צְוָה שֹׁמֵ֣ר נַפְשֹׁ֑ו בֹּוזֵ֖ה דְרָכָ֣יו *יוּמָת (יָמֽוּת)׃
verses.englishText: He that keepeth the commandment keepeth his soul; but he that despiseth His ways shall die.

jps.text: He that keepeth the commandment keepeth his soul; but he that despiseth His ways shall die.

verses.hebrewText: מַלְוֵ֣ה יְ֭הוָה חֹ֣ונֵֽן דָּ֑ל וּ֝גְמֻלֹ֗ו יְשַׁלֶּם־לֹֽו׃
verses.englishText: He that is gracious unto the poor lendeth unto the LORD; and his good deed will He repay unto him.

jps.text: He that is gracious unto the poor lendeth unto the LORD; and his good deed will He repay unto him.

verses.hebrewText: יַסֵּ֣ר בִּ֭נְךָ כִּי־יֵ֣שׁ תִּקְוָ֑ה וְאֶל־הֲ֝מִיתֹ֗ו אַל־תִּשָּׂ֥א נַפְשֶֽׁךָ׃
verses.englishText: Chasten thy son, for there is hope; but set not thy heart on his destruction.

jps.text: Chasten thy son, for there is hope; but set not thy heart on his destruction.

verses.hebrewText: *גֹּרַל־ (גְּֽדָל)־חֵ֭מָה נֹ֣שֵׂא עֹ֑נֶשׁ כִּ֥י אִם־תַּ֝צִּ֗יל וְעֹ֣וד תֹּוסִֽף׃
verses.englishText: A man of great wrath shall suffer punishment; for if thou interpose, thou wilt add thereto.

jps.text: A man of great wrath shall suffer punishment; for if thou interpose, thou wilt add thereto.

verses.hebrewText: שְׁמַ֣ע עֵ֭צָה וְקַבֵּ֣ל מוּסָ֑ר לְ֝מַ֗עַן תֶּחְכַּ֥ם בְּאַחֲרִיתֶֽךָ׃
verses.englishText: Hear counsel, and receive instruction, that thou mayest be wise in thy latter end.

jps.text: Hear counsel, and receive instruction, that thou mayest be wise in thy latter end.
