verses.hebrewText: רַבֹּ֣ות מַחֲשָׁבֹ֣ות בְּלֶב־אִ֑ישׁ וַעֲצַ֥ת יְ֝הוָ֗ה הִ֣יא תָקֽוּם׃
verses.englishText: There are many devices in a man's heart; but the counsel of the LORD, that shall stand.

jps.text: There are many devices in a man's heart; but the counsel of the LORD, that shall stand.

verses.hebrewText: תַּאֲוַ֣ת אָדָ֣ם חַסְדֹּ֑ו וְטֹֽוב־רָ֝שׁ מֵאִ֥ישׁ כָּזָֽב׃
verses.englishText: The lust of a man is his shame; and a poor man is better than a liar.

jps.text: The lust of a man is his shame; and a poor man is better than a liar.

verses.hebrewText: יִרְאַ֣ת יְהוָ֣ה לְחַיִּ֑ים וְשָׂבֵ֥עַ יָ֝לִ֗ין בַּל־יִפָּ֥קֶד רָֽע׃
verses.englishText: The fear of the LORD tendeth to life; and he that hath it shall abide satisfied, he shall not be visited with evil.

jps.text: The fear of the LORD tendeth to life; and he that hath it shall abide satisfied, he shall not be visited with evil.

verses.hebrewText: טָ֘מַ֤ן עָצֵ֣ל יָ֭דֹו בַּצַּלָּ֑חַת גַּם־אֶל־פִּ֝֗יהוּ לֹ֣א יְשִׁיבֶֽנָּה׃
verses.englishText: The sluggard burieth his hand in the dish, and will not so much as bring it back to his mouth.

jps.text: The sluggard burieth his hand in the dish, and will not so much as bring it back to his mouth.

verses.hebrewText: לֵ֣ץ תַּ֭כֶּה וּפֶ֣תִי יַעְרִ֑ם וְהֹוכִ֥יחַ לְ֝נָבֹ֗ון יָבִ֥ין דָּֽעַת׃
verses.englishText: When thou smitest a scorner, the simple will become prudent; and when one that hath understanding is reproved, he will understand knowledge.

jps.text: When thou smitest a scorner, the simple will become prudent; and when one that hath understanding is reproved, he will understand knowledge.

verses.hebrewText: מְֽשַׁדֶּד־אָ֭ב יַבְרִ֣יחַ אֵ֑ם בֵּ֝֗ן מֵבִ֥ישׁ וּמַחְפִּֽיר׃
verses.englishText: A son that dealeth shamefully and reproachfully will despoil his father, and chase away his mother.

jps.text: A son that dealeth shamefully and reproachfully will despoil his father, and chase away his mother.

verses.hebrewText: חַֽדַל־בְּ֭נִי לִשְׁמֹ֣עַ מוּסָ֑ר לִ֝שְׁגֹ֗ות מֵֽאִמְרֵי־דָֽעַת׃
verses.englishText: Cease, my son, to hear the instruction that causeth to err from the words of knowledge.

jps.text: Cease, my son, to hear the instruction that causeth to err from the words of knowledge.

verses.hebrewText: עֵ֣ד בְּ֭לִיַּעַל יָלִ֣יץ מִשְׁפָּ֑ט וּפִ֥י רְ֝שָׁעִ֗ים יְבַלַּע־אָֽוֶן׃
verses.englishText: An ungodly witness mocketh at right; and the mouth of the wicked devoureth iniquity.

jps.text: An ungodly witness mocketh at right; and the mouth of the wicked devoureth iniquity.

verses.hebrewText: נָכֹ֣ונוּ לַלֵּצִ֣ים שְׁפָטִ֑ים וּ֝מַהֲלֻמֹ֗ות לְגֵ֣ו כְּסִילִֽים׃
verses.englishText: Judgments are prepared for scorners, and stripes for the back of fools.

jps.text: Judgments are prepared for scorners, and stripes for the back of fools.

verses.hebrewText: לֵ֣ץ הַ֭יַּין הֹמֶ֣ה שֵׁכָ֑ר וְכָל־שֹׁ֥גֶה בֹּ֝֗ו לֹ֣א יֶחְכָּֽם׃
verses.englishText: Wine is a mocker, strong drink is riotous; and whosoever reeleth thereby is not wise.

jps.text: Wine is a mocker, strong drink is riotous; and whosoever reeleth thereby is not wise.

verses.hebrewText: נַ֣הַם כַּ֭כְּפִיר אֵ֣ימַת מֶ֑לֶךְ מִ֝תְעַבְּרֹ֗ו חֹוטֵ֥א נַפְשֹֽׁו׃
verses.englishText: The terror of a king is as the roaring of a lion: he that provoketh him to anger forfeiteth his life.

jps.text: The terror of a king is as the roaring of a lion: he that provoketh him to anger forfeiteth his life.

verses.hebrewText: כָּבֹ֣וד לָ֭אִישׁ שֶׁ֣בֶת מֵרִ֑יב וְכָל־אֱ֝וִ֗יל יִתְגַּלָּֽע׃
verses.englishText: It is an honour for a man to keep aloof from strife; but every fool will be snarling.

jps.text: It is an honour for a man to keep aloof from strife; but every fool will be snarling.

verses.hebrewText: מֵ֭חֹרֶף עָצֵ֣ל לֹא־יַחֲרֹ֑שׁ *יִשְׁאַל (וְשָׁאַ֖ל) בַּקָּצִ֣יר וָאָֽיִן׃
verses.englishText: The sluggard will not plow when winter setteth in; therefore he shall beg in harvest, and have nothing.

jps.text: The sluggard will not plow when winter setteth in; therefore he shall beg in harvest, and have nothing.

verses.hebrewText: מַ֣יִם עֲ֭מֻקִּים עֵצָ֣ה בְלֶב־אִ֑ישׁ וְאִ֖ישׁ תְּבוּנָ֣ה יִדְלֶֽנָּה׃
verses.englishText: Counsel in the heart of man is like deep water; but a man of understanding will draw it out.

jps.text: Counsel in the heart of man is like deep water; but a man of understanding will draw it out.

verses.hebrewText: רָב־אָדָ֗ם יִ֭קְרָא אִ֣ישׁ חַסְדֹּ֑ו וְאִ֥ישׁ אֱ֝מוּנִ֗ים מִ֣י יִמְצָֽא׃
verses.englishText: Most men will proclaim every one his own goodness; but a faithful man who can find?

jps.text: Most men will proclaim every one his own goodness; but a faithful man who can find?

verses.hebrewText: מִתְהַלֵּ֣ךְ בְּתֻמֹּ֣ו צַדִּ֑יק אַשְׁרֵ֖י בָנָ֣יו אַחֲרָֽיו׃
verses.englishText: He that walketh in his integrity as a just man, happy are his children after him.

jps.text: He that walketh in his integrity as a just man, happy are his children after him.

verses.hebrewText: מֶ֗לֶךְ יֹושֵׁ֥ב עַל־כִּסֵּא־דִ֑ין מְזָרֶ֖ה בְעֵינָ֣יו כָּל־רָֽע׃
verses.englishText: A king that sitteth on the throne of judgment scattereth away all evil with his eyes.

jps.text: A king that sitteth on the throne of judgment scattereth away all evil with his eyes.

verses.hebrewText: מִֽי־יֹ֭אמַר זִכִּ֣יתִי לִבִּ֑י טָ֝הַ֗רְתִּי מֵחַטָּאתִֽי׃
verses.englishText: Who can say: 'I have made my heart clean, I am pure from my sin'?

jps.text: Who can say: 'I have made my heart clean, I am pure from my sin'?

verses.hebrewText: אֶ֣בֶן וָ֭אֶבֶן אֵיפָ֣ה וְאֵיפָ֑ה תֹּועֲבַ֥ת יְ֝הוָ֗ה גַּם־שְׁנֵיהֶֽם׃
verses.englishText: Divers weights, and divers measures, both of them alike are an abomination to the LORD.

jps.text: Divers weights, and divers measures, both of them alike are an abomination to the LORD.

verses.hebrewText: גַּ֣ם בְּ֭מַעֲלָלָיו יִתְנַכֶּר־נָ֑עַר אִם־זַ֖ךְ וְאִם־יָשָׁ֣ר פָּעֳלֹֽו׃
verses.englishText: Even a child is known by his doings, whether his work be pure, and whether it be right.

jps.text: Even a child is known by his doings, whether his work be pure, and whether it be right.

verses.hebrewText: אֹ֣זֶן שֹׁ֭מַעַת וְעַ֣יִן רֹאָ֑ה יְ֝הוָ֗ה עָשָׂ֥ה גַם־שְׁנֵיהֶֽם׃
verses.englishText: The hearing ear, and the seeing eye, the LORD hath made even both of them.

jps.text: The hearing ear, and the seeing eye, the LORD hath made even both of them.

verses.hebrewText: אַל־תֶּֽאֱהַ֣ב שֵׁ֭נָה פֶּן־תִּוָּרֵ֑שׁ פְּקַ֖ח עֵינֶ֣יךָ שְֽׂבַֽע־לָֽחֶם׃
verses.englishText: Love not sleep, lest thou come to poverty; open thine eyes, and thou shalt have bread in plenty.

jps.text: Love not sleep, lest thou come to poverty; open thine eyes, and thou shalt have bread in plenty.

verses.hebrewText: רַ֣ע רַ֭ע יֹאמַ֣ר הַקֹּונֶ֑ה וְאֹזֵ֥ל לֹ֝֗ו אָ֣ז יִתְהַלָּֽל׃
verses.englishText: 'It is bad, it is bad', saith the buyer; but when he is gone his way, then he boasteth.

jps.text: 'It is bad, it is bad', saith the buyer; but when he is gone his way, then he boasteth.

verses.hebrewText: יֵ֣שׁ זָ֭הָב וְרָב־פְּנִינִ֑ים וּכְלִ֥י יְ֝קָ֗ר שִׂפְתֵי־דָֽעַת׃
verses.englishText: There is gold, and a multitude of rubies; but the lips of knowledge are a precious jewel.

jps.text: There is gold, and a multitude of rubies; but the lips of knowledge are a precious jewel.

verses.hebrewText: לְֽקַח־בִּ֭גְדֹו כִּי־עָ֣רַב זָ֑ר וּבְעַ֖ד *נָכְרִים (נָכְרִיָּ֣ה) חַבְלֵֽהוּ׃
verses.englishText: Take his garment that is surety for a stranger; and hold him in pledge that is surety for an alien woman.

jps.text: Take his garment that is surety for a stranger; and hold him in pledge that is surety for an alien woman.

verses.hebrewText: עָרֵ֣ב לָ֭אִישׁ לֶ֣חֶם שָׁ֑קֶר וְ֝אַחַ֗ר יִמָּֽלֵא־פִ֥יהוּ חָצָֽץ׃
verses.englishText: Bread of falsehood is sweet to a man; but afterwards his mouth shall be filled with gravel.

jps.text: Bread of falsehood is sweet to a man; but afterwards his mouth shall be filled with gravel.

verses.hebrewText: מַ֭חֲשָׁבֹות בְּעֵצָ֣ה תִכֹּ֑ון וּ֝בְתַחְבֻּלֹ֗ות עֲשֵׂ֣ה מִלְחָמָֽה׃
verses.englishText: Every purpose is established by counsel; and with good advice carry on war.

jps.text: Every purpose is established by counsel; and with good advice carry on war.

verses.hebrewText: גֹּֽולֶה־סֹּ֭וד הֹולֵ֣ךְ רָכִ֑יל וּלְפֹתֶ֥ה שְׂ֝פָתָ֗יו לֹ֣א תִתְעָרָֽב׃
verses.englishText: He that goeth about as a talebearer revealeth secrets; therefore meddle not with him that openeth wide his lips.

jps.text: He that goeth about as a talebearer revealeth secrets; therefore meddle not with him that openeth wide his lips.

verses.hebrewText: מְ֭קַלֵּל אָבִ֣יו וְאִמֹּ֑ו יִֽדְעַ֥ךְ נֵ֝רֹ֗ו *בְּאִישֹׁון (בֶּאֱשׁ֥וּן) חֹֽשֶׁךְ׃
verses.englishText: Whoso curseth his father or his mother, his lamp shall be put out in the blackest darkness.

jps.text: Whoso curseth his father or his mother, his lamp shall be put out in the blackest darkness.

verses.hebrewText: נַ֭חֲלָה *מְבֻחֶלֶת (מְבֹהֶ֣לֶת) בָּרִאשֹׁנָ֑ה וְ֝אַחֲרִיתָ֗הּ לֹ֣א תְבֹרָֽךְ׃
verses.englishText: An estate may be gotten hastily at the beginning; but the end thereof shall not be blessed.

jps.text: An estate may be gotten hastily at the beginning; but the end thereof shall not be blessed.

verses.hebrewText: אַל־תֹּאמַ֥ר אֲשַׁלְּמָה־רָ֑ע קַוֵּ֥ה לַֽ֝יהוָ֗ה וְיֹ֣שַֽׁע לָֽךְ׃
verses.englishText: Say not thou: 'I will requite evil'; wait for the LORD, and He will save thee.

jps.text: Say not thou: 'I will requite evil'; wait for the LORD, and He will save thee.

verses.hebrewText: תֹּועֲבַ֣ת יְ֭הוָה אֶ֣בֶן וָאָ֑בֶן וּמֹאזְנֵ֖י מִרְמָ֣ה לֹא־טֹֽוב׃
verses.englishText: Divers weights are an abomination to the LORD; and a false balance is not good.

jps.text: Divers weights are an abomination to the LORD; and a false balance is not good.

verses.hebrewText: מֵיְהוָ֥ה מִצְעֲדֵי־גָ֑בֶר וְ֝אָדָ֗ם מַה־יָּבִ֥ין דַּרְכֹּֽו׃
verses.englishText: A man's goings are of the LORD; how then can man look to his way?

jps.text: A man's goings are of the LORD; how then can man look to his way?

verses.hebrewText: מֹוקֵ֣שׁ אָ֭דָם יָ֣לַע קֹ֑דֶשׁ וְאַחַ֖ר נְדָרִ֣ים לְבַקֵּֽר׃
verses.englishText: It is a snare to a man rashly to say: 'Holy', and after vows to make inquiry.

jps.text: It is a snare to a man rashly to say: 'Holy', and after vows to make inquiry.

verses.hebrewText: מְזָרֶ֣ה רְ֭שָׁעִים מֶ֣לֶךְ חָכָ֑ם וַיָּ֖שֶׁב עֲלֵיהֶ֣ם אֹופָֽן׃
verses.englishText: A wise king sifteth the wicked, and turneth the wheel over them.

jps.text: A wise king sifteth the wicked, and turneth the wheel over them.

verses.hebrewText: נֵ֣ר יְ֭הוָה נִשְׁמַ֣ת אָדָ֑ם חֹ֝פֵ֗שׂ כָּל־חַדְרֵי־בָֽטֶן׃
verses.englishText: The spirit of man is the lamp of the LORD, searching all the inward parts.

jps.text: The spirit of man is the lamp of the LORD, searching all the inward parts.

verses.hebrewText: חֶ֣סֶד וֶ֭אֱמֶת יִצְּרוּ־מֶ֑לֶךְ וְסָעַ֖ד בַּחֶ֣סֶד כִּסְאֹֽו׃
verses.englishText: Mercy and truth preserve the king; and his throne is upheld by mercy.

jps.text: Mercy and truth preserve the king; and his throne is upheld by mercy.

verses.hebrewText: תִּפְאֶ֣רֶת בַּחוּרִ֣ים כֹּחָ֑ם וַהֲדַ֖ר זְקֵנִ֣ים שֵׂיבָֽה׃
verses.englishText: The glory of young men is their strength; and the beauty of old men is the hoary head.

jps.text: The glory of young men is their strength; and the beauty of old men is the hoary head.

verses.hebrewText: חַבֻּרֹ֣ות פֶּ֭צַע *תַּמְרִיק (תַּמְר֣וּק) בְּרָ֑ע וּ֝מַכֹּ֗ות חַדְרֵי־בָֽטֶן׃
verses.englishText: Sharp wounds cleanse away evil; so do stripes that reach the inward parts.

jps.text: Sharp wounds cleanse away evil; so do stripes that reach the inward parts.

verses.hebrewText: פַּלְגֵי־מַ֣יִם לֶב־מֶ֭לֶךְ בְּיַד־יְהוָ֑ה עַֽל־כָּל־אֲשֶׁ֖ר יַחְפֹּ֣ץ יַטֶּֽנּוּ׃
verses.englishText: The king's heart is in the hand of the LORD as the watercourses: He turneth it whithersoever He will.

jps.text: The king's heart is in the hand of the LORD as the watercourses: He turneth it whithersoever He will.

verses.hebrewText: כָּֽל־דֶּרֶךְ־אִ֭ישׁ יָשָׁ֣ר בְּעֵינָ֑יו וְתֹכֵ֖ן לִבֹּ֣ות יְהוָֽה׃
verses.englishText: Every way of a man is right in his own eyes; but the LORD weigheth the hearts.

jps.text: Every way of a man is right in his own eyes; but the LORD weigheth the hearts.

verses.hebrewText: עֲ֭שֹׂה צְדָקָ֣ה וּמִשְׁפָּ֑ט נִבְחָ֖ר לַיהוָ֣ה מִזָּֽבַח׃
verses.englishText: To do righteousness and justice is more acceptable to the LORD than sacrifice.

jps.text: To do righteousness and justice is more acceptable to the LORD than sacrifice.

verses.hebrewText: רוּם־עֵ֭ינַיִם וּרְחַב־לֵ֑ב נִ֖ר רְשָׁעִ֣ים חַטָּֽאת׃
verses.englishText: A haughty look, and a proud heart — the tillage of the wicked is sin.

jps.text: A haughty look, and a proud heart — the tillage of the wicked is sin.

verses.hebrewText: מַחְשְׁבֹ֣ות חָ֭רוּץ אַךְ־לְמֹותָ֑ר וְכָל־אָ֝֗ץ אַךְ־לְמַחְסֹֽור׃
verses.englishText: The thoughts of the diligent tend only to plenteousness; but every one that is hasty hasteth only to want.

jps.text: The thoughts of the diligent tend only to plenteousness; but every one that is hasty hasteth only to want.

verses.hebrewText: פֹּ֣עַל אֹ֭וצָרֹות בִּלְשֹׁ֣ון שָׁ֑קֶר הֶ֥בֶל נִ֝דָּ֗ף מְבַקְשֵׁי־מָֽוֶת׃
verses.englishText: The getting of treasures by a lying tongue is a vapour driven to and fro; they that seek them seek death.

jps.text: The getting of treasures by a lying tongue is a vapour driven to and fro; they that seek them seek death.

verses.hebrewText: שֹׁד־רְשָׁעִ֥ים יְגֹורֵ֑ם כִּ֥י מֵ֝אֲנ֗וּ לַעֲשֹׂ֥ות מִשְׁפָּֽט׃
verses.englishText: The violence of the wicked shall drag them away; because they refuse to do justly.

jps.text: The violence of the wicked shall drag them away; because they refuse to do justly.

verses.hebrewText: הֲפַכְפַּ֬ךְ דֶּ֣רֶךְ אִ֣ישׁ וָזָ֑ר וְ֝זַ֗ךְ יָשָׁ֥ר פָּעֳלֹֽו׃
verses.englishText: The way of man is froward and strange; but as for the pure, his work is right.

jps.text: The way of man is froward and strange; but as for the pure, his work is right.

verses.hebrewText: טֹ֗וב לָשֶׁ֥בֶת עַל־פִּנַּת־גָּ֑ג מֵאֵ֥שֶׁת מִ֝דְיָנִ֗ים וּבֵ֥ית חָֽבֶר׃
verses.englishText: It is better to dwell in a corner of the housetop, than in a house in common with a contentious woman.

jps.text: It is better to dwell in a corner of the housetop, than in a house in common with a contentious woman.

verses.hebrewText: נֶ֣פֶשׁ רָ֭שָׁע אִוְּתָה־רָ֑ע לֹא־יֻחַ֖ן בְּעֵינָ֣יו רֵעֵֽהוּ׃
verses.englishText: The soul of the wicked desireth evil; his neighbour findeth no favour in his eyes.

jps.text: The soul of the wicked desireth evil; his neighbour findeth no favour in his eyes.

verses.hebrewText: בַּעְנָשׁ־לֵ֭ץ יֶחְכַּם־פֶּ֑תִי וּבְהַשְׂכִּ֥יל לְ֝חָכָ֗ם יִקַּח־דָּֽעַת׃
verses.englishText: When the scorner is punished, the thoughtless is made wise; and when the wise is instructed, he receiveth knowledge.

jps.text: When the scorner is punished, the thoughtless is made wise; and when the wise is instructed, he receiveth knowledge.

verses.hebrewText: מַשְׂכִּ֣יל צַ֭דִּיק לְבֵ֣ית רָשָׁ֑ע מְסַלֵּ֖ף רְשָׁעִ֣ים לָרָֽע׃
verses.englishText: The Righteous One considereth the house of the wicked; overthrowing the wicked to their ruin.

jps.text: The Righteous One considereth the house of the wicked; overthrowing the wicked to their ruin.

verses.hebrewText: אֹטֵ֣ם אָ֭זְנֹו מִזַּעֲקַת־דָּ֑ל גַּֽם־ה֥וּא יִ֝קְרָ֗א וְלֹ֣א יֵעָנֶֽה׃
verses.englishText: Whoso stoppeth his ears at the cry of the poor, he also shall cry himself, but shall not be answered.

jps.text: Whoso stoppeth his ears at the cry of the poor, he also shall cry himself, but shall not be answered.

verses.hebrewText: מַתָּ֣ן בַּ֭סֵּתֶר יִכְפֶּה־אָ֑ף וְשֹׁ֥חַד בַּ֝חֵ֗ק חֵמָ֥ה עַזָּֽה׃
verses.englishText: A gift in secret pacifieth anger, and a present in the bosom strong wrath.

jps.text: A gift in secret pacifieth anger, and a present in the bosom strong wrath.

verses.hebrewText: שִׂמְחָ֣ה לַ֭צַּדִּיק עֲשֹׂ֣ות מִשְׁפָּ֑ט וּ֝מְחִתָּ֗ה לְפֹ֣עֲלֵי אָֽוֶן׃
verses.englishText: To do justly is joy to the righteous, but ruin to the workers of iniquity.

jps.text: To do justly is joy to the righteous, but ruin to the workers of iniquity.

verses.hebrewText: אָדָ֗ם תֹּ֭ועֶה מִדֶּ֣רֶךְ הַשְׂכֵּ֑ל בִּקְהַ֖ל רְפָאִ֣ים יָנֽוּחַ׃
verses.englishText: The man that strayeth out of the way of understanding shall rest in the congregation of the shades.

jps.text: The man that strayeth out of the way of understanding shall rest in the congregation of the shades.

verses.hebrewText: אִ֣ישׁ מַ֭חְסֹור אֹהֵ֣ב שִׂמְחָ֑ה אֹהֵ֥ב יַֽיִן־וָ֝שֶׁ֗מֶן לֹ֣א יַעֲשִֽׁיר׃
verses.englishText: He that loveth pleasure shall be a poor man; he that loveth wine and oil shall not be rich.

jps.text: He that loveth pleasure shall be a poor man; he that loveth wine and oil shall not be rich.

verses.hebrewText: כֹּ֣פֶר לַצַּדִּ֣יק רָשָׁ֑ע וְתַ֖חַת יְשָׁרִ֣ים בֹּוגֵֽד׃
verses.englishText: The wicked is a ransom for the righteous; and the faithless cometh in the stead of the upright.

jps.text: The wicked is a ransom for the righteous; and the faithless cometh in the stead of the upright.

verses.hebrewText: טֹ֗וב שֶׁ֥בֶת בְּאֶֽרֶץ־מִדְבָּ֑ר מֵאֵ֖שֶׁת *מְדֹונִים (מִדְיָנִ֣ים) וָכָֽעַס׃
verses.englishText: It is better to dwell in a desert land, than with a contentious and fretful woman.

jps.text: It is better to dwell in a desert land, than with a contentious and fretful woman.

verses.hebrewText: אֹוצָ֤ר ׀ נֶחְמָ֣ד וָ֭שֶׁמֶן בִּנְוֵ֣ה חָכָ֑ם וּכְסִ֖יל אָדָ֣ם יְבַלְּעֶֽנּוּ׃
verses.englishText: There is desirable treasure and oil in the dwelling of the wise; but a foolish man swalloweth it up.

jps.text: There is desirable treasure and oil in the dwelling of the wise; but a foolish man swalloweth it up.

verses.hebrewText: רֹ֭דֵף צְדָקָ֣ה וָחָ֑סֶד יִמְצָ֥א חַ֝יִּ֗ים צְדָקָ֥ה וְכָבֹֽוד׃
verses.englishText: He that followeth after righteousness and mercy findeth life, prosperity, and honour.

jps.text: He that followeth after righteousness and mercy findeth life, prosperity, and honour.

verses.hebrewText: עִ֣יר גִּ֭בֹּרִים עָלָ֣ה חָכָ֑ם וַ֝יֹּ֗רֶד עֹ֣ז מִבְטֶחָֽה׃
verses.englishText: A wise man scaleth the city of the mighty, and bringeth down the stronghold wherein it trusteth.

jps.text: A wise man scaleth the city of the mighty, and bringeth down the stronghold wherein it trusteth.

verses.hebrewText: שֹׁמֵ֣ר פִּ֭יו וּלְשֹׁונֹ֑ו שֹׁמֵ֖ר מִצָּרֹ֣ות נַפְשֹֽׁו׃
verses.englishText: Whoso keepeth his mouth and his tongue keepeth his soul from troubles.

jps.text: Whoso keepeth his mouth and his tongue keepeth his soul from troubles.

verses.hebrewText: זֵ֣ד יָ֭הִיר לֵ֣ץ שְׁמֹ֑ו עֹ֝ושֶׂ֗ה בְּעֶבְרַ֥ת זָדֹֽון׃
verses.englishText: A proud and haughty man, scorner is his name, even he that dealeth in overbearing pride.

jps.text: A proud and haughty man, scorner is his name, even he that dealeth in overbearing pride.

verses.hebrewText: תַּאֲוַ֣ת עָצֵ֣ל תְּמִיתֶ֑נּוּ כִּֽי־מֵאֲנ֖וּ יָדָ֣יו לַעֲשֹֽׂות׃
verses.englishText: The desire of the slothful killeth him; for his hands refuse to labour.

jps.text: The desire of the slothful killeth him; for his hands refuse to labour.

verses.hebrewText: כָּל־הַ֭יֹּום הִתְאַוָּ֣ה תַאֲוָ֑ה וְצַדִּ֥יק יִ֝תֵּ֗ן וְלֹ֣א יַחְשֹֽׂךְ׃
verses.englishText: There is that coveteth greedily all the day long; but the righteous giveth and spareth not.

jps.text: There is that coveteth greedily all the day long; but the righteous giveth and spareth not.

verses.hebrewText: זֶ֣בַח רְ֭שָׁעִים תֹּועֵבָ֑ה אַ֝֗ף כִּֽי־בְזִמָּ֥ה יְבִיאֶֽנּוּ׃
verses.englishText: The sacrifice of the wicked is an abomination; how much more, when he bringeth it with the proceeds of wickedness?

jps.text: The sacrifice of the wicked is an abomination; how much more, when he bringeth it with the proceeds of wickedness?

verses.hebrewText: עֵד־כְּזָבִ֥ים יֹאבֵ֑ד וְאִ֥ישׁ שֹׁ֝ומֵ֗עַ לָנֶ֥צַח יְדַבֵּֽר׃
verses.englishText: A false witness shall perish; but the man that obeyeth shall speak unchallenged.

jps.text: A false witness shall perish; but the man that obeyeth shall speak unchallenged.

verses.hebrewText: הֵעֵ֬ז אִ֣ישׁ רָשָׁ֣ע בְּפָנָ֑יו וְ֝יָשָׁ֗ר ה֤וּא ׀ *יָכִין (יָבִ֬ין) *דְּרָכָיו (דַּרְכֹּֽו)׃
verses.englishText: A wicked man hardeneth his face; but as for the upright, he looketh well to his way.

jps.text: A wicked man hardeneth his face; but as for the upright, he looketh well to his way.

verses.hebrewText: אֵ֣ין חָ֭כְמָה וְאֵ֣ין תְּבוּנָ֑ה וְאֵ֥ין עֵ֝צָ֗ה לְנֶ֣גֶד יְהוָֽה׃ פ
verses.englishText: There is no wisdom nor understanding nor counsel against the LORD.

jps.text: There is no wisdom nor understanding nor counsel against the LORD.

verses.hebrewText: ס֗וּס מ֭וּכָן לְיֹ֣ום מִלְחָמָ֑ה וְ֝לַֽיהוָ֗ה הַתְּשׁוּעָֽה׃
verses.englishText: The horse is prepared against the day of battle; but victory is of the LORD.

jps.text: The horse is prepared against the day of battle; but victory is of the LORD.

verses.hebrewText: נִבְחָ֣ר שֵׁ֭ם מֵעֹ֣שֶׁר רָ֑ב מִכֶּ֥סֶף וּ֝מִזָּהָ֗ב חֵ֣ן טֹֽוב׃
verses.englishText: A good name is rather to be chosen than great riches, and loving favour rather than silver and gold.

jps.text: A good name is rather to be chosen than great riches, and loving favour rather than silver and gold.

verses.hebrewText: עָשִׁ֣יר וָרָ֣שׁ נִפְגָּ֑שׁוּ עֹשֵׂ֖ה כֻלָּ֣ם יְהוָֽה׃
verses.englishText: The rich and the poor meet together — the LORD is the maker of them all.

jps.text: The rich and the poor meet together — the LORD is the maker of them all.

verses.hebrewText: עָר֤וּם ׀ רָאָ֣ה רָעָ֣ה *וְיִסָּתֵר (וְנִסְתָּ֑ר) וּ֝פְתָיִ֗ים עָבְר֥וּ וְֽנֶעֱנָֽשׁוּ׃
verses.englishText: A prudent man seeth the evil, and hideth himself; but the thoughtless pass on, and are punished.

jps.text: A prudent man seeth the evil, and hideth himself; but the thoughtless pass on, and are punished.

verses.hebrewText: עֵ֣קֶב עֲ֭נָוָה יִרְאַ֣ת יְהוָ֑ה עֹ֖שֶׁר וְכָבֹ֣וד וְחַיִּֽים׃
verses.englishText: The reward of humility is the fear of the LORD, even riches, and honour, and life.

jps.text: The reward of humility is the fear of the LORD, even riches, and honour, and life.

verses.hebrewText: צִנִּ֣ים פַּ֭חִים בְּדֶ֣רֶךְ עִקֵּ֑שׁ שֹׁומֵ֥ר נַ֝פְשֹׁ֗ו יִרְחַ֥ק מֵהֶֽם׃
verses.englishText: Thorns and snares are in the way of the froward; he that keepeth his soul holdeth himself far from them.

jps.text: Thorns and snares are in the way of the froward; he that keepeth his soul holdeth himself far from them.

verses.hebrewText: חֲנֹ֣ךְ לַ֭נַּעַר עַל־פִּ֣י דַרְכֹּ֑ו גַּ֥ם כִּֽי־יַ֝זְקִ֗ין לֹֽא־יָס֥וּר מִמֶּֽנָּה׃
verses.englishText: Train up a child in the way he should go, and even when he is old, he will not depart from it.

jps.text: Train up a child in the way he should go, and even when he is old, he will not depart from it.

verses.hebrewText: עָ֭שִׁיר בְּרָשִׁ֣ים יִמְשֹׁ֑ול וְעֶ֥בֶד לֹ֝וֶ֗ה לְאִ֣ישׁ מַלְוֶֽה׃
verses.englishText: The rich ruleth over the poor, and the borrower is servant to the lender.

jps.text: The rich ruleth over the poor, and the borrower is servant to the lender.

verses.hebrewText: זֹורֵ֣עַ עַ֭וְלָה *יִקְצֹור־ (יִקְצָר)־אָ֑וֶן וְשֵׁ֖בֶט עֶבְרָתֹ֣ו יִכְלֶֽה׃
verses.englishText: He that soweth iniquity shall reap vanity; and the rod of his wrath shall fail.

jps.text: He that soweth iniquity shall reap vanity; and the rod of his wrath shall fail.

verses.hebrewText: טֹֽוב־עַ֭יִן ה֣וּא יְבֹרָ֑ךְ כִּֽי־נָתַ֖ן מִלַּחְמֹ֣ו לַדָּֽל׃
verses.englishText: He that hath a bountiful eye shall be blessed; for he giveth of his bread to the poor.

jps.text: He that hath a bountiful eye shall be blessed; for he giveth of his bread to the poor.

verses.hebrewText: גָּ֣רֵֽשׁ לֵ֭ץ וְיֵצֵ֣א מָדֹ֑ון וְ֝יִשְׁבֹּ֗ת דִּ֣ין וְקָלֹֽון׃
verses.englishText: Cast out the scorner, and contention will go out; yea, strife and shame will cease.

jps.text: Cast out the scorner, and contention will go out; yea, strife and shame will cease.

verses.hebrewText: אֹהֵ֥ב *טְהֹור־ (טְהָר)־לֵ֑ב חֵ֥ן שְׂ֝פָתָ֗יו רֵעֵ֥הוּ מֶֽלֶךְ׃
verses.englishText: He that loveth pureness of heart, that hath grace in his lips, the king shall be his friend.

jps.text: He that loveth pureness of heart, that hath grace in his lips, the king shall be his friend.

verses.hebrewText: עֵינֵ֣י יְ֭הוָה נָ֣צְרוּ דָ֑עַת וַ֝יְסַלֵּ֗ף דִּבְרֵ֥י בֹגֵֽד׃
verses.englishText: The eyes of the LORD preserve him that hath knowledge, but He overthroweth the words of the faithless man.

jps.text: The eyes of the LORD preserve him that hath knowledge, but He overthroweth the words of the faithless man.

verses.hebrewText: אָמַ֣ר עָ֭צֵל אֲרִ֣י בַח֑וּץ בְּתֹ֥וךְ רְ֝חֹבֹ֗ות אֵֽרָצֵֽחַ׃
verses.englishText: The sluggard saith: 'There is a lion without; I shall be slain in the streets.'

jps.text: The sluggard saith: 'There is a lion without; I shall be slain in the streets.'

verses.hebrewText: שׁוּחָ֣ה עֲ֭מֻקָּה פִּ֣י זָרֹ֑ות זְע֥וּם יְ֝הוָ֗ה *יִפֹּול־ (יִפָּל)־שָֽׁם׃
verses.englishText: The mouth of strange women is a deep pit: he that is abhorred of the LORD shall fall therein.

jps.text: The mouth of strange women is a deep pit: he that is abhorred of the LORD shall fall therein.

verses.hebrewText: אִ֭וֶּלֶת קְשׁוּרָ֣ה בְלֶב־נָ֑עַר שֵׁ֥בֶט מ֝וּסָ֗ר יַרְחִיקֶ֥נָּה מִמֶּֽנּוּ׃
verses.englishText: Foolishness is bound up in the heart of a child; but the rod of correction shall drive it far from him.

jps.text: Foolishness is bound up in the heart of a child; but the rod of correction shall drive it far from him.

verses.hebrewText: עֹ֣שֵֽׁק דָּ֭ל לְהַרְבֹּ֣ות לֹ֑ו נֹתֵ֥ן לְ֝עָשִׁ֗יר אַךְ־לְמַחְסֹֽור׃
verses.englishText: One may oppress the poor, yet will their gain increase; one may give to the rich, yet will want come.

jps.text: One may oppress the poor, yet will their gain increase; one may give to the rich, yet will want come.

verses.hebrewText: הַ֥ט אָזְנְךָ֗ וּ֭שְׁמַע דִּבְרֵ֣י חֲכָמִ֑ים וְ֝לִבְּךָ֗ תָּשִׁ֥ית לְדַעְתִּֽי׃
verses.englishText: Incline thine ear, and hear the words of the wise, and apply thy heart unto my knowledge.

jps.text: Incline thine ear, and hear the words of the wise, and apply thy heart unto my knowledge.

verses.hebrewText: כִּֽי־נָ֭עִים כִּֽי־תִשְׁמְרֵ֣ם בְּבִטְנֶ֑ךָ יִכֹּ֥נוּ יַ֝חְדָּ֗ו עַל־שְׂפָתֶֽיךָ׃
verses.englishText: For it is a pleasant thing if thou keep them within thee; let them be established altogether upon thy lips.

jps.text: For it is a pleasant thing if thou keep them within thee; let them be established altogether upon thy lips.

verses.hebrewText: לִהְיֹ֣ות בַּ֭יהוָה מִבְטַחֶ֑ךָ הֹודַעְתִּ֖יךָ הַיֹּ֣ום אַף־אָֽתָּה׃
verses.englishText: That thy trust may be in the LORD, I have made them known to thee this day, even to thee.

jps.text: That thy trust may be in the LORD, I have made them known to thee this day, even to thee.

verses.hebrewText: הֲלֹ֤א כָתַ֣בְתִּי לְ֭ךָ *שִׁלְשֹׁום (שָׁלִישִׁ֑ים) בְּמֹ֖ועֵצֹ֣ת וָדָֽעַת׃
verses.englishText: Have not I written unto thee excellent things of counsels and knowledge;

jps.text: Have not I written unto thee excellent things of counsels and knowledge;

verses.hebrewText: לְהֹודִֽיעֲךָ֗ קֹ֭שְׁטְ אִמְרֵ֣י אֱמֶ֑ת לְהָשִׁ֥יב אֲמָרִ֥ים אֱ֝מֶ֗ת לְשֹׁלְחֶֽיךָ׃ פ
verses.englishText: That I might make thee know the certainty of the words of truth, that thou mightest bring back words of truth to them that send thee?

jps.text: That I might make thee know the certainty of the words of truth, that thou mightest bring back words of truth to them that send thee?

verses.hebrewText: אַֽל־תִּגְזָל־דָּ֭ל כִּ֣י דַל־ה֑וּא וְאַל־תְּדַכֵּ֖א עָנִ֣י בַשָּֽׁעַר׃
verses.englishText: Rob not the weak, because he is weak, neither crush the poor in the gate;

jps.text: Rob not the weak, because he is weak, neither crush the poor in the gate;

verses.hebrewText: כִּֽי־יְ֭הוָה יָרִ֣יב רִיבָ֑ם וְקָבַ֖ע אֶת־קֹבְעֵיהֶ֣ם נָֽפֶשׁ׃
verses.englishText: For the LORD will plead their cause, and despoil of life those that despoil them.

jps.text: For the LORD will plead their cause, and despoil of life those that despoil them.

verses.hebrewText: אַל־תִּ֭תְרַע אֶת־בַּ֣עַל אָ֑ף וְאֶת־אִ֥ישׁ חֵ֝מֹות לֹ֣א תָבֹֽוא׃
verses.englishText: Make no friendship with a man that is given to anger; and with a wrathful man thou shalt not go;

jps.text: Make no friendship with a man that is given to anger; and with a wrathful man thou shalt not go;

verses.hebrewText: פֶּן־תֶּאֱלַ֥ף *אָרְחָתֹו (אֹֽרְחֹתָ֑יו) וְלָקַחְתָּ֖ מֹוקֵ֣שׁ לְנַפְשֶֽׁךָ׃
verses.englishText: Lest thou learn his ways, and get a snare to thy soul.

jps.text: Lest thou learn his ways, and get a snare to thy soul.

verses.hebrewText: אַל־תְּהִ֥י בְתֹֽקְעֵי־כָ֑ף בַּ֝עֹרְבִ֗ים מַשָּׁאֹֽות׃
verses.englishText: Be thou not of them that strike hands, or of them that are sureties for debts;

jps.text: Be thou not of them that strike hands, or of them that are sureties for debts;

verses.hebrewText: אִם־אֵֽין־לְךָ֥ לְשַׁלֵּ֑ם לָ֥מָּה יִקַּ֥ח מִ֝שְׁכָּבְךָ֗ מִתַּחְתֶּֽיךָ׃
verses.englishText: If thou hast not wherewith to pay, why should he take away thy bed from under thee?

jps.text: If thou hast not wherewith to pay, why should he take away thy bed from under thee?

verses.hebrewText: אַל־תַּ֭סֵּג גְּב֣וּל עֹולָ֑ם אֲשֶׁ֖ר עָשׂ֣וּ אֲבֹותֶֽיךָ׃
verses.englishText: Remove not the ancient landmark, which thy fathers have set.

jps.text: Remove not the ancient landmark, which thy fathers have set.

verses.hebrewText: חָזִ֡יתָ אִ֤ישׁ ׀ מָ֘הִ֤יר בִּמְלַאכְתֹּ֗ו לִֽפְנֵֽי־מְלָכִ֥ים יִתְיַצָּ֑ב בַּל־יִ֝תְיַצֵּב לִפְנֵ֥י חֲשֻׁכִּֽים׃ פ
verses.englishText: Seest thou a man diligent in his business? he shall stand before kings; he shall not stand before mean men.

jps.text: Seest thou a man diligent in his business? he shall stand before kings; he shall not stand before mean men.

verses.hebrewText: כִּֽי־תֵ֭שֵׁב לִלְחֹ֣ום אֶת־מֹושֵׁ֑ל בִּ֥ין תָּ֝בִ֗ין אֶת־אֲשֶׁ֥ר לְפָנֶֽיךָ׃
verses.englishText: When thou sittest to eat with a ruler, consider well him that is before thee;

jps.text: When thou sittest to eat with a ruler, consider well him that is before thee;

verses.hebrewText: וְשַׂמְתָּ֣ שַׂכִּ֣ין בְּלֹעֶ֑ךָ אִם־בַּ֖עַל נֶ֣פֶשׁ אָֽתָּה׃
verses.englishText: And put a knife to thy throat, if thou be a man given to appetite.

jps.text: And put a knife to thy throat, if thou be a man given to appetite.

verses.hebrewText: אַל־תִּ֭תְאָו לְמַטְעַמֹּותָ֑יו וְ֝ה֗וּא לֶ֣חֶם כְּזָבִֽים׃
verses.englishText: Be not desirous of his dainties; seeing they are deceitful food.

jps.text: Be not desirous of his dainties; seeing they are deceitful food.

verses.hebrewText: אַל־תִּיגַ֥ע לְֽהַעֲשִׁ֑יר מִֽבִּינָתְךָ֥ חֲדָֽל׃
verses.englishText: Weary not thyself to be rich; cease from thine own wisdom.

jps.text: Weary not thyself to be rich; cease from thine own wisdom.

verses.hebrewText: *הֲתָעוּף (הֲתָ֤עִיף) עֵינֶ֥יךָ בֹּ֗ו וְֽאֵ֫ינֶ֥נּוּ כִּ֤י עָשֹׂ֣ה יַעֲשֶׂה־לֹּ֣ו כְנָפַ֑יִם כְּ֝נֶ֗שֶׁר *וְעָיֵף (יָע֥וּף) הַשָּׁמָֽיִם׃ פ
verses.englishText: Wilt thou set thine eyes upon it? it is gone; for riches certainly make themselves wings, like an eagle that flieth toward heaven.

jps.text: Wilt thou set thine eyes upon it? it is gone; for riches certainly make themselves wings, like an eagle that flieth toward heaven.

verses.hebrewText: אַל־תִּלְחַ֗ם אֶת־לֶ֭חֶם רַ֣ע עָ֑יִן וְאַל־*תִּתְאָו (תִּ֝תְאָ֗יו) לְמַטְעַמֹּתָֽיו׃
verses.englishText: Eat thou not the bread of him that hath an evil eye, neither desire thou his dainties;

jps.text: Eat thou not the bread of him that hath an evil eye, neither desire thou his dainties;

verses.hebrewText: כִּ֤י ׀ כְּמֹו־שָׁעַ֥ר בְּנַפְשֹׁ֗ו כֶּ֫ן־ה֥וּא אֱכֹ֣ל וּ֭שְׁתֵה יֹ֣אמַר לָ֑ךְ וְ֝לִבֹּ֗ו בַּל־עִמָּֽךְ׃
verses.englishText: For as one that hath reckoned within himself, so is he: 'Eat and drink', saith he to thee; but his heart is not with thee.

jps.text: For as one that hath reckoned within himself, so is he: 'Eat and drink', saith he to thee; but his heart is not with thee.

verses.hebrewText: פִּֽתְּךָ־אָכַ֥לְתָּ תְקִיאֶ֑נָּה וְ֝שִׁחַ֗תָּ דְּבָרֶ֥יךָ הַנְּעִימִֽים׃
verses.englishText: The morsel which thou hast eaten shalt thou vomit up, and lose thy sweet words.

jps.text: The morsel which thou hast eaten shalt thou vomit up, and lose thy sweet words.

verses.hebrewText: בְּאָזְנֵ֣י כְ֭סִיל אַל־תְּדַבֵּ֑ר כִּֽי־יָ֝ב֗וּז לְשֵׂ֣כֶל מִלֶּֽיךָ׃
verses.englishText: Speak not in the ears of a fool; for he will despise the wisdom of thy words.

jps.text: Speak not in the ears of a fool; for he will despise the wisdom of thy words.

verses.hebrewText: אַל־תַּ֭סֵּג גְּב֣וּל עֹולָ֑ם וּבִשְׂדֵ֥י יְ֝תֹומִ֗ים אַל־תָּבֹֽא׃
verses.englishText: Remove not the ancient landmark; and enter not into the fields of the fatherless;

jps.text: Remove not the ancient landmark; and enter not into the fields of the fatherless;

verses.hebrewText: כִּֽי־גֹאֲלָ֥ם חָזָ֑ק הֽוּא־יָרִ֖יב אֶת־רִיבָ֣ם אִתָּֽךְ׃
verses.englishText: For their Redeemer is strong; He will plead their cause with thee.

jps.text: For their Redeemer is strong; He will plead their cause with thee.

verses.hebrewText: הָבִ֣יאָה לַמּוּסָ֣ר לִבֶּ֑ךָ וְ֝אָזְנֶ֗ךָ לְאִמְרֵי־דָֽעַת׃
verses.englishText: Apply thy heart unto instruction, and thine ears to the words of knowledge.

jps.text: Apply thy heart unto instruction, and thine ears to the words of knowledge.

verses.hebrewText: אַל־תִּמְנַ֣ע מִנַּ֣עַר מוּסָ֑ר כִּֽי־תַכֶּ֥נּוּ בַ֝שֵּׁ֗בֶט לֹ֣א יָמֽוּת׃
verses.englishText: Withhold not correction from the child; for though thou beat him with the rod, he will not die.

jps.text: Withhold not correction from the child; for though thou beat him with the rod, he will not die.

verses.hebrewText: אַ֭תָּה בַּשֵּׁ֣בֶט תַּכֶּ֑נּוּ וְ֝נַפְשֹׁ֗ו מִשְּׁאֹ֥ול תַּצִּֽיל׃
verses.englishText: Thou beatest him with the rod, and wilt deliver his soul from the nether-world.

jps.text: Thou beatest him with the rod, and wilt deliver his soul from the nether-world.

verses.hebrewText: בְּ֭נִי אִם־חָכַ֣ם לִבֶּ֑ךָ יִשְׂמַ֖ח לִבִּ֣י גַם־אָֽנִי׃
verses.englishText: My son, if thy heart be wise, my heart will be glad, even mine;

jps.text: My son, if thy heart be wise, my heart will be glad, even mine;

verses.hebrewText: וְתַעְלֹ֥זְנָה כִלְיֹותָ֑י בְּדַבֵּ֥ר שְׂ֝פָתֶ֗יךָ מֵישָׁרִֽים׃
verses.englishText: Yea, my reins will rejoice, when thy lips speak right things.

jps.text: Yea, my reins will rejoice, when thy lips speak right things.

verses.hebrewText: אַל־יְקַנֵּ֣א לִ֭בְּךָ בַּֽחַטָּאִ֑ים כִּ֥י אִם־בְּיִרְאַת־יְ֝הוָ֗ה כָּל־הַיֹּֽום׃
verses.englishText: Let not thy heart envy sinners, but be in the fear of the LORD all the day;

jps.text: Let not thy heart envy sinners, but be in the fear of the LORD all the day;

verses.hebrewText: כִּ֭י אִם־יֵ֣שׁ אַחֲרִ֑ית וְ֝תִקְוָתְךָ֗ לֹ֣א תִכָּרֵֽת׃
verses.englishText: For surely there is a future; and thy hope shall not be cut off.

jps.text: For surely there is a future; and thy hope shall not be cut off.

verses.hebrewText: שְׁמַע־אַתָּ֣ה בְנִ֣י וַחֲכָ֑ם וְאַשֵּׁ֖ר בַּדֶּ֣רֶךְ לִבֶּֽךָ׃
verses.englishText: Hear thou, my son, and be wise, and guide thy heart in the way.

jps.text: Hear thou, my son, and be wise, and guide thy heart in the way.

verses.hebrewText: אַל־תְּהִ֥י בְסֹֽבְאֵי־יָ֑יִן בְּזֹלֲלֵ֖י בָשָׂ֣ר לָֽמֹו׃
verses.englishText: Be not among winebibbers; among gluttonous eaters of flesh;

jps.text: Be not among winebibbers; among gluttonous eaters of flesh;

verses.hebrewText: כִּי־סֹבֵ֣א וְ֭זֹולֵל יִוָּרֵ֑שׁ וּ֝קְרָעִ֗ים תַּלְבִּ֥ישׁ נוּמָֽה׃
verses.englishText: For the drunkard and the glutton shall come to poverty; and drowsiness shall clothe a man with rags.

jps.text: For the drunkard and the glutton shall come to poverty; and drowsiness shall clothe a man with rags.

verses.hebrewText: שְׁמַ֣ע לְ֭אָבִיךָ זֶ֣ה יְלָדֶ֑ךָ וְאַל־תָּ֝ב֗וּז כִּֽי־זָקְנָ֥ה אִמֶּֽךָ׃
verses.englishText: Hearken unto thy father that begot thee, and despise not thy mother when she is old.

jps.text: Hearken unto thy father that begot thee, and despise not thy mother when she is old.

verses.hebrewText: אֱמֶ֣ת קְ֭נֵה וְאַל־תִּמְכֹּ֑ר חָכְמָ֖ה וּמוּסָ֣ר וּבִינָֽה׃
verses.englishText: Buy the truth, and sell it not; also wisdom, and instruction, and understanding.

jps.text: Buy the truth, and sell it not; also wisdom, and instruction, and understanding.

verses.hebrewText: *גֹּול (גִּ֣יל) *יָגֹול (יָ֭גִיל) אֲבִ֣י צַדִּ֑יק *יֹולֵד (וְיֹולֵ֥ד) חָ֝כָ֗ם *וְיִשְׂמַח־ (יִשְׂמַח)־בֹּֽו׃
verses.englishText: The father of the righteous will greatly rejoice; and he that begetteth a wise child will have joy of him.

jps.text: The father of the righteous will greatly rejoice; and he that begetteth a wise child will have joy of him.

verses.hebrewText: יִֽשְׂמַח־אָבִ֥יךָ וְאִמֶּ֑ךָ וְ֝תָגֵ֗ל יֹֽולַדְתֶּֽךָ׃
verses.englishText: Let thy father and thy mother be glad, and let her that bore thee rejoice.

jps.text: Let thy father and thy mother be glad, and let her that bore thee rejoice.

verses.hebrewText: תְּנָֽה־בְנִ֣י לִבְּךָ֣ לִ֑י וְ֝עֵינֶ֗יךָ דְּרָכַ֥י *תִּרְצֶנָה (תִּצֹּֽרְנָה)׃
verses.englishText: My son, give me thy heart, and let thine eyes observe my ways.

jps.text: My son, give me thy heart, and let thine eyes observe my ways.

verses.hebrewText: כִּֽי־שׁוּחָ֣ה עֲמֻקָּ֣ה זֹונָ֑ה וּבְאֵ֥ר צָ֝רָ֗ה נָכְרִיָּֽה׃
verses.englishText: For a harlot is a deep ditch; and an alien woman is a narrow pit.

jps.text: For a harlot is a deep ditch; and an alien woman is a narrow pit.

verses.hebrewText: אַף־הִ֭יא כְּחֶ֣תֶף תֶּֽאֱרֹ֑ב וּ֝בֹוגְדִ֗ים בְּאָדָ֥ם תֹּוסִֽף׃
verses.englishText: She also lieth in wait as a robber, and increaseth the faithless among men.

jps.text: She also lieth in wait as a robber, and increaseth the faithless among men.

verses.hebrewText: לְמִ֨י אֹ֥וי לְמִ֪י אֲבֹ֡וי לְמִ֤י *מִדֹונִים (מִדְיָנִ֨ים) ׀ לְמִ֥י שִׂ֗יחַ לְ֭מִי פְּצָעִ֣ים חִנָּ֑ם לְ֝מִ֗י חַכְלִל֥וּת עֵינָֽיִם׃
verses.englishText: Who crieth: 'Woe'? who: 'Alas'? who hath contentions? who hath raving? who hath wounds without cause? who hath redness of eyes?

jps.text: Who crieth: 'Woe'? who: 'Alas'? who hath contentions? who hath raving? who hath wounds without cause? who hath redness of eyes?

verses.hebrewText: לַֽמְאַחֲרִ֥ים עַל־הַיָּ֑יִן לַ֝בָּאִ֗ים לַחְקֹ֥ר מִמְסָֽךְ׃
verses.englishText: They that tarry long at the wine; they that go to try mixed wine.

jps.text: They that tarry long at the wine; they that go to try mixed wine.

verses.hebrewText: אַל־תֵּ֥רֶא יַיִן֮ כִּ֪י יִתְאַ֫דָּ֥ם כִּֽי־יִתֵּ֣ן *בַּכִּיס (בַּכֹּ֣וס) עֵינֹ֑ו יִ֝תְהַלֵּ֗ךְ בְּמֵישָׁרִֽים׃
verses.englishText: Look not thou upon the wine when it is red, when it giveth its colour in the cup, when it glideth down smoothly;

jps.text: Look not thou upon the wine when it is red, when it giveth its colour in the cup, when it glideth down smoothly;

verses.hebrewText: אַ֭חֲרִיתֹו כְּנָחָ֣שׁ יִשָּׁ֑ךְ וּֽכְצִפְעֹנִ֥י יַפְרִֽשׁ׃
verses.englishText: At the last it biteth like a serpent, and stingeth like a basilisk.

jps.text: At the last it biteth like a serpent, and stingeth like a basilisk.

verses.hebrewText: עֵ֭ינֶיךָ יִרְא֣וּ זָרֹ֑ות וְ֝לִבְּךָ֗ יְדַבֵּ֥ר תַּהְפֻּכֹֽות׃
verses.englishText: Thine eyes shall behold strange things, and thy heart shall utter confused things.

jps.text: Thine eyes shall behold strange things, and thy heart shall utter confused things.

verses.hebrewText: וְ֭הָיִיתָ כְּשֹׁכֵ֣ב בְּלֶב־יָ֑ם וּ֝כְשֹׁכֵ֗ב בְּרֹ֣אשׁ חִבֵּֽל׃
verses.englishText: Yea, thou shalt be as he that lieth down in the midst of the sea, or as he that lieth upon the top of a mast.

jps.text: Yea, thou shalt be as he that lieth down in the midst of the sea, or as he that lieth upon the top of a mast.

verses.hebrewText: הִכּ֥וּנִי בַל־חָלִיתִי֮ הֲלָמ֗וּנִי בַּל־יָ֫דָ֥עְתִּי מָתַ֥י אָקִ֑יץ אֹ֝וסִ֗יף אֲבַקְשֶׁ֥נּוּ עֹֽוד׃
verses.englishText: 'They have struck me, and I felt it not, they have beaten me, and I knew it not; when shall I awake? I will seek it yet again.'

jps.text: 'They have struck me, and I felt it not, they have beaten me, and I knew it not; when shall I awake? I will seek it yet again.'

verses.hebrewText: אַל־תְּ֭קַנֵּא בְּאַנְשֵׁ֣י רָעָ֑ה וְאַל־*תִּתְאָו (תִּ֝תְאָ֗יו) לִהְיֹ֥ות אִתָּֽם׃
verses.englishText: Be not thou envious of evil men, neither desire to be with them.

jps.text: Be not thou envious of evil men, neither desire to be with them.

verses.hebrewText: כִּי־שֹׁ֖ד יֶהְגֶּ֣ה לִבָּ֑ם וְ֝עָמָ֗ל שִׂפְתֵיהֶ֥ם תְּדַבֵּֽרְנָה׃
verses.englishText: For their heart studieth destruction, and their lips talk of mischief.

jps.text: For their heart studieth destruction, and their lips talk of mischief.

verses.hebrewText: בְּ֭חָכְמָה יִבָּ֣נֶה בָּ֑יִת וּ֝בִתְבוּנָ֗ה יִתְכֹּונָֽן׃
verses.englishText: Through wisdom is a house builded; and by understanding it is established;

jps.text: Through wisdom is a house builded; and by understanding it is established;

verses.hebrewText: וּ֭בְדַעַת חֲדָרִ֣ים יִמָּלְא֑וּ כָּל־הֹ֖ון יָקָ֣ר וְנָעִֽים׃
verses.englishText: And by knowledge are the chambers filled with all precious and pleasant riches.

jps.text: And by knowledge are the chambers filled with all precious and pleasant riches.

verses.hebrewText: גֶּֽבֶר־חָכָ֥ם בַּעֹ֑וז וְאִֽישׁ־דַּ֝֗עַת מְאַמֶּץ־כֹּֽחַ׃
verses.englishText: A wise man is strong; yea, a man of knowledge increaseth strength.

jps.text: A wise man is strong; yea, a man of knowledge increaseth strength.

verses.hebrewText: כִּ֣י בְ֭תַחְבֻּלֹות תַּעֲשֶׂה־לְּךָ֣ מִלְחָמָ֑ה וּ֝תְשׁוּעָ֗ה בְּרֹ֣ב יֹועֵֽץ׃
verses.englishText: For with wise advice thou shalt make thy war; and in the multitude of counsellors there is safety.

jps.text: For with wise advice thou shalt make thy war; and in the multitude of counsellors there is safety.

verses.hebrewText: רָאמֹ֣ות לֶֽאֱוִ֣יל חָכְמֹ֑ות בַּ֝שַּׁ֗עַר לֹ֣א יִפְתַּח־פִּֽיהוּ׃
verses.englishText: Wisdom is as unattainable to a fool as corals; he openeth not his mouth in the gate.

jps.text: Wisdom is as unattainable to a fool as corals; he openeth not his mouth in the gate.

verses.hebrewText: מְחַשֵּׁ֥ב לְהָרֵ֑עַ לֹ֝֗ו בַּֽעַל־מְזִמֹּ֥ות יִקְרָֽאוּ׃
verses.englishText: He that deviseth to do evil, men shall call him a mischievous person.

jps.text: He that deviseth to do evil, men shall call him a mischievous person.

verses.hebrewText: זִמַּ֣ת אִוֶּ֣לֶת חַטָּ֑את וְתֹועֲבַ֖ת לְאָדָ֣ם לֵֽץ׃
verses.englishText: The thought of foolishness is sin; and the scorner is an abomination to men.

jps.text: The thought of foolishness is sin; and the scorner is an abomination to men.

verses.hebrewText: הִ֭תְרַפִּיתָ בְּיֹ֥ום צָרָ֗ה צַ֣ר כֹּחֶֽכָה׃
verses.englishText: If thou faint in the day of adversity, thy strength is small indeed.

jps.text: If thou faint in the day of adversity, thy strength is small indeed.

verses.hebrewText: הַ֭צֵּל לְקֻחִ֣ים לַמָּ֑וֶת וּמָטִ֥ים לַ֝הֶ֗רֶג אִם־תַּחְשֹֽׂוךְ׃
verses.englishText: Deliver them that are drawn unto death; and those that are ready to be slain wilt thou forbear to rescue?

jps.text: Deliver them that are drawn unto death; and those that are ready to be slain wilt thou forbear to rescue?

verses.hebrewText: כִּֽי־תֹאמַ֗ר הֵן֮ לֹא־יָדַ֪עְנ֫וּ זֶ֥ה הֲ‍ֽלֹא־תֹ֘כֵ֤ן לִבֹּ֨ות ׀ הֽוּא־יָבִ֗ין וְנֹצֵ֣ר נַ֭פְשְׁךָ ה֣וּא יֵדָ֑ע וְהֵשִׁ֖יב לְאָדָ֣ם כְּפָעֳלֹֽו׃
verses.englishText: If thou sayest: 'Behold, we knew not this', doth not He that weigheth the hearts consider it? And He that keepeth thy soul, doth not He know it? And shall not He render to every man according to his works?

jps.text: If thou sayest: 'Behold, we knew not this', doth not He that weigheth the hearts consider it? And He that keepeth thy soul, doth not He know it? And shall not He render to every man according to his works?

verses.hebrewText: אֱכָל־בְּנִ֣י דְבַ֣שׁ כִּי־טֹ֑וב וְנֹ֥פֶת מָ֝תֹ֗וק עַל־חִכֶּֽךָ׃
verses.englishText: My son, eat thou honey, for it is good, and the honeycomb is sweet to thy taste;

jps.text: My son, eat thou honey, for it is good, and the honeycomb is sweet to thy taste;

verses.hebrewText: כֵּ֤ן ׀ דְּעֶ֥ה חָכְמָ֗ה לְנַ֫פְשֶׁ֥ךָ אִם־מָ֭צָאתָ וְיֵ֣שׁ אַחֲרִ֑ית וְ֝תִקְוָתְךָ֗ לֹ֣א תִכָּרֵֽת׃ פ
verses.englishText: So know thou wisdom to be unto thy soul; if thou hast found it, then shall there be a future, and thy hope shall not be cut off.

jps.text: So know thou wisdom to be unto thy soul; if thou hast found it, then shall there be a future, and thy hope shall not be cut off.

verses.hebrewText: אַל־תֶּאֱרֹ֣ב רָ֭שָׁע לִנְוֵ֣ה צַדִּ֑יק אַֽל־תְּשַׁדֵּ֥ד רִבְצֹֽו׃
verses.englishText: Lie not in wait, O wicked man, against the dwelling of the righteous, spoil not his resting-place;

jps.text: Lie not in wait, O wicked man, against the dwelling of the righteous, spoil not his resting-place;

verses.hebrewText: כִּ֤י שֶׁ֨בַע ׀ יִפֹּ֣ול צַדִּ֣יק וָקָ֑ם וּ֝רְשָׁעִ֗ים יִכָּשְׁל֥וּ בְרָעָֽה׃
verses.englishText: For a righteous man falleth seven times, and riseth up again, but the wicked stumble under adversity.

jps.text: For a righteous man falleth seven times, and riseth up again, but the wicked stumble under adversity.

verses.hebrewText: בִּנְפֹ֣ל *אֹויְבֶיךָ (אֹֽ֭ויִבְךָ) אַל־תִּשְׂמָ֑ח וּ֝בִכָּשְׁלֹ֗ו אַל־יָגֵ֥ל לִבֶּֽךָ׃
verses.englishText: Rejoice not when thine enemy falleth, and let not thy heart be glad when he stumbleth;

jps.text: Rejoice not when thine enemy falleth, and let not thy heart be glad when he stumbleth;

verses.hebrewText: פֶּן־יִרְאֶ֣ה יְ֭הוָה וְרַ֣ע בְּעֵינָ֑יו וְהֵשִׁ֖יב מֵעָלָ֣יו אַפֹּֽו׃
verses.englishText: Lest the LORD see it, and it displease Him, and He turn away His wrath from him.

jps.text: Lest the LORD see it, and it displease Him, and He turn away His wrath from him.

verses.hebrewText: אַל־תִּתְחַ֥ר בַּמְּרֵעִ֑ים אַל־תְּ֝קַנֵּ֗א בָּרְשָׁעִֽים׃
verses.englishText: Fret not thyself because of evildoers, neither be thou envious at the wicked;

jps.text: Fret not thyself because of evildoers, neither be thou envious at the wicked;

verses.hebrewText: כִּ֤י ׀ לֹֽא־תִהְיֶ֣ה אַחֲרִ֣ית לָרָ֑ע נֵ֖ר רְשָׁעִ֣ים יִדְעָֽךְ׃
verses.englishText: For there will be no future to the evil man, the lamp of the wicked shall be put out.

jps.text: For there will be no future to the evil man, the lamp of the wicked shall be put out.

verses.hebrewText: יְרָֽא־אֶת־יְהוָ֣ה בְּנִ֣י וָמֶ֑לֶךְ עִם־שֹׁ֝ונִ֗ים אַל־תִּתְעָרָֽב׃
verses.englishText: My son, fear thou the LORD and the king, and meddle not with them that are given to change;

jps.text: My son, fear thou the LORD and the king, and meddle not with them that are given to change;

verses.hebrewText: כִּֽי־פִ֭תְאֹם יָק֣וּם אֵידָ֑ם וּפִ֥יד שְׁ֝נֵיהֶ֗ם מִ֣י יֹודֵֽעַ׃ ס
verses.englishText: For their calamity shall rise suddenly; and who knoweth the ruin from them both?

jps.text: For their calamity shall rise suddenly; and who knoweth the ruin from them both?

verses.hebrewText: גַּם־אֵ֥לֶּה לַֽחֲכָמִ֑ים הַֽכֵּר־פָּנִ֖ים בְּמִשְׁפָּ֣ט בַּל־טֹֽוב׃
verses.englishText: These also are sayings of the wise. To have respect of persons in judgment is not good.

jps.text: These also are sayings of the wise. To have respect of persons in judgment is not good.

verses.hebrewText: אֹ֤מֵ֨ר ׀ לְרָשָׁע֮ צַדִּ֪יק אָ֥תָּה יִקְּבֻ֥הוּ עַמִּ֑ים יִזְעָמ֥וּהוּ לְאֻמִּֽים׃
verses.englishText: He that saith unto the wicked: 'Thou art righteous', peoples shall curse him, nations shall execrate him;

jps.text: He that saith unto the wicked: 'Thou art righteous', peoples shall curse him, nations shall execrate him;

verses.hebrewText: וְלַמֹּוכִיחִ֥ים יִנְעָ֑ם וַֽ֝עֲלֵיהֶ֗ם תָּבֹ֥וא בִרְכַּת־טֹֽוב׃
verses.englishText: But to them that decide justly shall be delight, and a good blessing shall come upon them.

jps.text: But to them that decide justly shall be delight, and a good blessing shall come upon them.

verses.hebrewText: שְׂפָתַ֥יִם יִשָּׁ֑ק מֵ֝שִׁ֗יב דְּבָרִ֥ים נְכֹחִֽים׃
verses.englishText: He kisseth the lips that giveth a right answer.

jps.text: He kisseth the lips that giveth a right answer.

verses.hebrewText: הָ֘כֵ֤ן בַּח֨וּץ ׀ מְלַאכְתֶּ֗ךָ וְעַתְּדָ֣הּ בַּשָּׂדֶ֣ה לָ֑ךְ אַ֝חַ֗ר וּבָנִ֥יתָ בֵיתֶֽךָ׃ פ
verses.englishText: Prepare thy work without, and make it fit for thyself in the field; and afterwards build thy house.

jps.text: Prepare thy work without, and make it fit for thyself in the field; and afterwards build thy house.

verses.hebrewText: אַל־תְּהִ֣י עֵד־חִנָּ֣ם בְּרֵעֶ֑ךָ וַ֝הֲפִתִּ֗יתָ בִּשְׂפָתֶֽיךָ׃
verses.englishText: Be not a witness against thy neighbour without cause; and deceive not with thy lips.

jps.text: Be not a witness against thy neighbour without cause; and deceive not with thy lips.

verses.hebrewText: אַל־תֹּאמַ֗ר כַּאֲשֶׁ֣ר עָֽשָׂה־לִ֭י כֵּ֤ן אֶֽעֱשֶׂה־לֹּ֑ו אָשִׁ֖יב לָאִ֣ישׁ כְּפָעֳלֹֽו׃
verses.englishText: Say not: 'I will do so to him as he hath done to me; I will render to the man according to his work.'

jps.text: Say not: 'I will do so to him as he hath done to me; I will render to the man according to his work.'

verses.hebrewText: עַל־שְׂדֵ֣ה אִישׁ־עָצֵ֣ל עָבַ֑רְתִּי וְעַל־כֶּ֝֗רֶם אָדָ֥ם חֲסַר־לֵֽב׃
verses.englishText: I went by the field of the slothful, and by the vineyard of the man void of understanding;

jps.text: I went by the field of the slothful, and by the vineyard of the man void of understanding;

verses.hebrewText: וְהִנֵּ֨ה עָ֘לָ֤ה כֻלֹּ֨ו ׀ קִמְּשֹׂנִ֗ים כָּסּ֣וּ פָנָ֣יו חֲרֻלִּ֑ים וְגֶ֖דֶר אֲבָנָ֣יו נֶהֱרָֽסָה׃
verses.englishText: And, lo, it was all grown over with thistles, the face thereof was covered with nettles, and the stone wall thereof was broken down.

jps.text: And, lo, it was all grown over with thistles, the face thereof was covered with nettles, and the stone wall thereof was broken down.

verses.hebrewText: וָֽאֶחֱזֶ֣ה אָ֭נֹכִֽי אָשִׁ֣ית לִבִּ֑י רָ֝אִ֗יתִי לָקַ֥חְתִּי מוּסָֽר׃
verses.englishText: Then I beheld, and considered well; I saw, and received instruction.

jps.text: Then I beheld, and considered well; I saw, and received instruction.

verses.hebrewText: מְעַ֣ט שֵׁ֭נֹות מְעַ֣ט תְּנוּמֹ֑ות מְעַ֓ט ׀ חִבֻּ֖ק יָדַ֣יִם לִשְׁכָּֽב׃
verses.englishText: 'Yet a little sleep, a little slumber, a little folding of the hands to sleep' —

jps.text: 'Yet a little sleep, a little slumber, a little folding of the hands to sleep' —

verses.hebrewText: וּבָֽא־מִתְהַלֵּ֥ךְ רֵישֶׁ֑ךָ וּ֝מַחְסֹרֶ֗יךָ כְּאִ֣ישׁ מָגֵֽן׃ פ
verses.englishText: So shall thy poverty come as a runner, and thy want as an armed man.

jps.text: So shall thy poverty come as a runner, and thy want as an armed man.

verses.hebrewText: גַּם־אֵ֭לֶּה מִשְׁלֵ֣י שְׁלֹמֹ֑ה אֲשֶׁ֥ר הֶ֝עְתִּ֗יקוּ אַנְשֵׁ֤י ׀ חִזְקִיָּ֬ה מֶֽלֶךְ־יְהוּדָֽה׃
verses.englishText: These also are proverbs of Solomon, which the men of Hezekiah king of Judah copied out.

jps.text: These also are proverbs of Solomon, which the men of Hezekiah king of Judah copied out.

verses.hebrewText: כְּבֹ֣ד אֱ֭לֹהִים הַסְתֵּ֣ר דָּבָ֑ר וּכְבֹ֥ד מְ֝לָכִ֗ים חֲקֹ֣ר דָּבָֽר׃
verses.englishText: It is the glory of God to conceal a thing; but the glory of kings is to search out a matter.

jps.text: It is the glory of God to conceal a thing; but the glory of kings is to search out a matter.

verses.hebrewText: שָׁמַ֣יִם לָ֭רוּם וָאָ֣רֶץ לָעֹ֑מֶק וְלֵ֥ב מְ֝לָכִ֗ים אֵ֣ין חֵֽקֶר׃
verses.englishText: The heaven for height, and the earth for depth, and the heart of kings is unsearchable.

jps.text: The heaven for height, and the earth for depth, and the heart of kings is unsearchable.

verses.hebrewText: הָגֹ֣ו סִיגִ֣ים מִכָּ֑סֶף וַיֵּצֵ֖א לַצֹּרֵ֣ף כֶּֽלִי׃
verses.englishText: Take away the dross from the silver, and there cometh forth a vessel for the refiner;

jps.text: Take away the dross from the silver, and there cometh forth a vessel for the refiner;

verses.hebrewText: הָגֹ֣ו רָ֭שָׁע לִפְנֵי־מֶ֑לֶךְ וְיִכֹּ֖ון בַּצֶּ֣דֶק כִּסְאֹֽו׃
verses.englishText: Take away the wicked from before the king, and his throne shall be established in righteousness.

jps.text: Take away the wicked from before the king, and his throne shall be established in righteousness.

verses.hebrewText: אַל־תִּתְהַדַּ֥ר לִפְנֵי־מֶ֑לֶךְ וּבִמְקֹ֥ום גְּ֝דֹלִ֗ים אַֽל־תַּעֲמֹֽד׃
verses.englishText: Glorify not thyself in the presence of the king, and stand not in the place of great men;

jps.text: Glorify not thyself in the presence of the king, and stand not in the place of great men;

verses.hebrewText: כִּ֤י טֹ֥וב אֲמָר־לְךָ֗ עֲ‍ֽלֵ֫ה הֵ֥נָּה מֵֽ֭הַשְׁפִּ֣ילְךָ לִפְנֵ֣י נָדִ֑יב אֲשֶׁ֖ר רָא֣וּ עֵינֶֽיךָ׃
verses.englishText: For better is it that it be said unto thee: 'Come up hither', than that thou shouldest be put lower in the presence of the prince, whom thine eyes have seen.

jps.text: For better is it that it be said unto thee: 'Come up hither', than that thou shouldest be put lower in the presence of the prince, whom thine eyes have seen.

verses.hebrewText: אַל־תֵּצֵ֥א לָרִ֗ב מַ֫הֵ֥ר פֶּ֣ן מַה־תַּ֭עֲשֶׂה בְּאַחֲרִיתָ֑הּ בְּהַכְלִ֖ים אֹתְךָ֣ רֵעֶֽךָ׃
verses.englishText: Go not forth hastily to strive, lest thou know not what to do in the end thereof, when thy neighbour hath put thee to shame.

jps.text: Go not forth hastily to strive, lest thou know not what to do in the end thereof, when thy neighbour hath put thee to shame.

verses.hebrewText: רִֽ֭יבְךָ רִ֣יב אֶת־רֵעֶ֑ךָ וְסֹ֖וד אַחֵ֣ר אַל־תְּגָֽל׃
verses.englishText: Debate thy cause with thy neighbour, but reveal not the secret of another;

jps.text: Debate thy cause with thy neighbour, but reveal not the secret of another;

verses.hebrewText: פֶּֽן־יְחַסֶּדְךָ֥ שֹׁמֵ֑עַ וְ֝דִבָּתְךָ֗ לֹ֣א תָשֽׁוּב׃
verses.englishText: Lest he that heareth it revile thee, and thine infamy turn not away.

jps.text: Lest he that heareth it revile thee, and thine infamy turn not away.

verses.hebrewText: תַּפּוּחֵ֣י זָ֭הָב בְּמַשְׂכִּיֹּ֥ות כָּ֑סֶף דָּ֝בָ֗ר דָּבֻ֥ר עַל־אָפְנָֽיו׃
verses.englishText: A word fitly spoken is like apples of gold in settings of silver.

jps.text: A word fitly spoken is like apples of gold in settings of silver.

verses.hebrewText: נֶ֣זֶם זָ֭הָב וַחֲלִי־כָ֑תֶם מֹוכִ֥יחַ חָ֝כָ֗ם עַל־אֹ֥זֶן שֹׁמָֽעַת׃
verses.englishText: As an ear-ring of gold, and an ornament of fine gold, so is a wise reprover upon an obedient ear.

jps.text: As an ear-ring of gold, and an ornament of fine gold, so is a wise reprover upon an obedient ear.

verses.hebrewText: כְּצִנַּת־שֶׁ֨לֶג ׀ בְּיֹ֬ום קָצִ֗יר צִ֣יר נֶ֭אֱמָן לְשֹׁלְחָ֑יו וְנֶ֖פֶשׁ אֲדֹנָ֣יו יָשִֽׁיב׃ פ
verses.englishText: As the cold of snow in the time of harvest, so is a faithful messenger to him that sendeth him; for he refresheth the soul of his master.

jps.text: As the cold of snow in the time of harvest, so is a faithful messenger to him that sendeth him; for he refresheth the soul of his master.

verses.hebrewText: נְשִׂיאִ֣ים וְ֭רוּחַ וְגֶ֣שֶׁם אָ֑יִן אִ֥ישׁ מִ֝תְהַלֵּ֗ל בְּמַתַּת־שָֽׁקֶר׃
verses.englishText: As vapours and wind without rain, so is he that boasteth himself of a false gift.

jps.text: As vapours and wind without rain, so is he that boasteth himself of a false gift.

verses.hebrewText: בְּאֹ֣רֶךְ אַ֭פַּיִם יְפֻתֶּ֣ה קָצִ֑ין וְלָשֹׁ֥ון רַ֝כָּ֗ה תִּשְׁבָּר־גָּֽרֶם׃
verses.englishText: By long forbearing is a ruler persuaded, and a soft tongue breaketh the bone.

jps.text: By long forbearing is a ruler persuaded, and a soft tongue breaketh the bone.

verses.hebrewText: דְּבַ֣שׁ מָ֭צָאתָ אֱכֹ֣ל דַּיֶּ֑ךָּ פֶּן־תִּ֝שְׂבָּעֶ֗נּוּ וַהֲקֵֽאתֹֽו׃
verses.englishText: Hast thou found honey? eat so much as is sufficient for thee, lest thou be filled therewith, and vomit it.

jps.text: Hast thou found honey? eat so much as is sufficient for thee, lest thou be filled therewith, and vomit it.

verses.hebrewText: הֹקַ֣ר רַ֭גְלְךָ מִבֵּ֣ית רֵעֶ֑ךָ פֶּן־יִ֝שְׂבָּעֲךָ֗ וּשְׂנֵאֶֽךָ׃
verses.englishText: Let thy foot be seldom in thy neighbour's house; lest he be sated with thee, and hate thee.

jps.text: Let thy foot be seldom in thy neighbour's house; lest he be sated with thee, and hate thee.

verses.hebrewText: מֵפִ֣יץ וְ֭חֶרֶב וְחֵ֣ץ שָׁנ֑וּן אִ֥ישׁ עֹנֶ֥ה בְ֝רֵעֵ֗הוּ עֵ֣ד שָֽׁקֶר׃
verses.englishText: As a maul, and a sword, and a sharp arrow, so is a man that beareth false witness against his neighbour.

jps.text: As a maul, and a sword, and a sharp arrow, so is a man that beareth false witness against his neighbour.

verses.hebrewText: שֵׁ֣ן רֹ֭עָה וְרֶ֣גֶל מוּעָ֑דֶת מִבְטָ֥ח בֹּ֝וגֵ֗ד בְּיֹ֣ום צָרֽ͏ָה׃
verses.englishText: Confidence in an unfaithful man in time of trouble is like a broken tooth, and a foot out of joint.

jps.text: Confidence in an unfaithful man in time of trouble is like a broken tooth, and a foot out of joint.

verses.hebrewText: מַ֥עֲדֶה בֶּ֨גֶד ׀ בְּיֹ֣ום קָ֭רָה חֹ֣מֶץ עַל־נָ֑תֶר וְשָׁ֥ר בַּ֝שִּׁרִ֗ים עַ֣ל לֶב־רָֽע׃ פ
verses.englishText: As one that taketh off a garment in cold weather, and as vinegar upon nitre, so is he that singeth songs to a heavy heart.

jps.text: As one that taketh off a garment in cold weather, and as vinegar upon nitre, so is he that singeth songs to a heavy heart.

verses.hebrewText: אִם־רָעֵ֣ב שֹׂ֭נַאֲךָ הַאֲכִלֵ֣הוּ לָ֑חֶם וְאִם־צָ֝מֵ֗א הַשְׁקֵ֥הוּ מָֽיִם׃
verses.englishText: If thine enemy be hungry, give him bread to eat, and if he be thirsty, give him water to drink;

jps.text: If thine enemy be hungry, give him bread to eat, and if he be thirsty, give him water to drink;

verses.hebrewText: כִּ֤י גֶֽחָלִ֗ים אַ֭תָּה חֹתֶ֣ה עַל־רֹאשֹׁ֑ו וֽ͏ַ֝יהוָ֗ה יְשַׁלֶּם־לָֽךְ׃
verses.englishText: For thou wilt heap coals of fire upon his head, and the LORD will reward thee.

jps.text: For thou wilt heap coals of fire upon his head, and the LORD will reward thee.

verses.hebrewText: ר֣וּחַ צָ֭פֹון תְּחֹ֣ולֵֽל גָּ֑שֶׁם וּפָנִ֥ים נִ֝זְעָמִ֗ים לְשֹׁ֣ון סָֽתֶר׃
verses.englishText: The north wind bringeth forth rain, and a backbiting tongue an angry countenance.

jps.text: The north wind bringeth forth rain, and a backbiting tongue an angry countenance.

verses.hebrewText: טֹ֗וב שֶׁ֥בֶת עַל־פִּנַּת־גָּ֑ג מֵאֵ֥שֶׁת *מִדֹונִים (מִ֝דְיָנִ֗ים) וּבֵ֥ית חָֽבֶר׃
verses.englishText: It is better to dwell in a corner of the housetop, than in a house in common with a contentious woman.

jps.text: It is better to dwell in a corner of the housetop, than in a house in common with a contentious woman.

verses.hebrewText: מַ֣יִם קָ֭רִים עַל־נֶ֣פֶשׁ עֲיֵפָ֑ה וּשְׁמוּעָ֥ה טֹ֝ובָ֗ה מֵאֶ֥רֶץ מֶרְחָֽק׃
verses.englishText: As cold waters to a faint soul, so is good news from a far country.

jps.text: As cold waters to a faint soul, so is good news from a far country.

verses.hebrewText: מַעְיָ֣ן נִ֭רְפָּשׂ וּמָקֹ֣ור מָשְׁחָ֑ת צַ֝דִּ֗יק מָ֣ט לִפְנֵֽי־רָשָֽׁע׃
verses.englishText: As a troubled fountain, and a corrupted spring, so is a righteous man that giveth way before the wicked.

jps.text: As a troubled fountain, and a corrupted spring, so is a righteous man that giveth way before the wicked.

verses.hebrewText: אָ֘כֹ֤ל דְּבַ֣שׁ הַרְבֹּ֣ות לֹא־טֹ֑וב וְחֵ֖קֶר כְּבֹדָ֣ם כָּבֹֽוד׃
verses.englishText: It is not good to eat much honey; so for men to search out their own glory is not glory.

jps.text: It is not good to eat much honey; so for men to search out their own glory is not glory.

verses.hebrewText: עִ֣יר פְּ֭רוּצָה אֵ֣ין חֹומָ֑ה אִ֝֗ישׁ אֲשֶׁ֤ר אֵ֖ין מַעְצָ֣ר לְרוּחֹֽו׃
verses.englishText: Like a city broken down and without a wall, so is he whose spirit is without restraint.

jps.text: Like a city broken down and without a wall, so is he whose spirit is without restraint.

verses.hebrewText: כַּשֶּׁ֤לֶג ׀ בַּקַּ֗יִץ וְכַמָּטָ֥ר בַּקָּצִ֑יר כֵּ֤ן לֹא־נָאוֶ֖ה לִכְסִ֣יל כָּבֹֽוד׃
verses.englishText: As snow in summer, and as rain in harvest, so honour is not seemly for a fool.

jps.text: As snow in summer, and as rain in harvest, so honour is not seemly for a fool.

verses.hebrewText: כַּצִּפֹּ֣ור לָ֭נוּד כַּדְּרֹ֣ור לָע֑וּף כֵּ֥ן קִֽלְלַ֥ת חִ֝נָּ֗ם *לֹא (לֹ֣ו) תָבֹֽא׃
verses.englishText: As the wandering sparrow, as the flying swallow, so the curse that is causeless shall come home.

jps.text: As the wandering sparrow, as the flying swallow, so the curse that is causeless shall come home.

verses.hebrewText: שֹׁ֣וט לַ֭סּוּס מֶ֣תֶג לַחֲמֹ֑ור וְ֝שֵׁ֗בֶט לְגֵ֣ו כְּסִילִֽים׃
verses.englishText: A whip for the horse, a bridle for the ass, and a rod for the back of fools.

jps.text: A whip for the horse, a bridle for the ass, and a rod for the back of fools.

verses.hebrewText: אַל־תַּ֣עַן כְּ֭סִיל כְּאִוַּלְתֹּ֑ו פֶּֽן־תִּשְׁוֶה־לֹּ֥ו גַם־אָֽתָּה׃
verses.englishText: Answer not a fool according to his folly, lest thou also be like unto him.

jps.text: Answer not a fool according to his folly, lest thou also be like unto him.

verses.hebrewText: עֲנֵ֣ה כְ֭סִיל כְּאִוַּלְתֹּ֑ו פֶּן־יִהְיֶ֖ה חָכָ֣ם בְּעֵינָֽיו׃
verses.englishText: Answer a fool according to his folly, lest he be wise in his own eyes.

jps.text: Answer a fool according to his folly, lest he be wise in his own eyes.

verses.hebrewText: מְקַצֶּ֣ה רַ֭גְלַיִם חָמָ֣ס שֹׁתֶ֑ה שֹׁלֵ֖חַ דְּבָרִ֣ים בְּיַד־כְּסִֽיל׃
verses.englishText: He that sendeth a message by the hand of a fool cutteth off his own feet, and drinketh damage.

jps.text: He that sendeth a message by the hand of a fool cutteth off his own feet, and drinketh damage.

verses.hebrewText: דַּלְי֣וּ שֹׁ֭קַיִם מִפִּסֵּ֑חַ וּ֝מָשָׁ֗ל בְּפִ֣י כְסִילִֽים׃
verses.englishText: The legs hang limp from the lame; so is a parable in the mouth of fools.

jps.text: The legs hang limp from the lame; so is a parable in the mouth of fools.

verses.hebrewText: כִּצְרֹ֣ור אֶ֭בֶן בְּמַרְגֵּמָ֑ה כֵּן־נֹותֵ֖ן לִכְסִ֣יל כָּבֹֽוד׃
verses.englishText: As a small stone in a heap of stones, so is he that giveth honour to a fool.

jps.text: As a small stone in a heap of stones, so is he that giveth honour to a fool.

verses.hebrewText: חֹ֭וחַ עָלָ֣ה בְיַד־שִׁכֹּ֑ור וּ֝מָשָׁ֗ל בְּפִ֣י כְסִילִֽים׃
verses.englishText: As a thorn that cometh into the hand of a drunkard, so is a parable in the mouth of fools.

jps.text: As a thorn that cometh into the hand of a drunkard, so is a parable in the mouth of fools.

verses.hebrewText: רַ֥ב מְחֹֽולֵֽל־כֹּ֑ל וְשֹׂכֵ֥ר כְּ֝סִ֗יל וְשֹׂכֵ֥ר עֹבְרִֽים׃
verses.englishText: A master performeth all things; but he that stoppeth a fool is as one that stoppeth a flood.

jps.text: A master performeth all things; but he that stoppeth a fool is as one that stoppeth a flood.

verses.hebrewText: כְּ֭כֶלֶב שָׁ֣ב עַל־קֵאֹ֑ו כְּ֝סִ֗יל שֹׁונֶ֥ה בְאִוַּלְתֹּֽו׃
verses.englishText: As a dog that returneth to his vomit, so is a fool that repeateth his folly.

jps.text: As a dog that returneth to his vomit, so is a fool that repeateth his folly.

verses.hebrewText: רָאִ֗יתָ אִ֭ישׁ חָכָ֣ם בְּעֵינָ֑יו תִּקְוָ֖ה לִכְסִ֣יל מִמֶּֽנּוּ׃
verses.englishText: Seest thou a man wise in his own eyes? there is more hope of a fool than of him.

jps.text: Seest thou a man wise in his own eyes? there is more hope of a fool than of him.

verses.hebrewText: אָמַ֣ר עָ֭צֵל שַׁ֣חַל בַּדָּ֑רֶךְ אֲ֝רִ֗י בֵּ֣ין הָרְחֹבֹֽות׃
verses.englishText: The sluggard saith: 'There is a lion in the way; yea, a lion is in the streets.'

jps.text: The sluggard saith: 'There is a lion in the way; yea, a lion is in the streets.'

verses.hebrewText: הַ֭דֶּלֶת תִּסֹּ֣וב עַל־צִירָ֑הּ וְ֝עָצֵ֗ל עַל־מִטָּתֹֽו׃
verses.englishText: The door is turning upon its hinges, and the sluggard is still upon his bed.

jps.text: The door is turning upon its hinges, and the sluggard is still upon his bed.

verses.hebrewText: טָ֘מַ֤ן עָצֵ֣ל יָ֭דֹו בַּצַּלָּ֑חַת נִ֝לְאָ֗ה לַֽהֲשִׁיבָ֥הּ אֶל־פִּֽיו׃
verses.englishText: The sluggard burieth his hand in the dish; it wearieth him to bring it back to his mouth.

jps.text: The sluggard burieth his hand in the dish; it wearieth him to bring it back to his mouth.

verses.hebrewText: חָכָ֣ם עָצֵ֣ל בְּעֵינָ֑יו מִ֝שִּׁבְעָ֗ה מְשִׁ֣יבֵי טָֽעַם׃
verses.englishText: The sluggard is wiser in his own eyes than seven men that give wise answer.

jps.text: The sluggard is wiser in his own eyes than seven men that give wise answer.

verses.hebrewText: מַחֲזִ֥יק בְּאָזְנֵי־כָ֑לֶב עֹבֵ֥ר מִ֝תְעַבֵּ֗ר עַל־רִ֥יב לֹּֽא־לֹֽו׃
verses.englishText: He that passeth by, and meddleth with strife not his own, is like one that taketh a dog by the ears.

jps.text: He that passeth by, and meddleth with strife not his own, is like one that taketh a dog by the ears.

verses.hebrewText: כְּֽ֭מִתְלַהְלֵהַּ הַיֹּרֶ֥ה זִקִּ֗ים חִצִּ֥ים וָמָֽוֶת׃
verses.englishText: As a madman who casteth firebrands, arrows, and death;

jps.text: As a madman who casteth firebrands, arrows, and death;

verses.hebrewText: כֵּֽן־אִ֭ישׁ רִמָּ֣ה אֶת־רֵעֵ֑הוּ וְ֝אָמַ֗ר הֲ‍ֽלֹא־מְשַׂחֵ֥ק אָֽנִי׃
verses.englishText: So is the man that deceiveth his neighbour, and saith: 'Am not I in sport?'

jps.text: So is the man that deceiveth his neighbour, and saith: 'Am not I in sport?'

verses.hebrewText: בְּאֶ֣פֶס עֵ֭צִים תִּכְבֶּה־אֵ֑שׁ וּבְאֵ֥ין נִ֝רְגָּ֗ן יִשְׁתֹּ֥ק מָדֹֽון׃
verses.englishText: Where no wood is, the fire goeth out; and where there is no whisperer, contention ceaseth.

jps.text: Where no wood is, the fire goeth out; and where there is no whisperer, contention ceaseth.

verses.hebrewText: פֶּחָ֣ם לְ֭גֶחָלִים וְעֵצִ֣ים לְאֵ֑שׁ וְאִ֥ישׁ *מִדֹונִים (מִ֝דְיָנִ֗ים) לְחַרְחַר־רִֽיב׃ פ
verses.englishText: As coals are to burning coals, and wood to fire; so is a contentious man to kindle strife.

jps.text: As coals are to burning coals, and wood to fire; so is a contentious man to kindle strife.

verses.hebrewText: דִּבְרֵ֣י נִ֭רְגָּן כְּמִֽתְלַהֲמִ֑ים וְ֝הֵ֗ם יָרְד֥וּ חַדְרֵי־בָֽטֶן׃
verses.englishText: The words of a whisperer are as dainty morsels, and they go down into the innermost parts of the body.

jps.text: The words of a whisperer are as dainty morsels, and they go down into the innermost parts of the body.

verses.hebrewText: כֶּ֣סֶף סִ֭יגִים מְצֻפֶּ֣ה עַל־חָ֑רֶשׂ שְׂפָתַ֖יִם דֹּלְקִ֣ים וְלֶב־רָֽע׃
verses.englishText: Burning lips and a wicked heart are like an earthen vessel overlaid with silver dross.

jps.text: Burning lips and a wicked heart are like an earthen vessel overlaid with silver dross.

verses.hebrewText: *בִּשְׂפָתֹו (בִּ֭שְׂפָתָיו) יִנָּכֵ֣ר שֹׂונֵ֑א וּ֝בְקִרְבֹּ֗ו יָשִׁ֥ית מִרְמָֽה׃
verses.englishText: He that hateth dissembleth with his lips, but he layeth up deceit within him.

jps.text: He that hateth dissembleth with his lips, but he layeth up deceit within him.

verses.hebrewText: כִּֽי־יְחַנֵּ֣ן קֹ֭ולֹו אַל־תַּֽאֲמֶן־בֹּ֑ו כִּ֤י שֶׁ֖בַע תֹּועֵבֹ֣ות בְּלִבֹּֽו׃
verses.englishText: When he speaketh fair, believe him not; for there are seven abominations in his heart.

jps.text: When he speaketh fair, believe him not; for there are seven abominations in his heart.

verses.hebrewText: תִּכַּסֶּ֣ה שִׂ֭נְאָה בְּמַשָּׁאֹ֑ון תִּגָּלֶ֖ה רָעָתֹ֣ו בְקָהָֽל׃
verses.englishText: Though his hatred be concealed with deceit, his wickedness shall be revealed before the congregation.

jps.text: Though his hatred be concealed with deceit, his wickedness shall be revealed before the congregation.

verses.hebrewText: כֹּֽרֶה־שַּׁ֭חַת בָּ֣הּ יִפֹּ֑ל וְגֹ֥לֵ֥ל אֶ֝בֶן אֵלָ֥יו תָּשֽׁוּב׃
verses.englishText: Whoso diggeth a pit shall fall therein; and he that rolleth a stone, it shall return upon him.

jps.text: Whoso diggeth a pit shall fall therein; and he that rolleth a stone, it shall return upon him.

verses.hebrewText: לְֽשֹׁון־שֶׁ֭קֶר יִשְׂנָ֣א דַכָּ֑יו וּפֶ֥ה חָ֝לָ֗ק יַעֲשֶׂ֥ה מִדְחֶֽה׃
verses.englishText: A lying tongue hateth those that are crushed by it; and a flattering mouth worketh ruin.

jps.text: A lying tongue hateth those that are crushed by it; and a flattering mouth worketh ruin.

verses.hebrewText: אַֽל־תִּ֭תְהַלֵּל בְּיֹ֣ום מָחָ֑ר כִּ֤י לֹא־תֵ֝דַ֗ע מַה־יֵּ֥לֶד יֹֽום׃
verses.englishText: Boast not thyself of to-morrow; for thou knowest not what a day may bring forth.

jps.text: Boast not thyself of to-morrow; for thou knowest not what a day may bring forth.

verses.hebrewText: יְהַלֶּלְךָ֣ זָ֣ר וְלֹא־פִ֑יךָ נָ֝כְרִ֗י וְאַל־שְׂפָתֶֽיךָ׃
verses.englishText: Let another man praise thee, and not thine own mouth; a stranger, and not thine own lips.

jps.text: Let another man praise thee, and not thine own mouth; a stranger, and not thine own lips.

verses.hebrewText: כֹּֽבֶד־אֶ֭בֶן וְנֵ֣טֶל הַחֹ֑ול וְכַ֥עַס אֱ֝וִ֗יל כָּבֵ֥ד מִשְּׁנֵיהֶֽם׃
verses.englishText: A stone is heavy, and the sand weighty; but a fool's vexation is heavier than they both.

jps.text: A stone is heavy, and the sand weighty; but a fool's vexation is heavier than they both.

verses.hebrewText: אַכְזְרִיּ֣וּת חֵ֭מָה וְשֶׁ֣טֶף אָ֑ף וּמִ֥י יַ֝עֲמֹד לִפְנֵ֥י קִנְאָֽה׃
verses.englishText: Wrath is cruel, and anger is overwhelming; but who is able to stand before jealousy?

jps.text: Wrath is cruel, and anger is overwhelming; but who is able to stand before jealousy?

verses.hebrewText: טֹ֖ובָה תֹּוכַ֣חַת מְגֻלָּ֑ה מֵֽאַהֲבָ֥ה מְסֻתָּֽרֶת׃
verses.englishText: Better is open rebuke than love that is hidden.

jps.text: Better is open rebuke than love that is hidden.

verses.hebrewText: נֶ֭אֱמָנִים פִּצְעֵ֣י אֹוהֵ֑ב וְ֝נַעְתָּרֹ֗ות נְשִׁיקֹ֥ות שֹׂונֵֽא׃
verses.englishText: Faithful are the wounds of a friend; but the kisses of an enemy are importunate.

jps.text: Faithful are the wounds of a friend; but the kisses of an enemy are importunate.

verses.hebrewText: נֶ֣פֶשׁ שְׂ֭בֵעָה תָּב֣וּס נֹ֑פֶת וְנֶ֥פֶשׁ רְ֝עֵבָ֗ה כָּל־מַ֥ר מָתֹֽוק׃
verses.englishText: The full soul loatheth a honeycomb; but to the hungry soul every bitter thing is sweet.

jps.text: The full soul loatheth a honeycomb; but to the hungry soul every bitter thing is sweet.

verses.hebrewText: כְּ֭צִפֹּור נֹודֶ֣דֶת מִן־קִנָּ֑הּ כֵּֽן־אִ֝֗ישׁ נֹודֵ֥ד מִמְּקֹומֹֽו׃
verses.englishText: As a bird that wandereth from her nest, so is a man that wandereth from his place.

jps.text: As a bird that wandereth from her nest, so is a man that wandereth from his place.

verses.hebrewText: שֶׁ֣מֶן וּ֭קְטֹרֶת יְשַׂמַּֽח־לֵ֑ב וּמֶ֥תֶק רֵ֝עֵ֗הוּ מֵֽעֲצַת־נָֽפֶשׁ׃
verses.englishText: Ointment and perfume rejoice the heart; so doth the sweetness of a man's friend by hearty counsel.

jps.text: Ointment and perfume rejoice the heart; so doth the sweetness of a man's friend by hearty counsel.

verses.hebrewText: רֵֽעֲךָ֙ *וְרֵעֶה (וְרֵ֪עַ) אָבִ֡יךָ אַֽל־תַּעֲזֹ֗ב וּבֵ֥ית אָחִ֗יךָ אַל־תָּ֭בֹוא בְּיֹ֣ום אֵידֶ֑ךָ טֹ֥וב שָׁכֵ֥ן קָ֝רֹ֗וב מֵאָ֥ח רָחֹֽוק׃
verses.englishText: Thine own friend, and thy father's friend, forsake not; neither go into thy brother's house in the day of thy calamity; better is a neighbour that is near than a brother far off.

jps.text: Thine own friend, and thy father's friend, forsake not; neither go into thy brother's house in the day of thy calamity; better is a neighbour that is near than a brother far off.

verses.hebrewText: חֲכַ֣ם בְּ֭נִי וְשַׂמַּ֣ח לִבִּ֑י וְאָשִׁ֖יבָה חֹרְפִ֣י דָבָֽר׃
verses.englishText: My son, be wise, and make my heart glad, that I may answer him that taunteth me.

jps.text: My son, be wise, and make my heart glad, that I may answer him that taunteth me.

verses.hebrewText: עָר֤וּם רָאָ֣ה רָעָ֣ה נִסְתָּ֑ר פְּ֝תָאיִ֗ם עָבְר֥וּ נֶעֱנָֽשׁוּ׃
verses.englishText: A prudent man seeth the evil, and hideth himself; but the thoughtless pass on, and are punished.

jps.text: A prudent man seeth the evil, and hideth himself; but the thoughtless pass on, and are punished.

verses.hebrewText: קַח־בִּ֭גְדֹו כִּי־עָ֣רַב זָ֑ר וּבְעַ֖ד נָכְרִיָּ֣ה חַבְלֵֽהוּ׃
verses.englishText: Take his garment that is surety for a stranger; and hold him in pledge that is surety for an alien woman.

jps.text: Take his garment that is surety for a stranger; and hold him in pledge that is surety for an alien woman.

verses.hebrewText: מְבָ֘רֵ֤ךְ רֵעֵ֨הוּ ׀ בְּקֹ֣ול גָּ֭דֹול בַּבֹּ֣קֶר הַשְׁכֵּ֑ים קְ֝לָלָ֗ה תֵּחָ֥שֶׁב לֹֽו׃
verses.englishText: He that blesseth his friend with a loud voice, rising early in the morning, it shall be counted a curse to him.

jps.text: He that blesseth his friend with a loud voice, rising early in the morning, it shall be counted a curse to him.

verses.hebrewText: דֶּ֣לֶף טֹ֭ורֵד בְּיֹ֣ום סַגְרִ֑יר וְאֵ֥שֶׁת *מִדֹונִים (מִ֝דְיָנִ֗ים) נִשְׁתָּוָֽה׃
verses.englishText: A continual dropping in a very rainy day and a contentious woman are alike;

jps.text: A continual dropping in a very rainy day and a contentious woman are alike;

verses.hebrewText: צֹפְנֶ֥יהָ צָֽפַן־ר֑וּחַ וְשֶׁ֖מֶן יְמִינֹ֣ו יִקְרָֽא׃
verses.englishText: He that would hide her hideth the wind, and the ointment of his right hand betrayeth itself.

jps.text: He that would hide her hideth the wind, and the ointment of his right hand betrayeth itself.

verses.hebrewText: בַּרְזֶ֣ל בְּבַרְזֶ֣ל יָ֑חַד וְ֝אִ֗ישׁ יַ֣חַד פְּנֵֽי־רֵעֵֽהוּ׃
verses.englishText: Iron sharpeneth iron; so a man sharpeneth the countenance of his friend.

jps.text: Iron sharpeneth iron; so a man sharpeneth the countenance of his friend.

verses.hebrewText: נֹצֵ֣ר תְּ֭אֵנָה יֹאכַ֣ל פִּרְיָ֑הּ וְשֹׁמֵ֖ר אֲדֹנָ֣יו יְכֻבָּֽד׃
verses.englishText: Whoso keepeth the fig-tree shall eat the fruit thereof; and he that waiteth on his master shall be honoured.

jps.text: Whoso keepeth the fig-tree shall eat the fruit thereof; and he that waiteth on his master shall be honoured.

verses.hebrewText: כַּ֭מַּיִם הַפָּנִ֣ים לַפָּנִ֑ים כֵּ֤ן לֵֽב־הָ֝אָדָ֗ם לָאָדָֽם׃
verses.englishText: As in water face answereth to face, so the heart of man to man.

jps.text: As in water face answereth to face, so the heart of man to man.

verses.hebrewText: שְׁאֹ֣ול *וַאֲבַדֹּה (וַ֭אֲבַדֹּו) לֹ֣א תִשְׂבַּ֑עְנָה וְעֵינֵ֥י הָ֝אָדָ֗ם לֹ֣א תִשְׂבַּֽעְנָה׃
verses.englishText: The nether-world and Destruction are never satiated; so the eyes of man are never satiated.

jps.text: The nether-world and Destruction are never satiated; so the eyes of man are never satiated.

verses.hebrewText: מַצְרֵ֣ף לַ֭כֶּסֶף וְכ֣וּר לַזָּהָ֑ב וְ֝אִ֗ישׁ לְפִ֣י מַהֲלָלֹֽו׃
verses.englishText: The refining pot is for silver, and the furnace for gold, and a man is tried by his praise.

jps.text: The refining pot is for silver, and the furnace for gold, and a man is tried by his praise.

verses.hebrewText: אִ֥ם תִּכְתֹּֽושׁ־אֶת־הָאֱוִ֨יל ׀ בַּֽמַּכְתֵּ֡שׁ בְּתֹ֣וךְ הָ֭רִיפֹות בַּֽעֱלִ֑י לֹא־תָס֥וּר מֵ֝עָלָ֗יו אִוַּלְתֹּֽו׃ פ
verses.englishText: Though thou shouldest bray a fool in a mortar with a pestle among groats, yet will not his foolishness depart from him.

jps.text: Though thou shouldest bray a fool in a mortar with a pestle among groats, yet will not his foolishness depart from him.

verses.hebrewText: יָדֹ֣עַ תֵּ֭דַע פְּנֵ֣י צֹאנֶ֑ךָ שִׁ֥ית לִ֝בְּךָ֗ לַעֲדָרִֽים׃
verses.englishText: Be thou diligent to know the state of thy flocks, and look well to thy herds;

jps.text: Be thou diligent to know the state of thy flocks, and look well to thy herds;

verses.hebrewText: כִּ֤י לֹ֣א לְעֹולָ֣ם חֹ֑סֶן וְאִם־נֵ֝֗זֶר לְדֹ֣ור *דֹור (וָדֹֽור)׃
verses.englishText: For riches are not for ever; and doth the crown endure unto all generations?

jps.text: For riches are not for ever; and doth the crown endure unto all generations?

verses.hebrewText: גָּלָ֣ה חָ֭צִיר וְנִרְאָה־דֶ֑שֶׁא וְ֝נֶאֶסְפ֗וּ עִשְּׂבֹ֥ות הָרִֽים׃
verses.englishText: When the hay is mown, and the tender grass showeth itself, and the herbs of the mountains are gathered in;

jps.text: When the hay is mown, and the tender grass showeth itself, and the herbs of the mountains are gathered in;

verses.hebrewText: כְּבָשִׂ֥ים לִלְבוּשֶׁ֑ךָ וּמְחִ֥יר שָׂ֝דֶ֗ה עַתּוּדִֽים׃
verses.englishText: The lambs will be for thy clothing, and the goats the price for a field.

jps.text: The lambs will be for thy clothing, and the goats the price for a field.

verses.hebrewText: וְדֵ֤י ׀ חֲלֵ֬ב עִזִּ֗ים לְֽ֭לַחְמְךָ לְלֶ֣חֶם בֵּיתֶ֑ךָ וְ֝חַיִּ֗ים לְנַעֲרֹותֶֽיךָ׃
verses.englishText: And there will be goats' milk enough for thy food, for the food of thy household; and maintenance for thy maidens.

jps.text: And there will be goats' milk enough for thy food, for the food of thy household; and maintenance for thy maidens.

verses.hebrewText: נָ֣סוּ וְאֵין־רֹדֵ֣ף רָשָׁ֑ע וְ֝צַדִּיקִ֗ים כִּכְפִ֥יר יִבְטָֽח׃
verses.englishText: The wicked flee when no man pursueth; but the righteous are secure as a young lion.

jps.text: The wicked flee when no man pursueth; but the righteous are secure as a young lion.

verses.hebrewText: בְּפֶ֣שַֽׁע אֶ֭רֶץ רַבִּ֣ים שָׂרֶ֑יהָ וּבְאָדָ֥ם מֵבִ֥ין יֹ֝דֵ֗עַ כֵּ֣ן יַאֲרִֽיךְ׃
verses.englishText: For the transgression of a land many are the princes thereof; but by a man of understanding and knowledge established order shall long continue.

jps.text: For the transgression of a land many are the princes thereof; but by a man of understanding and knowledge established order shall long continue.

verses.hebrewText: גֶּ֣בֶר רָ֭שׁ וְעֹשֵׁ֣ק דַּלִּ֑ים מָטָ֥ר סֹ֝חֵ֗ף וְאֵ֣ין לָֽחֶם׃
verses.englishText: A poor man that oppresseth the weak is like a sweeping rain which leaveth no food.

jps.text: A poor man that oppresseth the weak is like a sweeping rain which leaveth no food.

verses.hebrewText: עֹזְבֵ֣י תֹ֭ורָה יְהַֽלְל֣וּ רָשָׁ֑ע וְשֹׁמְרֵ֥י תֹ֝ורָ֗ה יִתְגָּ֥רוּ בָֽם׃ פ
verses.englishText: They that forsake the law praise the wicked; but such as keep the law contend with them.

jps.text: They that forsake the law praise the wicked; but such as keep the law contend with them.

verses.hebrewText: אַנְשֵׁי־רָ֭ע לֹא־יָבִ֣ינוּ מִשְׁפָּ֑ט וּמְבַקְשֵׁ֥י יְ֝הוָ֗ה יָבִ֥ינוּ כֹֽל׃
verses.englishText: Evil men understand not justice; but they that seek the LORD understand all things.

jps.text: Evil men understand not justice; but they that seek the LORD understand all things.

verses.hebrewText: טֹֽוב־רָ֭שׁ הֹולֵ֣ךְ בְּתֻמֹּ֑ו מֵעִקֵּ֥שׁ דְּ֝רָכַ֗יִם וְה֣וּא עָשִֽׁיר׃
verses.englishText: Better is the poor that walketh in his integrity, than he that is perverse in his ways, though he be rich.

jps.text: Better is the poor that walketh in his integrity, than he that is perverse in his ways, though he be rich.

verses.hebrewText: נֹוצֵ֣ר תֹּ֭ורָה בֵּ֣ן מֵבִ֑ין וְרֹעֶה זֹֽ֝ולְלִ֗ים יַכְלִ֥ים אָבִֽיו׃
verses.englishText: A wise son observeth the teaching; but he that is a companion of gluttonous men shameth his father.

jps.text: A wise son observeth the teaching; but he that is a companion of gluttonous men shameth his father.

verses.hebrewText: מַרְבֶּ֣ה הֹ֭ונֹו בְּנֶ֣שֶׁךְ *וּבְתַרְבִּית (וְתַרְבִּ֑ית) לְחֹונֵ֖ן דַּלִּ֣ים יִקְבְּצֶֽנּוּ׃
verses.englishText: He that augmenteth his substance by interest and increase, gathereth it for him that is gracious to the poor.

jps.text: He that augmenteth his substance by interest and increase, gathereth it for him that is gracious to the poor.

verses.hebrewText: מֵסִ֣יר אָ֭זְנֹו מִשְּׁמֹ֣עַ תֹּורָ֑ה גַּֽם־תְּ֝פִלָּתֹ֗ו תֹּועֵבָֽה׃
verses.englishText: He that turneth away his ear from hearing the law, even his prayer is an abomination.

jps.text: He that turneth away his ear from hearing the law, even his prayer is an abomination.

verses.hebrewText: מַשְׁגֶּ֤ה יְשָׁרִ֨ים ׀ בְּדֶ֥רֶךְ רָ֗ע בִּשְׁחוּתֹ֥ו הֽוּא־יִפֹּ֑ול וּ֝תְמִימִ֗ים יִנְחֲלוּ־טֹֽוב׃
verses.englishText: Whoso causeth the upright to go astray in an evil way, he shall fall himself into his own pit; but the whole-hearted shall inherit good.

jps.text: Whoso causeth the upright to go astray in an evil way, he shall fall himself into his own pit; but the whole-hearted shall inherit good.

verses.hebrewText: חָכָ֣ם בְּ֭עֵינָיו אִ֣ישׁ עָשִׁ֑יר וְדַ֖ל מֵבִ֣ין יַחְקְרֶֽנּוּ׃
verses.englishText: The rich man is wise in his own eyes; but the poor that hath understanding searcheth him through.

jps.text: The rich man is wise in his own eyes; but the poor that hath understanding searcheth him through.

verses.hebrewText: בַּעֲלֹ֣ץ צַ֭דִּיקִים רַבָּ֣ה תִפְאָ֑רֶת וּבְק֥וּם רְ֝שָׁעִ֗ים יְחֻפַּ֥שׂ אָדָֽם׃
verses.englishText: When the righteous exult, there is great glory; but when the wicked rise, men must be sought for.

jps.text: When the righteous exult, there is great glory; but when the wicked rise, men must be sought for.

verses.hebrewText: מְכַסֶּ֣ה פְ֭שָׁעָיו לֹ֣א יַצְלִ֑יחַ וּמֹודֶ֖ה וְעֹזֵ֣ב יְרֻחָֽם׃
verses.englishText: He that covereth his transgressions shall not prosper; but whoso confesseth and forsaketh them shall obtain mercy.

jps.text: He that covereth his transgressions shall not prosper; but whoso confesseth and forsaketh them shall obtain mercy.

verses.hebrewText: אַשְׁרֵ֣י אָ֭דָם מְפַחֵ֣ד תָּמִ֑יד וּמַקְשֶׁ֥ה לִ֝בֹּ֗ו יִפֹּ֥ול בְּרָעָֽה׃
verses.englishText: Happy is the man that feareth alway; but he that hardeneth his heart shall fall into evil.

jps.text: Happy is the man that feareth alway; but he that hardeneth his heart shall fall into evil.
