verses.hebrewText: אֲרִי־נֹ֭הֵם וְדֹ֣ב שֹׁוקֵ֑ק מֹשֵׁ֥ל רָ֝שָׁ֗ע עַ֣ל עַם־דָּֽל׃
verses.englishText: As a roaring lion, and a ravenous bear; so is a wicked ruler over a poor people.

jps.text: As a roaring lion, and a ravenous bear; so is a wicked ruler over a poor people.

verses.hebrewText: נָגִ֗יד חֲסַ֣ר תְּ֭בוּנֹות וְרַ֥ב מַעֲשַׁקֹּ֑ות *שֹׂנְאֵי (שֹׂ֥נֵא) בֶ֝֗צַע יַאֲרִ֥יךְ יָמִֽים׃ פ
verses.englishText: The prince that lacketh understanding is also a great oppressor; but he that hateth covetousness shall prolong his days.

jps.text: The prince that lacketh understanding is also a great oppressor; but he that hateth covetousness shall prolong his days.

verses.hebrewText: אָ֭דָם עָשֻׁ֣ק בְּדַם־נָ֑פֶשׁ עַד־בֹּ֥ור יָ֝נ֗וּס אַל־יִתְמְכוּ־בֹֽו׃
verses.englishText: A man that is laden with the blood of any person shall hasten his steps unto the pit; none will support him.

jps.text: A man that is laden with the blood of any person shall hasten his steps unto the pit; none will support him.

verses.hebrewText: הֹולֵ֣ךְ תָּ֭מִים יִוָּשֵׁ֑עַ וְנֶעְקַ֥שׁ דְּ֝רָכַ֗יִם יִפֹּ֥ול בְּאֶחָֽת׃
verses.englishText: Whoso walketh uprightly shall be saved; but he that is perverse in his ways shall fall at once.

jps.text: Whoso walketh uprightly shall be saved; but he that is perverse in his ways shall fall at once.

verses.hebrewText: עֹבֵ֣ד אַ֭דְמָתֹו יִֽשְׂבַּֽע־לָ֑חֶם וּמְרַדֵּ֥ף רֵ֝קִ֗ים יִֽשְׂבַּֽע־רִֽישׁ׃
verses.englishText: He that tilleth his ground shall have plenty of bread; but he that followeth after vain things shall have poverty enough.

jps.text: He that tilleth his ground shall have plenty of bread; but he that followeth after vain things shall have poverty enough.

verses.hebrewText: אִ֣ישׁ אֱ֭מוּנֹות רַב־בְּרָכֹ֑ות וְאָ֥ץ לְ֝הַעֲשִׁ֗יר לֹ֣א יִנָּקֶֽה׃
verses.englishText: A faithful man shall abound with blessings; but he that maketh haste to be rich shall not be unpunished.

jps.text: A faithful man shall abound with blessings; but he that maketh haste to be rich shall not be unpunished.

verses.hebrewText: הַֽכֵּר־פָּנִ֥ים לֹא־טֹ֑וב וְעַל־פַּת־לֶ֝֗חֶם יִפְשַׁע־גָּֽבֶר׃
verses.englishText: To have respect of persons is not good; for a man will transgress for a piece of bread.

jps.text: To have respect of persons is not good; for a man will transgress for a piece of bread.

verses.hebrewText: נִֽבֳהָ֥ל לַהֹ֗ון אִ֭ישׁ רַ֣ע עָ֑יִן וְלֹֽא־יֵ֝דַע כִּי־חֶ֥סֶר יְבֹאֶֽנּוּ׃
verses.englishText: He that hath an evil eye hasteneth after riches, and knoweth not that want shall come upon him.

jps.text: He that hath an evil eye hasteneth after riches, and knoweth not that want shall come upon him.

verses.hebrewText: מֹ֘וכִ֤יחַ אָדָ֣ם אַ֭חֲרַי חֵ֣ן יִמְצָ֑א מִֽמַּחֲלִ֥יק לָשֹֽׁון׃
verses.englishText: He that rebuketh a man shall in the end find more favour than he that flattereth with the tongue.

jps.text: He that rebuketh a man shall in the end find more favour than he that flattereth with the tongue.

verses.hebrewText: גֹּוזֵ֤ל ׀ אָ֘בִ֤יו וְאִמֹּ֗ו וְאֹמֵ֥ר אֵֽין־פָּ֑שַׁע חָבֵ֥ר ה֝֗וּא לְאִ֣ישׁ מַשְׁחִֽית׃
verses.englishText: Whoso robbeth his father or his mother, and saith: 'It is no transgression', the same is the companion of a destroyer.

jps.text: Whoso robbeth his father or his mother, and saith: 'It is no transgression', the same is the companion of a destroyer.

verses.hebrewText: רְחַב־נֶ֭פֶשׁ יְגָרֶ֣ה מָדֹ֑ון וּבֹוטֵ֖חַ עַל־יְהוָ֣ה יְדֻשָּֽׁן׃
verses.englishText: He that is of a greedy spirit stirreth up strife; but he that putteth his trust in the LORD shall be abundantly gratified.

jps.text: He that is of a greedy spirit stirreth up strife; but he that putteth his trust in the LORD shall be abundantly gratified.

verses.hebrewText: בֹּוטֵ֣חַ בְּ֭לִבֹּו ה֣וּא כְסִ֑יל וְהֹולֵ֥ךְ בְּ֝חָכְמָ֗ה ה֣וּא יִמָּלֵֽט׃
verses.englishText: He that trusteth in his own heart is a fool; but whoso walketh wisely, he shall escape.

jps.text: He that trusteth in his own heart is a fool; but whoso walketh wisely, he shall escape.

verses.hebrewText: נֹותֵ֣ן לָ֭רָשׁ אֵ֣ין מַחְסֹ֑ור וּמַעְלִ֥ים עֵ֝ינָ֗יו רַב־מְאֵרֹֽות׃
verses.englishText: He that giveth unto the poor shall not lack; but he that hideth his eyes shall have many a curse.

jps.text: He that giveth unto the poor shall not lack; but he that hideth his eyes shall have many a curse.

verses.hebrewText: בְּק֣וּם רְ֭שָׁעִים יִסָּתֵ֣ר אָדָ֑ם וּ֝בְאָבְדָ֗ם יִרְבּ֥וּ צַדִּיקִֽים׃
verses.englishText: When the wicked rise, men hide themselves; but when they perish, the righteous increase.

jps.text: When the wicked rise, men hide themselves; but when they perish, the righteous increase.

verses.hebrewText: אִ֣ישׁ תֹּ֭וכָחֹות מַקְשֶׁה־עֹ֑רֶף פֶּ֥תַע יִ֝שָּׁבֵ֗ר וְאֵ֣ין מַרְפֵּֽא׃
verses.englishText: He that being often reproved hardeneth his neck shall suddenly be broken, and that without remedy.

jps.text: He that being often reproved hardeneth his neck shall suddenly be broken, and that without remedy.

verses.hebrewText: בִּרְבֹ֣ות צַ֭דִּיקִים יִשְׂמַ֣ח הָעָ֑ם וּבִמְשֹׁ֥ל רָ֝שָׁ֗ע יֵאָ֥נַֽח עָֽם׃
verses.englishText: When the righteous are increased, the people rejoice; but when the wicked beareth rule, the people sigh.

jps.text: When the righteous are increased, the people rejoice; but when the wicked beareth rule, the people sigh.

verses.hebrewText: אִֽישׁ־אֹהֵ֣ב חָ֭כְמָה יְשַׂמַּ֣ח אָבִ֑יו וְרֹעֶ֥ה זֹ֝ונֹ֗ות יְאַבֶּד־הֹֽון׃
verses.englishText: Whoso loveth wisdom rejoiceth his father; but he that keepeth company with harlots wasteth his substance.

jps.text: Whoso loveth wisdom rejoiceth his father; but he that keepeth company with harlots wasteth his substance.

verses.hebrewText: מֶ֗לֶךְ בְּ֭מִשְׁפָּט יַעֲמִ֣יד אָ֑רֶץ וְאִ֖ישׁ תְּרוּמֹ֣ות יֶֽהֶרְסֶֽנָּה׃
verses.englishText: The king by justice establisheth the land; but he that exacteth gifts overthroweth it.

jps.text: The king by justice establisheth the land; but he that exacteth gifts overthroweth it.

verses.hebrewText: גֶּ֭בֶר מַחֲלִ֣יק עַל־רֵעֵ֑הוּ רֶ֝֗שֶׁת פֹּורֵ֥שׂ עַל־פְּעָמָֽיו׃
verses.englishText: A man that flattereth his neighbour spreadeth a net for his steps.

jps.text: A man that flattereth his neighbour spreadeth a net for his steps.

verses.hebrewText: בְּפֶ֤שַֽׁע אִ֣ישׁ רָ֣ע מֹוקֵ֑שׁ וְ֝צַדִּ֗יק יָר֥וּן וְשָׂמֵֽחַ׃
verses.englishText: In the transgression of an evil man there is a snare; but the righteous doth sing and rejoice.

jps.text: In the transgression of an evil man there is a snare; but the righteous doth sing and rejoice.

verses.hebrewText: יֹדֵ֣עַ צַ֭דִּיק דִּ֣ין דַּלִּ֑ים רָ֝שָׁ֗ע לֹא־יָבִ֥ין דָּֽעַת׃
verses.englishText: The righteous taketh knowledge of the cause of the poor; the wicked understandeth not knowledge.

jps.text: The righteous taketh knowledge of the cause of the poor; the wicked understandeth not knowledge.

verses.hebrewText: אַנְשֵׁ֣י לָ֭צֹון יָפִ֣יחוּ קִרְיָ֑ה וַ֝חֲכָמִ֗ים יָשִׁ֥יבוּ אָֽף׃
verses.englishText: Scornful men set a city in a blaze; but wise men turn away wrath.

jps.text: Scornful men set a city in a blaze; but wise men turn away wrath.

verses.hebrewText: אִֽישׁ־חָכָ֗ם נִ֭שְׁפָּט אֶת־אִ֣ישׁ אֱוִ֑יל וְרָגַ֥ז וְ֝שָׂחַ֗ק וְאֵ֣ין נָֽחַת׃
verses.englishText: If a wise man contendeth with a foolish man, whether he be angry or laugh, there will be no rest.

jps.text: If a wise man contendeth with a foolish man, whether he be angry or laugh, there will be no rest.

verses.hebrewText: אַנְשֵׁ֣י דָ֭מִים יִשְׂנְאוּ־תָ֑ם וִֽ֝ישָׁרִ֗ים יְבַקְשׁ֥וּ נַפְשֹֽׁו׃
verses.englishText: The men of blood hate him that is sincere; and as for the upright, they seek his life.

jps.text: The men of blood hate him that is sincere; and as for the upright, they seek his life.

verses.hebrewText: כָּל־ר֭וּחֹו יֹוצִ֣יא כְסִ֑יל וְ֝חָכָ֗ם בְּאָחֹ֥ור יְשַׁבְּחֶֽנָּה׃
verses.englishText: A fool spendeth all his spirit; but a wise man stilleth it within him.

jps.text: A fool spendeth all his spirit; but a wise man stilleth it within him.

verses.hebrewText: מֹ֭שֵׁל מַקְשִׁ֣יב עַל־דְּבַר־שָׁ֑קֶר כָּֽל־מְשָׁרְתָ֥יו רְשָׁעִֽים׃
verses.englishText: If a ruler hearkeneth to falsehood, all his servants are wicked.

jps.text: If a ruler hearkeneth to falsehood, all his servants are wicked.

verses.hebrewText: רָ֤שׁ וְאִ֣ישׁ תְּכָכִ֣ים נִפְגָּ֑שׁוּ מֵ֤אִיר־עֵינֵ֖י שְׁנֵיהֶ֣ם יְהוֽ͏ָה׃
verses.englishText: The poor man and the oppressor meet together; the LORD giveth light to the eyes of them both.

jps.text: The poor man and the oppressor meet together; the LORD giveth light to the eyes of them both.

verses.hebrewText: מֶ֤לֶךְ שֹׁופֵ֣ט בֶּֽאֱמֶ֣ת דַּלִּ֑ים כִּ֝סְאֹ֗ו לָעַ֥ד יִכֹּֽון׃
verses.englishText: The king that faithfully judgeth the poor, his throne shall be established for ever.

jps.text: The king that faithfully judgeth the poor, his throne shall be established for ever.

verses.hebrewText: שֵׁ֣בֶט וְ֭תֹוכַחַת יִתֵּ֣ן חָכְמָ֑ה וְנַ֥עַר מְ֝שֻׁלָּ֗ח מֵבִ֥ישׁ אִמֹּֽו׃
verses.englishText: The rod and reproof give wisdom; but a child left to himself causeth shame to his mother.

jps.text: The rod and reproof give wisdom; but a child left to himself causeth shame to his mother.

verses.hebrewText: בִּרְבֹ֣ות רְ֭שָׁעִים יִרְבֶּה־פָּ֑שַׁע וְ֝צַדִּיקִ֗ים בְּֽמַפַּלְתָּ֥ם יִרְאֽוּ׃
verses.englishText: When the wicked are increased, transgression increaseth; but the righteous shall gaze upon their fall.

jps.text: When the wicked are increased, transgression increaseth; but the righteous shall gaze upon their fall.

verses.hebrewText: יַסֵּ֣ר בִּ֭נְךָ וִֽינִיחֶ֑ךָ וְיִתֵּ֖ן מַעֲדַנִּ֣ים לְנַפְשֶֽׁךָ׃ פ
verses.englishText: Correct thy son, and he will give thee rest; yea, he will give delight unto thy soul.

jps.text: Correct thy son, and he will give thee rest; yea, he will give delight unto thy soul.

verses.hebrewText: בְּאֵ֣ין חָ֭זֹון יִפָּ֣רַֽע עָ֑ם וְשֹׁמֵ֖ר תֹּורָ֣ה אַשְׁרֵֽהוּ׃
verses.englishText: Where there is no vision, the people cast off restraint; but he that keepeth the law, happy is he.

jps.text: Where there is no vision, the people cast off restraint; but he that keepeth the law, happy is he.

verses.hebrewText: בִּ֭דְבָרִים לֹא־יִוָּ֣סֶר עָ֑בֶד כִּֽי־יָ֝בִ֗ין וְאֵ֣ין מַעֲנֶֽה׃
verses.englishText: A servant will not be corrected by words; for though he understand, there will be no response.

jps.text: A servant will not be corrected by words; for though he understand, there will be no response.

verses.hebrewText: חָזִ֗יתָ אִ֭ישׁ אָ֣ץ בִּדְבָרָ֑יו תִּקְוָ֖ה לִכְסִ֣יל מִמֶּֽנּוּ׃
verses.englishText: Seest thou a man that is hasty in his words? there is more hope for a fool than for him.

jps.text: Seest thou a man that is hasty in his words? there is more hope for a fool than for him.

verses.hebrewText: מְפַנֵּ֣ק מִנֹּ֣עַר עַבְדֹּ֑ו וְ֝אַחֲרִיתֹ֗ו יִהְיֶ֥ה מָנֹֽון׃
verses.englishText: He that delicately bringeth up his servant from a child shall have him become master at the last.

jps.text: He that delicately bringeth up his servant from a child shall have him become master at the last.

verses.hebrewText: אִֽישׁ־אַ֭ף יְגָרֶ֣ה מָדֹ֑ון וּבַ֖עַל חֵמָ֣ה רַב־פָּֽשַׁע׃
verses.englishText: An angry man stirreth up strife, and a wrathful man aboundeth in transgression.

jps.text: An angry man stirreth up strife, and a wrathful man aboundeth in transgression.

verses.hebrewText: גַּאֲוַ֣ת אָ֭דָם תַּשְׁפִּילֶ֑נּוּ וּשְׁפַל־ר֝֗וּחַ יִתְמֹ֥ךְ כָּבֹֽוד׃
verses.englishText: A man's pride shall bring him low; but he that is of a lowly spirit shall attain to honour.

jps.text: A man's pride shall bring him low; but he that is of a lowly spirit shall attain to honour.

verses.hebrewText: חֹולֵ֣ק עִם־גַּ֭נָּב שֹׂונֵ֣א נַפְשֹׁ֑ו אָלָ֥ה יִ֝שְׁמַ֗ע וְלֹ֣א יַגִּֽיד׃
verses.englishText: Whoso is partner with a thief hateth his own soul: he heareth the adjuration and uttereth nothing.

jps.text: Whoso is partner with a thief hateth his own soul: he heareth the adjuration and uttereth nothing.

verses.hebrewText: חֶרְדַּ֣ת אָ֭דָם יִתֵּ֣ן מֹוקֵ֑שׁ וּבֹוטֵ֖חַ בַּיהוָ֣ה יְשֻׂגָּֽב׃
verses.englishText: The fear of man bringeth a snare; but whoso putteth his trust in the LORD shall be set up on high.

jps.text: The fear of man bringeth a snare; but whoso putteth his trust in the LORD shall be set up on high.

verses.hebrewText: רַ֭בִּים מְבַקְשִׁ֣ים פְּנֵי־מֹושֵׁ֑ל וּ֝מֵיְהוָ֗ה מִשְׁפַּט־אִֽישׁ׃
verses.englishText: Many seek the ruler's favour; but a man's judgment cometh from the LORD.

jps.text: Many seek the ruler's favour; but a man's judgment cometh from the LORD.

verses.hebrewText: תֹּועֲבַ֣ת צַ֭דִּיקִים אִ֣ישׁ עָ֑וֶל וְתֹועֲבַ֖ת רָשָׁ֣ע יְשַׁר־דָּֽרֶךְ׃ פ
verses.englishText: An unjust man is an abomination to the righteous; and he that is upright in the way is an abomination to the wicked.

jps.text: An unjust man is an abomination to the righteous; and he that is upright in the way is an abomination to the wicked.

verses.hebrewText: דִּבְרֵ֤י ׀ אָג֥וּר בִּן־יָקֶ֗ה הַמַּ֫שָּׂ֥א נְאֻ֣ם הַ֭גֶּבֶר לְאִֽיתִיאֵ֑ל לְאִ֖יתִיאֵ֣ל וְאֻכָֽל׃
verses.englishText: The words of Agur the son of Jakeh; the burden. The man saith unto Ithiel, unto Ithiel and Ucal:

jps.text: The words of Agur the son of Jakeh; the burden. The man saith unto Ithiel, unto Ithiel and Ucal:

verses.hebrewText: כִּ֤י בַ֣עַר אָנֹכִ֣י מֵאִ֑ישׁ וְלֹֽא־בִינַ֖ת אָדָ֣ם לִֽי׃
verses.englishText: Surely I am brutish, unlike a man, and have not the understanding of a man;

jps.text: Surely I am brutish, unlike a man, and have not the understanding of a man;

verses.hebrewText: וְלֹֽא־לָמַ֥דְתִּי חָכְמָ֑ה וְדַ֖עַת קְדֹשִׁ֣ים אֵדָֽע׃
verses.englishText: And I have not learned wisdom, that I should have the knowledge of the Holy One.

jps.text: And I have not learned wisdom, that I should have the knowledge of the Holy One.

verses.hebrewText: מִ֤י עָלָֽה־שָׁמַ֨יִם ׀ וַיֵּרַ֡ד מִ֤י אָֽסַף־ר֨וּחַ ׀ בְּחָפְנָ֡יו מִ֤י צָֽרַר־מַ֨יִם ׀ בַּשִּׂמְלָ֗ה מִ֭י הֵקִ֣ים כָּל־אַפְסֵי־אָ֑רֶץ מַה־שְּׁמֹ֥ו וּמַֽה־שֶּׁם־בְּ֝נֹ֗ו כִּ֣י תֵדָֽע׃
verses.englishText: Who hath ascended up into heaven, and descended? Who hath gathered the wind in his fists? Who hath bound the waters in his garment? Who hath established all the ends of the earth? What is his name, and what is his son's name, if thou knowest?

jps.text: Who hath ascended up into heaven, and descended? Who hath gathered the wind in his fists? Who hath bound the waters in his garment? Who hath established all the ends of the earth? What is his name, and what is his son's name, if thou knowest?

verses.hebrewText: כָּל־אִמְרַ֣ת אֱלֹ֣והַּ צְרוּפָ֑ה מָגֵ֥ן ה֝֗וּא לַֽחֹסִ֥ים בֹּֽו׃
verses.englishText: Every word of God is tried; He is a shield unto them that take refuge in Him.

jps.text: Every word of God is tried; He is a shield unto them that take refuge in Him.

verses.hebrewText: אַל־תֹּ֥וסְףְּ עַל־דְּבָרָ֑יו פֶּן־יֹוכִ֖יחַ בְּךָ֣ וְנִכְזָֽבְתָּ׃ פ
verses.englishText: Add thou not unto His words, lest He reprove thee, and thou be found a liar.

jps.text: Add thou not unto His words, lest He reprove thee, and thou be found a liar.

verses.hebrewText: שְׁ֭תַּיִם שָׁאַ֣לְתִּי מֵאִתָּ֑ךְ אַל־תִּמְנַ֥ע מִ֝מֶּ֗נִּי בְּטֶ֣רֶם אָמֽוּת׃
verses.englishText: Two things have I asked of Thee; deny me them not before I die:

jps.text: Two things have I asked of Thee; deny me them not before I die:

verses.hebrewText: שָׁ֤וְא ׀ וּֽדְבַר־כָּזָ֡ב הַרְחֵ֬ק מִמֶּ֗נִּי רֵ֣אשׁ וָ֭עֹשֶׁר אַל־תִּֽתֶּן־לִ֑י הַ֝טְרִיפֵ֗נִי לֶ֣חֶם חֻקִּֽי׃
verses.englishText: Remove far from me falsehood and lies; give me neither poverty nor riches; feed me with mine allotted bread;

jps.text: Remove far from me falsehood and lies; give me neither poverty nor riches; feed me with mine allotted bread;

verses.hebrewText: פֶּ֥ן אֶשְׂבַּ֨ע ׀ וְכִחַשְׁתִּי֮ וְאָמַ֗רְתִּי מִ֥י יְה֫וָ֥ה וּפֶֽן־אִוָּרֵ֥שׁ וְגָנַ֑בְתִּי וְ֝תָפַ֗שְׂתִּי שֵׁ֣ם אֱלֹהָֽי׃ פ
verses.englishText: Lest I be full, and deny, and say: 'Who is the LORD?' Or lest I be poor, and steal, and profane the name of my God.

jps.text: Lest I be full, and deny, and say: 'Who is the LORD?' Or lest I be poor, and steal, and profane the name of my God.

verses.hebrewText: אַל־תַּלְשֵׁ֣ן עֶ֭בֶד אֶל־*אֲדֹנֹו (אֲדֹנָ֑יו) פֶּֽן־יְקַלֶּלְךָ֥ וְאָשָֽׁמְתָּ׃
verses.englishText: Slander not a servant unto his master, lest he curse thee, and thou be found guilty.

jps.text: Slander not a servant unto his master, lest he curse thee, and thou be found guilty.

verses.hebrewText: דֹּ֭ור אָבִ֣יו יְקַלֵּ֑ל וְאֶת־אִ֝מֹּ֗ו לֹ֣א יְבָרֵֽךְ׃
verses.englishText: There is a generation that curse their father, and do not bless their mother.

jps.text: There is a generation that curse their father, and do not bless their mother.

verses.hebrewText: דֹּ֭ור טָהֹ֣ור בְּעֵינָ֑יו וּ֝מִצֹּאָתֹ֗ו לֹ֣א רֻחָֽץ׃
verses.englishText: There is a generation that are pure in their own eyes, and yet are not washed from their filthiness.

jps.text: There is a generation that are pure in their own eyes, and yet are not washed from their filthiness.

verses.hebrewText: דֹּ֭ור מָה־רָמ֣וּ עֵינָ֑יו וְ֝עַפְעַפָּ֗יו יִנָּשֵֽׂאוּ׃
verses.englishText: There is a generation, Oh how lofty are their eyes! and their eyelids are lifted up.

jps.text: There is a generation, Oh how lofty are their eyes! and their eyelids are lifted up.

verses.hebrewText: דֹּ֤ור ׀ חֲרָבֹ֣ות שִׁנָּיו֮ וּֽמַאֲכָלֹ֪ות מְֽתַלְּעֹ֫תָ֥יו לֶאֱכֹ֣ל עֲנִיִּ֣ים מֵאֶ֑רֶץ וְ֝אֶבְיֹונִ֗ים מֵאָדָֽם׃ פ
verses.englishText: There is a generation whose teeth are as swords, and their great teeth as knives, to devour the poor from off the earth, and the needy from among men.

jps.text: There is a generation whose teeth are as swords, and their great teeth as knives, to devour the poor from off the earth, and the needy from among men.

verses.hebrewText: לֽ͏ַעֲלוּקָ֨ה ׀ שְׁתֵּ֥י בָנֹות֮ הַ֤ב ׀ הַ֥ב שָׁלֹ֣ושׁ הֵ֭נָּה לֹ֣א תִשְׂבַּ֑עְנָה אַ֝רְבַּ֗ע לֹא־אָ֥מְרוּ הֹֽון׃
verses.englishText: The horseleech hath two daughters: 'Give, give.' There are three things that are never satisfied, yea, four that say not: 'Enough':

jps.text: The horseleech hath two daughters: 'Give, give.' There are three things that are never satisfied, yea, four that say not: 'Enough':

verses.hebrewText: שְׁאֹול֮ וְעֹ֪צֶ֫ר רָ֥חַם אֶ֭רֶץ לֹא־שָׂ֣בְעָה מַּ֑יִם וְ֝אֵ֗שׁ לֹא־אָ֥מְרָה הֹֽון׃
verses.englishText: The grave; and the barren womb; the earth that is not satisfied with water; and the fire that saith not: 'Enough.'

jps.text: The grave; and the barren womb; the earth that is not satisfied with water; and the fire that saith not: 'Enough.'

verses.hebrewText: עַ֤יִן ׀ תִּֽלְעַ֣ג לְאָב֮ וְתָב֪וּז לִֽיקֲּהַ֫ת־אֵ֥ם יִקְּר֥וּהָ עֹרְבֵי־נַ֑חַל וְֽיֹאכְל֥וּהָ בְנֵי־נָֽשֶׁר׃ פ
verses.englishText: The eye that mocketh at his father, and despiseth to obey his mother, the ravens of the valley shall pick it out, and the young vultures shall eat it.

jps.text: The eye that mocketh at his father, and despiseth to obey his mother, the ravens of the valley shall pick it out, and the young vultures shall eat it.

verses.hebrewText: שְׁלֹשָׁ֣ה הֵ֭מָּה נִפְלְא֣וּ מִמֶּ֑נִּי *וְאַרְבָּע (וְ֝אַרְבָּעָ֗ה) לֹ֣א יְדַעְתִּֽים׃
verses.englishText: There are three things which are too wonderful for me, yea, four which I know not:

jps.text: There are three things which are too wonderful for me, yea, four which I know not:

verses.hebrewText: דֶּ֤רֶךְ הַנֶּ֨שֶׁר ׀ בַּשָּׁמַיִם֮ דֶּ֥רֶךְ נָחָ֗שׁ עֲלֵ֫י צ֥וּר דֶּֽרֶךְ־אֳנִיָּ֥ה בְלֶב־יָ֑ם וְדֶ֖רֶךְ גֶּ֣בֶר בְּעַלְמָֽה׃
verses.englishText: The way of an eagle in the air; the way of a serpent upon a rock; the way of a ship in the midst of the sea; and the way of a man with a young woman.

jps.text: The way of an eagle in the air; the way of a serpent upon a rock; the way of a ship in the midst of the sea; and the way of a man with a young woman.

verses.hebrewText: כֵּ֤ן ׀ דֶּ֥רֶךְ אִשָּׁ֗ה מְנָ֫אָ֥פֶת אָ֭כְלָה וּמָ֣חֲתָה פִ֑יהָ וְ֝אָמְרָ֗ה לֹֽא־פָעַ֥לְתִּי אָֽוֶן׃ פ
verses.englishText: So is the way of an adulterous woman; she eateth, and wipeth her mouth, and saith: 'I have done no wickedness.'

jps.text: So is the way of an adulterous woman; she eateth, and wipeth her mouth, and saith: 'I have done no wickedness.'

verses.hebrewText: תַּ֣חַת שָׁ֭לֹושׁ רָ֣גְזָה אֶ֑רֶץ וְתַ֥חַת אַ֝רְבַּ֗ע לֹא־תוּכַ֥ל שְׂאֵֽת׃
verses.englishText: For three things the earth doth quake, and for four it cannot endure:

jps.text: For three things the earth doth quake, and for four it cannot endure:

verses.hebrewText: תַּֽחַת־עֶ֭בֶד כִּ֣י יִמְלֹ֑וךְ וְ֝נָבָ֗ל כִּ֣י יִֽשְׂבַּֽע־לָֽחֶם׃
verses.englishText: For a servant when he reigneth; and a churl when he is filled with food;

jps.text: For a servant when he reigneth; and a churl when he is filled with food;

verses.hebrewText: תַּ֣חַת שְׂ֭נוּאָה כִּ֣י תִבָּעֵ֑ל וְ֝שִׁפְחָ֗ה כִּֽי־תִירַ֥שׁ גְּבִרְתָּֽהּ׃ פ
verses.englishText: For an odious woman when she is married; and a handmaid that is heir to her mistress.

jps.text: For an odious woman when she is married; and a handmaid that is heir to her mistress.

verses.hebrewText: אַרְבָּ֣עָה הֵ֭ם קְטַנֵּי־אָ֑רֶץ וְ֝הֵ֗מָּה חֲכָמִ֥ים מְחֻכָּמִֽים׃
verses.englishText: There are four things which are little upon the earth, but they are exceeding wise:

jps.text: There are four things which are little upon the earth, but they are exceeding wise:

verses.hebrewText: הַ֭נְּמָלִים עַ֣ם לֹא־עָ֑ז וַיָּכִ֖ינוּ בַקַּ֣יִץ לַחְמָֽם׃
verses.englishText: The ants are a people not strong, yet they provide their food in the summer;

jps.text: The ants are a people not strong, yet they provide their food in the summer;

verses.hebrewText: שְׁ֭פַנִּים עַ֣ם לֹא־עָצ֑וּם וַיָּשִׂ֖ימוּ בַסֶּ֣לַע בֵּיתָֽם׃
verses.englishText: The rock-badgers are but a feeble folk, yet make they their houses in the crags;

jps.text: The rock-badgers are but a feeble folk, yet make they their houses in the crags;

verses.hebrewText: מֶ֭לֶךְ אֵ֣ין לָאַרְבֶּ֑ה וַיֵּצֵ֖א חֹצֵ֣ץ כֻּלֹּֽו׃
verses.englishText: The locusts have no king, yet go they forth all of them by bands;

jps.text: The locusts have no king, yet go they forth all of them by bands;

verses.hebrewText: שְׂ֭מָמִית בְּיָדַ֣יִם תְּתַפֵּ֑שׂ וְ֝הִ֗יא בְּהֵ֣יכְלֵי מֶֽלֶךְ׃ פ
verses.englishText: The spider thou canst take with the hands, yet is she in kings' palaces.

jps.text: The spider thou canst take with the hands, yet is she in kings' palaces.

verses.hebrewText: שְׁלֹשָׁ֣ה הֵ֭מָּה מֵיטִ֣יבֵי צָ֑עַד וְ֝אַרְבָּעָ֗ה מֵיטִ֥בֵי לָֽכֶת׃
verses.englishText: There are three things which are stately in their march, yea, four which are stately in going:

jps.text: There are three things which are stately in their march, yea, four which are stately in going:

verses.hebrewText: לַ֭יִשׁ גִּבֹּ֣ור בַּבְּהֵמָ֑ה וְלֹא־יָ֝שׁ֗וּב מִפְּנֵי־כֹֽל׃
verses.englishText: The lion, which is mightiest among beasts, and turneth not away for any;

jps.text: The lion, which is mightiest among beasts, and turneth not away for any;

verses.hebrewText: זַרְזִ֣יר מָתְנַ֣יִם אֹו־תָ֑יִשׁ וּ֝מֶ֗לֶךְ אַלְק֥וּם עִמֹּֽו׃
verses.englishText: The greyhound; the he-goat also; and the king, against whom there is no rising up.

jps.text: The greyhound; the he-goat also; and the king, against whom there is no rising up.

verses.hebrewText: אִם־נָבַ֥לְתָּ בְהִתְנַשֵּׂ֑א וְאִם־זַ֝מֹּ֗ותָ יָ֣ד לְפֶֽה׃
verses.englishText: If thou hast done foolishly in lifting up thyself, or if thou hast planned devices, lay thy hand upon thy mouth.

jps.text: If thou hast done foolishly in lifting up thyself, or if thou hast planned devices, lay thy hand upon thy mouth.

verses.hebrewText: כִּ֤י מִ֪יץ חָלָ֡ב יֹ֘וצִ֤יא חֶמְאָ֗ה וּֽמִיץ־אַ֭ף יֹ֣וצִיא דָ֑ם וּמִ֥יץ אַ֝פַּ֗יִם יֹ֣וצִיא רִֽיב׃ פ
verses.englishText: For the churning of milk bringeth forth curd, and the wringing of the nose bringeth forth blood; so the forcing of wrath bringeth forth strife.

jps.text: For the churning of milk bringeth forth curd, and the wringing of the nose bringeth forth blood; so the forcing of wrath bringeth forth strife.

verses.hebrewText: דִּ֭בְרֵי לְמוּאֵ֣ל מֶ֑לֶךְ מַ֝שָּׂ֗א אֲ‍ֽשֶׁר־יִסְּרַ֥תּוּ אִמֹּֽו׃
verses.englishText: The words of king Lemuel; the burden wherewith his mother corrected him.

jps.text: The words of king Lemuel; the burden wherewith his mother corrected him.

verses.hebrewText: מַה־בְּ֭רִי וּמַֽה־בַּר־בִּטְנִ֑י וּ֝מֶה בַּר־נְדָרָֽי׃
verses.englishText: What, my son? and what, O son of my womb? and what, O son of my vows?

jps.text: What, my son? and what, O son of my womb? and what, O son of my vows?

verses.hebrewText: אַל־תִּתֵּ֣ן לַנָּשִׁ֣ים חֵילֶ֑ךָ וּ֝דְרָכֶ֗יךָ לַֽמְחֹ֥ות מְלָכִֽין׃
verses.englishText: Give not thy strength unto women, nor thy ways to that which destroyeth kings.

jps.text: Give not thy strength unto women, nor thy ways to that which destroyeth kings.

verses.hebrewText: אַ֤ל לַֽמְלָכִ֨ים ׀ לְֽמֹואֵ֗ל אַ֣ל לַֽמְלָכִ֣ים שְׁתֹו־יָ֑יִן וּ֝לְרֹוזְנִ֗ים *אֹו (אֵ֣י) שֵׁכָֽר׃
verses.englishText: It is not for kings, O Lemuel, it is not for kings to drink wine: nor for princes to say: 'Where is strong drink?'

jps.text: It is not for kings, O Lemuel, it is not for kings to drink wine: nor for princes to say: 'Where is strong drink?'

verses.hebrewText: פֶּן־יִ֭שְׁתֶּה וְיִשְׁכַּ֣ח מְחֻקָּ֑ק וִֽ֝ישַׁנֶּה דִּ֣ין כָּל־בְּנֵי־עֹֽנִי׃
verses.englishText: Lest they drink, and forget that which is decreed, and pervert the justice due to any that is afflicted.

jps.text: Lest they drink, and forget that which is decreed, and pervert the justice due to any that is afflicted.

verses.hebrewText: תְּנוּ־שֵׁכָ֣ר לְאֹובֵ֑ד וְ֝יַיִן לְמָ֣רֵי נָֽפֶשׁ׃
verses.englishText: Give strong drink unto him that is ready to perish, and wine unto the bitter in soul;

jps.text: Give strong drink unto him that is ready to perish, and wine unto the bitter in soul;

verses.hebrewText: יִ֭שְׁתֶּה וְיִשְׁכַּ֣ח רִישֹׁ֑ו וַ֝עֲמָלֹ֗ו לֹ֣א יִזְכָּר־עֹֽוד׃
verses.englishText: Let him drink, and forget his poverty, and remember his misery no more.

jps.text: Let him drink, and forget his poverty, and remember his misery no more.

verses.hebrewText: פְּתַח־פִּ֥יךָ לְאִלֵּ֑ם אֶל־דִּ֝֗ין כָּל־בְּנֵ֥י חֲלֹֽוף׃
verses.englishText: Open thy mouth for the dumb, in the cause of all such as are appointed to destruction.

jps.text: Open thy mouth for the dumb, in the cause of all such as are appointed to destruction.

verses.hebrewText: פְּתַח־פִּ֥יךָ שְׁפָט־צֶ֑דֶק וְ֝דִ֗ין עָנִ֥י וְאֶבְיֹֽון׃ פ
verses.englishText: Open thy mouth, judge righteously, and plead the cause of the poor and needy.

jps.text: Open thy mouth, judge righteously, and plead the cause of the poor and needy.

verses.hebrewText: אֵֽשֶׁת־חַ֭יִל מִ֣י יִמְצָ֑א וְרָחֹ֖ק מִפְּנִינִ֣ים מִכְרָֽהּ׃
verses.englishText: A woman of valour who can find? for her price is far above rubies.

jps.text: A woman of valour who can find? for her price is far above rubies.

verses.hebrewText: בָּ֣טַח בָּ֭הּ לֵ֣ב בַּעְלָ֑הּ וְ֝שָׁלָ֗ל לֹ֣א יֶחְסָֽר׃
verses.englishText: The heart of her husband doth safely trust in her, and he hath no lack of gain.

jps.text: The heart of her husband doth safely trust in her, and he hath no lack of gain.

verses.hebrewText: גְּמָלַ֣תְהוּ טֹ֣וב וְלֹא־רָ֑ע כֹּ֝֗ל יְמֵ֣י חַיֶּֽיה׃
verses.englishText: She doeth him good and not evil all the days of her life.

jps.text: She doeth him good and not evil all the days of her life.

verses.hebrewText: דָּ֭רְשָׁה צֶ֣מֶר וּפִשְׁתִּ֑ים וַ֝תַּ֗עַשׂ בְּחֵ֣פֶץ כַּפֶּֽיהָ׃
verses.englishText: She seeketh wool and flax, and worketh willingly with her hands.

jps.text: She seeketh wool and flax, and worketh willingly with her hands.

verses.hebrewText: הָ֭יְתָה כָּאֳנִיֹּ֣ות סֹוחֵ֑ר מִ֝מֶּרְחָ֗ק תָּבִ֥יא לַחְמָֽהּ׃
verses.englishText: She is like the merchant-ships; she bringeth her food from afar.

jps.text: She is like the merchant-ships; she bringeth her food from afar.

verses.hebrewText: וַתָּ֤קָם ׀ בְּעֹ֬וד לַ֗יְלָה וַתִּתֵּ֣ן טֶ֣רֶף לְבֵיתָ֑הּ וְ֝חֹ֗ק לְנַעֲרֹתֶֽיהָ׃
verses.englishText: She riseth also while it is yet night, and giveth food to her household, and a portion to her maidens.

jps.text: She riseth also while it is yet night, and giveth food to her household, and a portion to her maidens.

verses.hebrewText: זָמְמָ֣ה שָׂ֭דֶה וַתִּקָּחֵ֑הוּ מִפְּרִ֥י כַ֝פֶּ֗יהָ *נְטַע (נָ֣טְעָה) כָּֽרֶם׃
verses.englishText: She considereth a field, and buyeth it; with the fruit of her hands she planteth a vineyard.

jps.text: She considereth a field, and buyeth it; with the fruit of her hands she planteth a vineyard.

verses.hebrewText: חָֽגְרָ֣ה בְעֹ֣וז מָתְנֶ֑יהָ וַ֝תְּאַמֵּ֗ץ זְרֹעֹותֶֽיהָ׃
verses.englishText: She girdeth her loins with strength, and maketh strong her arms.

jps.text: She girdeth her loins with strength, and maketh strong her arms.

verses.hebrewText: טָ֭עֲמָה כִּי־טֹ֣וב סַחְרָ֑הּ לֹֽא־יִכְבֶּ֖ה *בַלַּיִל (בַלַּ֣יְלָה) נֵרָֽהּ׃
verses.englishText: She perceiveth that her merchandise is good; her lamp goeth not out by night.

jps.text: She perceiveth that her merchandise is good; her lamp goeth not out by night.

verses.hebrewText: יָ֭דֶיהָ שִׁלְּחָ֣ה בַכִּישֹׁ֑ור וְ֝כַפֶּ֗יהָ תָּ֣מְכוּ פָֽלֶךְ׃
verses.englishText: She layeth her hands to the distaff, and her hands hold the spindle.

jps.text: She layeth her hands to the distaff, and her hands hold the spindle.

verses.hebrewText: כַּ֭פָּהּ פָּרְשָׂ֣ה לֶעָנִ֑י וְ֝יָדֶ֗יהָ שִׁלְּחָ֥ה לָֽאֶבְיֹֽון׃
verses.englishText: She stretcheth out her hand to the poor; yea, she reacheth forth her hands to the needy.

jps.text: She stretcheth out her hand to the poor; yea, she reacheth forth her hands to the needy.

verses.hebrewText: לֹא־תִירָ֣א לְבֵיתָ֣הּ מִשָּׁ֑לֶג כִּ֥י כָל־בֵּ֝יתָ֗הּ לָבֻ֥שׁ שָׁנִֽים׃
verses.englishText: She is not afraid of the snow for her household; for all her household are clothed with scarlet.

jps.text: She is not afraid of the snow for her household; for all her household are clothed with scarlet.

verses.hebrewText: מַרְבַדִּ֥ים עָֽשְׂתָה־לָּ֑הּ שֵׁ֖שׁ וְאַרְגָּמָ֣ן לְבוּשָֽׁהּ׃
verses.englishText: She maketh for herself coverlets; her clothing is fine linen and purple.

jps.text: She maketh for herself coverlets; her clothing is fine linen and purple.

verses.hebrewText: נֹודָ֣ע בַּשְּׁעָרִ֣ים בַּעְלָ֑הּ בְּ֝שִׁבְתֹּ֗ו עִם־זִקְנֵי־אָֽרֶץ׃
verses.englishText: Her husband is known in the gates, when he sitteth among the elders of the land.

jps.text: Her husband is known in the gates, when he sitteth among the elders of the land.

verses.hebrewText: סָדִ֣ין עָ֭שְׂתָה וַתִּמְכֹּ֑ר וַ֝חֲגֹ֗ור נָתְנָ֥ה לַֽכְּנַעֲנִֽי׃
verses.englishText: She maketh linen garments and selleth them; and delivereth girdles unto the merchant.

jps.text: She maketh linen garments and selleth them; and delivereth girdles unto the merchant.

verses.hebrewText: עֹז־וְהָדָ֥ר לְבוּשָׁ֑הּ וַ֝תִּשְׂחַ֗ק לְיֹ֣ום אַחֲרֹֽון׃
verses.englishText: Strength and dignity are her clothing; and she laugheth at the time to come.

jps.text: Strength and dignity are her clothing; and she laugheth at the time to come.

verses.hebrewText: פִּ֭יהָ פָּתְחָ֣ה בְחָכְמָ֑ה וְתֹֽורַת־חֶ֝֗סֶד עַל־לְשֹׁונָֽהּ׃
verses.englishText: She openeth her mouth with wisdom; and the law of kindness is on her tongue.

jps.text: She openeth her mouth with wisdom; and the law of kindness is on her tongue.

verses.hebrewText: צֹ֭ופִיָּה הֲלִיכֹ֣ות בֵּיתָ֑הּ וְלֶ֥חֶם עַ֝צְל֗וּת לֹ֣א תֹאכֵֽל׃
verses.englishText: She looketh well to the ways of her household, and eateth not the bread of idleness.

jps.text: She looketh well to the ways of her household, and eateth not the bread of idleness.

verses.hebrewText: קָ֣מוּ בָ֭נֶיהָ וַֽיְאַשְּׁר֑וּהָ בַּ֝עְלָ֗הּ וַֽיְהַֽלְלָֽהּ׃
verses.englishText: Her children rise up, and call her blessed; her husband also, and he praiseth her:

jps.text: Her children rise up, and call her blessed; her husband also, and he praiseth her:

verses.hebrewText: רַבֹּ֣ות בָּ֭נֹות עָ֣שׂוּ חָ֑יִל וְ֝אַ֗תְּ עָלִ֥ית עַל־כֻּלָּֽנָה׃
verses.englishText: 'Many daughters have done valiantly, but thou excellest them all.'

jps.text: 'Many daughters have done valiantly, but thou excellest them all.'

verses.hebrewText: שֶׁ֣קֶר הַ֭חֵן וְהֶ֣בֶל הַיֹּ֑פִי אִשָּׁ֥ה יִרְאַת־יְ֝הוָ֗ה הִ֣יא תִתְהַלָּֽל׃
verses.englishText: Grace is deceitful, and beauty is vain; but a woman that feareth the LORD, she shall be praised.

jps.text: Grace is deceitful, and beauty is vain; but a woman that feareth the LORD, she shall be praised.

verses.hebrewText: תְּנוּ־לָ֭הּ מִפְּרִ֣י יָדֶ֑יהָ וִֽיהַלְל֖וּהָ בַשְּׁעָרִ֣ים מַעֲשֶֽׂיהָ׃
verses.englishText: Give her of the fruit of her hands; and let her works praise her in the gates.

jps.text: Give her of the fruit of her hands; and let her works praise her in the gates.
